BoN reliably improves when we sample more augmented prompts. Across all modalities, ASR, as a function of the number of samples (N), empirically follows power-law-like behavior for many orders of magnitude. BoN Jailbreaking can also be composed with other black-box algorithms for even more effective attacks---combining BoN with an optimized prefix attack achieves up to a 35% increase in ASR. Overall, our work indicates that, despite their capability, language models are sensitive to seemingly innocuous changes to inputs, which attackers can exploit across modalities.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Best-of-N（BoN）越狱，这是一种简单的黑盒算法，能够在多种模态上越狱前沿 AI 系统。BoN 越狱通过反复对提示词进行带有多种增强方式的变体采样来实现，例如对文本提示进行随机打乱或大小写变化，直到诱发出有害回应。我们发现，当采样 10,000 个增强提示时，BoN 越狱在闭源语言模型上实现了很高的攻击成功率（ASR），例如在 GPT-4o 上达到 89%，在 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 上达到 78%。此外，它对于绕过最先进的开源防御（如 circuit breakers）以及像 o1 这样的推理模型也同样有效。BoN 还可以无缝扩展到其他模态：它使用特定于模态的增强方式，对 GPT-4o 等视觉语言模型（VLM）以及 Gemini 1.5 Pro 等音频语言模型（ALM）实施越狱。随着我们采样更多增强提示，BoN 会稳定地变得更有效。在所有模态中，ASR 作为采样数（N）的函数，在经验上于多个数量级范围内都遵循类似幂律的行为。BoN 越狱还可以与其他黑盒算法组合，以实现更有效的攻击，例如将 BoN 与一种优化的前缀攻击结合，可使 ASR 最多提高 35%。总体而言，我们的工作表明，尽管语言模型能力很强，但它们对输入中看似无害的变化依然敏感，而攻击者可以在多种模态中利用这一点。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: SERE: Similarity-based Expert Re-routing for Efficient Batch Decoding in MoE Models
title_zh: SERE：基于相似度的专家重路由用于MoE模型中高效的批量解码
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures employ sparse activation to deliver faster training and inference with higher accuracy than dense LLMs. However, in production serving, MoE models require batch inference to optimize hardware efficiency, which may cause excessive expert activation and thus slow the memory-bound decoding stage. To address the fundamental tension between batch decoding and expert sparsity, we present **SERE**, a **S**imilarity-based **E**xpert **R**e-routing method for **E**fficient batch decoding in MoE models. SERE dynamically reduces the number of active experts in an input-aware manner by re-routing tokens from secondary experts to their most similar primary counterparts. It also leverages similarity patterns to identify and preserve critical experts, thereby preventing capability loss. Notably, SERE avoids static expert pruning or merging, instead enabling dynamic expert skipping based on batch-level expert redundancy. Additionally, we provide an efficient custom CUDA kernel for SERE, enabling plug-and-play use in vLLM with only a single-line code change. Extensive experiments on various complex reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SERE achieves up to $2.0\times$ speedup with minimal quality loss, providing a practical solution for cost-efficient and latency-sensitive large-scale MoE deployment.
abstract_zh: 混合专家（MoE）架构采用稀疏激活机制，与稠密大语言模型相比，能够实现更快的训练和推理速度以及更高的精度。然而在生产服务场景中，MoE模型需要通过批量推理优化硬件效率，这可能导致专家激活量过高，进而拖慢受内存限制的解码阶段。为解决批量解码与专家稀疏性之间的根本矛盾，我们提出SERE，即面向MoE模型高效批量解码的基于相似度的专家重路由方法。SERE通过将次级专家中的令牌重路由至与其相似度最高的对应主专家，以输入感知的方式动态减少活跃专家的数量。它还利用相似度模式识别并保留关键专家，从而避免能力损失。值得注意的是，SERE没有采用静态专家剪枝或合并策略，而是基于批次层面的专家冗余实现动态专家跳过。此外，我们为SERE提供了高效的自定义CUDA内核，仅需修改一行代码即可在vLLM中即插即用。在各类复杂推理基准测试上开展的大量实验表明，SERE实现了最高2倍的加速比，且质量损失极小，为成本高效、对延迟敏感的大规模MoE部署提供了实用方案。
notes: ['论文聚焦 MoE 推理阶段的批量解码加速，而非训练期压缩。', '未体现上下文缓存优化；方法核心是专家重路由、批级冗余利用与 CUDA 内核实现。', '虽然涉及减少活跃专家，但明确避免 static expert pruning or merging，因此不归为模型压缩。']

title: SqueezeAttention: 2D Management of KV-Cache in LLM Inference via Layer-wise Optimal Budget
title_zh: SqueezeAttention：通过层级最优预算在 LLM 推理中对 KV 缓存进行二维管理
abstract: Optimizing the Key-Value (KV) cache of the Large Language Model (LLM) has been considered critical to saving the cost of inference. Most of the existing KV-cache compression algorithms attempted to sparsify the sequence of tokens by taking advantage of the different importance of tokens. However, most of these methods treat all layers equally, allocating the same KV budget to each layer. This approach is suboptimal, as some layers may be less sensitive to input tokens yet still receive the same budget as others. In this work, we found that by identifying the importance of attention layers, we could optimize the KV-cache jointly from two dimensions, i.e., sequence-wise and layer-wise. Based on our observations regarding layer-wise importance in inference, we propose \sys to precisely optimize the allocation of KV-cache budget among layers on-the-fly and then incorporate three representative sequence-wise algorithms to compress the KV-cache for each layer with its very own budget. Specifically, we first measure each layer's importance by calculating the cosine similarity of the input prompt differences before and after the self-attention layers. Based on this similarity, we then categorize the layers into two groups and adjust their KV budgets accordingly. By optimizing the KV-cache from both sequence's and layer's dimensions, \sys achieves around 30\% to 70\% of the memory reductions and up to 2.2 $\times$ of throughput improvements in a wide range of LLMs and benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/hetailang/SqueezeAttention.
abstract_zh: 优化大语言模型（LLM）的键值（KV）缓存被认为是降低推理成本的关键。现有大多数KV缓存压缩算法都利用不同词元的重要性差异来稀疏化词元序列。然而，这类方法大多对所有层一视同仁，为每一层分配相同的KV预算。这种方式并非最优，因为部分层对输入词元的敏感度较低，却仍获得与其他层相同的预算。在本研究中，我们发现通过识别注意力层的重要性，可以从序列和层两个维度联合优化KV缓存。基于我们对推理过程中层级重要性的观察，我们提出SqueezeAttention，用于精准地动态优化各层之间的KV缓存预算分配，随后整合三种具有代表性的序列维度算法，以各层专属的预算压缩每一层的KV缓存。具体而言，我们首先通过计算自注意力层前后输入提示差异的余弦相似度来衡量每一层的重要性，再基于该相似度将各层划分为两组，并相应调整其KV预算。通过同时从序列和层两个维度优化KV缓存，SqueezeAttention在各类大语言模型和基准测试中实现了约30%至70%的内存缩减，吞吐量最高可提升2.2倍。代码可在https://github.com/hetailang/SqueezeAttention获取。
notes: 论文核心是 LLM 推理中的 KV-cache 压缩与预算分配优化，重点落在上下文与缓存优化；虽涉及按层动态分配预算，但未明显聚焦通用系统调度框架。

title: Global Convergence for Average Reward Constrained MDPs with Primal-Dual Actor Critic Algorithm
title_zh: 具有原始-对偶 Actor-Critic 算法的平均奖励约束 MDP 全局收敛
abstract: This paper investigates infinite-horizon average reward Constrained Markov Decision Processes (CMDPs) under general parametrized policies with smooth and bounded policy gradients. We propose a Primal-Dual Natural Actor-Critic algorithm that adeptly manages constraints while ensuring a high convergence rate. In particular, our algorithm achieves global convergence and constraint violation rates of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt{T})$ over a horizon of length $T$ when the mixing time, $\tau_{\mathrm{mix}}$, is known to the learner. In absence of knowledge of $\tau_{\mathrm{mix}}$, the achievable rates change to $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/T^{0.5-\epsilon})$ provided that $T \geq \tilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\tau_{\mathrm{mix}}^{2/\epsilon}\right)$. Our results match the theoretical lower bound for Markov Decision Processes and establish a new benchmark in the theoretical exploration of average reward CMDPs.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了在具有平滑且有界策略梯度的一般参数化策略下，无限时域平均回报受约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）问题。我们提出了一种原始-对偶自然演员-评论家算法，能够熟练地处理约束，同时保证较高的收敛速率。特别地，当学习者已知混合时间 $\tau_{\mathrm{mix}}$ 时，我们的算法在长度为 $T$ 的时域上实现了全局收敛，并达到 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt{T})$ 的约束违反率。若不知道 $\tau_{\mathrm{mix}}$，则在满足 $T \geq \tilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\tau_{\mathrm{mix}}^{2/\epsilon}\right)$ 的条件下，可达到的速率变为 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/T^{0.5-\epsilon})$。我们的结果与马尔可夫决策过程的理论下界相匹配，并为平均回报 CMDP 的理论研究树立了新的基准。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Visual Haystacks: A Vision-Centric Needle-In-A-Haystack Benchmark
title_zh: 视觉干草堆：以视觉为中心的大海捞针基准
abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have made significant strides in visual question-answering for single images. Recent advancements like long-context LMMs have allowed them to ingest larger, or even multiple, images. However, the ability to process a large number of visual tokens does not guarantee effective retrieval and reasoning for multi-image question answering (MIQA), especially in real-world applications like photo album searches or satellite imagery analysis. In this work, we first assess the limitations of current benchmarks for long-context LMMs. We address these limitations by introducing a new vision-centric, long-context benchmark, "Visual Haystacks (VHs)". We comprehensively evaluate both open-source and proprietary models on VHs, and demonstrate that these models struggle when reasoning across potentially unrelated images, perform poorly on cross-image reasoning, as well as exhibit biases based on the placement of key information within the context window. Towards a solution, we introduce MIRAGE (Multi-Image Retrieval Augmented Generation), an open-source, lightweight visual-RAG framework that processes up to 10k images on a single 40G A100 GPU—far surpassing the 1k-image limit of contemporary models. MIRAGE demonstrates up to 13% performance improvement over existing open-source LMMs on VHs, sets a new state-of-the-art on the RetVQA multi-image QA benchmark, and achieves competitive performance on single-image QA with state-of-the-art LMMs. Our dataset, model, and code are available at: https://visual-haystacks.github.io.
abstract_zh: 大型多模态模型（LMM）在单图像视觉问答领域已取得显著进展。长上下文大型多模态模型等近期技术进展使其能够处理尺寸更大的图像，甚至多幅图像。然而，处理大量视觉token的能力并不能保证其在多图像问答（MIQA）任务中实现有效的检索与推理，在相册搜索、卫星图像分析等现实应用中尤为如此。本研究首先评估了当前面向长上下文大型多模态模型的基准测试存在的局限性。为解决这些局限，我们推出了全新的以视觉为核心的长上下文基准测试视觉草堆（Visual Haystacks，VHs）。我们在VHs基准上对开源模型和专有模型开展了全面评估，结果表明，这些模型在对可能不存在关联的图像进行跨图像推理时存在困难，跨图像推理表现较差，同时还会因关键信息在上下文窗口中的位置不同而表现出偏差。为提出可行解决方案，我们推出了多图像检索增强生成（MIRAGE），这是一种开源的轻量级视觉检索增强生成（RAG）框架，在单张40G A100 GPU上即可处理最多1万张图像，远超当前主流模型最多处理1千张图像的上限。在VHs基准上，MIRAGE的性能较现有开源大型多模态模型最高提升13%，在RetVQA多图像问答基准上创下了新的当前最优水平，同时在单图像问答任务上也达到了与顶尖大型多模态模型相当的竞争力。我们的数据集、模型与代码可在https://visual-haystacks.github.io获取。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: FailureSensorIQ: A Multi-Choice QA Dataset for Understanding Sensor Relationships and Failure Modes
title_zh: FailureSensorIQ：用于理解传感器关系与故障模式的多选问答数据集
abstract:
We introduce FailureSensorIQ, a novel Multi-Choice Question-Answering (MCQA) benchmarking system designed to assess the ability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to reason and understand complex, domain-specific scenarios in Industry 4.0. 
Unlike traditional QA benchmarks, our system focuses on multiple aspects of reasoning through failure modes, sensor data, and the relationships between them across various industrial assets. 
Through this work, we envision a paradigm shift where modeling decisions are not only data-driven using statistical tools like correlation analysis and significance tests, but also domain-driven by specialized LLMs which can reason about the key contributors and useful patterns that can be captured with feature engineering.
We evaluate the Industrial knowledge of over a dozen LLMs including GPT-4, Llama, and Mistral on FailureSensorIQ from different lens using Perturbation-Uncertainty-Complexity analysis, Expert Evaluation study, Asset-Specific Knowledge Gap analysis, ReAct agent using external knowledge-bases.
Even though closed-source models with strong reasoning capabilities approach expert-level performance, the comprehensive benchmark reveals a significant drop in performance that is fragile to perturbations, distractions, and inherent knowledge gaps in the models.
We also provide a real-world case study of how LLMs can drive the modeling decisions on 3 different failure prediction datasets related to various assets.
We release: (a) expert-curated MCQA for various industrial assets, (b) FailureSensorIQ benchmark and Hugging Face leaderboard based on MCQA built from non-textual data found in ISO documents, and (c) ``LLMFeatureSelector'', an LLM-based feature selection scikit-learn pipeline. The software is available at https://github.com/IBM/FailureSensorIQ.
abstract_zh: FailureSensorIQ 是一个全新的多项选择问答基准系统，旨在评估大型语言模型在工业 4.0 领域推理和理解复杂领域化场景的能力。与传统问答基准不同，它聚焦于故障模式、传感器数据及其在各类工业资产之间的相互关系，考察多个推理维度。我们希望通过这项工作实现建模范式的转变：不仅使用相关性分析、显著性检验等统计工具驱动数据，更借助能够推理关键影响因素和可通过特征工程捕捉的实用模式的专用大模型来驱动行业知识。我们从扰动-不确定性-复杂度视角、专家评估研究、特定资产知识缺口分析以及借助外部知识库的 ReAct 代理等多个角度，评估 GPT-4、Llama、Mistral 等十余款模型在 FailureSensorIQ 上的工业知识。尽管某些闭源强推理模型能接近专家水平，但全面基准揭示其对扰动、干扰以及自身固有知识缺口高度脆弱的显著性能下降。我们还提供真实案例，展示大型模型如何指导涉及不同资产的三类故障预测数据集的建模决策。发布内容包括：(a) 专家策划的面向多种工业资产的多项选择问答；(b) 基于 ISO 文档中非文本数据构造的 FailureSensorIQ 基准与 Hugging Face 排行榜；(c) 名为“LLMFeatureSelector”的基于大型模型的特征选择 scikit-learn 管道。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: MoDr: Mixture-of-Depth-Recurrent Transformers for Test-Time Reasoning
title_zh: MoDr：用于测试时推理的混合深度循环Transformer
abstract: Large Language Models have demonstrated superior reasoning capabilities by generating step-by-step reasoning in natural language before deriving the final answer. Recently, Geiping et al. introduced 3.5B-Huginn as an alternative to this paradigm, a depth-recurrent Transformer that increases computational depth per token by reusing a recurrent block in latent space. Despite its performance gains with increasing recurrences, this approach is inadequate for tasks demanding exploration and adaptivity, a limitation arising from its single, chain-like propagation mechanism. To address this, we propose a novel dynamic multi-branches routing approach for Huginn, termed as Mixture-of-Depth-Recurrent (MoDr) Transformer, which enables effective exploration of the solution space by shifting linear latent reasoning into a LoRA-based multi-branch dynamic relay mode with a learnable hard-gate routing. Meanwhile, we introduce an auxiliary-loss-free load balancing strategy to mitigate the potential routing collapse. Our empirical results reveal that MoDr achieves average accuracy improvements of +7.2% and +2.48% over the original Huginn model and its fine-tuned variant, respectively, across various mathematical reasoning benchmarks and improvements of +21.21% and +1.52% on commonsense reasoning benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型通过在得出最终答案前生成自然语言形式的逐步推理过程，已展现出卓越的推理能力。近期，Geiping等人提出3.5B-Huginn作为该范式的替代方案，这是一种深度循环Transformer，通过在隐空间中复用循环模块来提升每个词元的计算深度。尽管该方法的性能会随循环次数增加而提升，但它无法适配需要探索与自适应能力的任务，这一局限源于其单一的链式传播机制。为解决该问题，我们针对Huginn提出一种新型动态多分支路由方法，名为深度循环混合（MoDr）Transformer，它通过将线性隐式推理转换为基于LoRA、搭载可学习硬门控路由的多分支动态中继模式，可实现对解空间的有效探索。同时，我们引入了一种无需辅助损失的负载均衡策略，以缓解潜在的路由崩溃问题。实验结果显示，在各类数学推理基准测试中，MoDr的平均准确率相比原始Huginn模型及其微调变体分别提升7.2%和2.48%，在常识推理基准测试中则分别提升21.21%和1.52%。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: Grounding Computer Use Agents on Human Demonstrations
title_zh: 翻译结果** 基于人类示范为计算机使用代理建立基础
abstract: Building reliable computer-use agents requires grounding: accurately connecting natural language instructions to the correct on-screen elements. While large datasets exist for web and mobile interactions, high-quality resources for desktop environments are limited. To address this gap, we introduce GroundCUA, a large-scale desktop grounding dataset built from expert human demonstrations. It covers 87 applications across 12 categories and includes 56K screenshots, with every on-screen element carefully annotated for a total of over 3.56M human-verified annotations. From these demonstrations, we generate diverse instructions that capture a wide range of real-world tasks, providing high-quality data for model training. Using GroundCUA, we develop the GroundNext family of models that map instructions to their target UI elements. At both 3B and 7B scales, GroundNext achieves state-of-the-art results across five benchmarks using supervised fine-tuning, while requiring less than one-tenth the training data of prior work. Reinforcement learning post-training further improves performance. These results demonstrate the critical role of high-quality, expert-driven datasets in advancing general-purpose computer-use agents.
abstract_zh: 构建可靠的计算机使用智能体需要实现 grounding：将自然语言指令准确对应到屏幕上的正确元素。尽管网页和移动端交互已有大型数据集，但面向桌面环境的高质量资源仍然有限。为弥补这一空白，我们提出 GroundCUA，这是一个基于专家级人类示范构建的大规模桌面 grounding 数据集。它覆盖 12 个类别中的 87 个应用，包含 5.6 万张截图，并对每个屏幕元素进行了细致标注，总计超过 356 万条经人工验证的标注。基于这些示范，我们生成了多样化的指令，以覆盖广泛的真实世界任务，为模型训练提供高质量数据。利用 GroundCUA，我们开发了 GroundNext 系列模型，用于将指令映射到其目标 UI 元素。在 3B 和 7B 两种规模下，GroundNext 仅通过监督微调，便在五项基准测试中取得了当前最优结果，同时所需训练数据不到以往工作的十分之一。强化学习后训练进一步提升了性能。这些结果表明，高质量、由专家驱动的数据集对于推进通用计算机使用智能体的发展具有关键作用。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Can LLMs Refuse Questions They Do Not Know? Measuring Knowledge-Aware Refusal in Factual Tasks
title_zh: 大型语言模型会拒绝不知道的问题吗？在事实任务中衡量知识感知的拒绝能力
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) should refuse to answer questions beyond their knowledge. This capability, which we term knowledge-aware refusal, is crucial for factual reliability. However, existing metrics fail to faithfully measure this ability. On the one hand, simple refusal-based metrics are biased by refusal rates and yield inconsistent scores when models exhibit different refusal tendencies. On the other hand, existing calibration metrics are proxy-based, capturing the performance of auxiliary calibration processes rather than the model’s actual refusal behavior. In this work, we propose the Refusal Index (RI), a principled metric that measures how accurately LLMs refuse questions they do not know. We define RI as Spearman’s rank correlation between refusal probability and error probability. To make RI practically measurable, we design a lightweight two-pass evaluation method that efficiently estimates RI from observed refusal rates across two standard evaluation runs. Extensive experiments across 16 models and 5 datasets demonstrate that RI accurately quantifies a model’s intrinsic knowledge-aware refusal capability in factual tasks. Notably, RI remains stable across different refusal rates and provides consistent model rankings independent of a model’s overall accuracy and refusal rates. More importantly, RI provides insight into an important but previously overlooked aspect of LLM factuality: while LLMs achieve high accuracy on factual tasks, their refusal behavior can be unreliable and fragile. This finding highlights the need to complement traditional accuracy metrics with the Refusal Index for comprehensive factuality evaluation.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）应当拒绝回答超出其知识范围的问题。我们将这种能力称为知识感知拒答，它对于事实可靠性至关重要。然而，现有指标无法忠实衡量这种能力。一方面，基于简单拒答的指标会受到拒答率的偏置影响，并且当模型表现出不同的拒答倾向时会产生不一致的分数。另一方面，现有校准指标是基于代理的，它们反映的是辅助校准过程的表现，而不是模型真实的拒答行为。在这项工作中，我们提出了拒答指数（Refusal Index，RI），这是一种有原则的指标，用于衡量 LLM 拒绝回答其不知道的问题的准确性。我们将 RI 定义为拒答概率与出错概率之间的斯皮尔曼秩相关。为了使 RI 在实践中可测，我们设计了一种轻量级的两遍评估方法，能够通过两次标准评估运行中观测到的拒答率高效估计 RI。针对 16 个模型和 5 个数据集的大量实验表明，RI 能够准确量化模型在事实性任务中内在的知识感知拒答能力。值得注意的是，RI 在不同拒答率下保持稳定，并且能够提供与模型总体准确率和拒答率无关的一致模型排序。更重要的是，RI 揭示了 LLM 事实性中一个重要但此前被忽视的方面：尽管 LLM 在事实性任务上能够取得较高准确率，但其拒答行为可能并不可靠且较为脆弱。这一发现凸显了在全面评估事实性时，有必要用拒答指数来补充传统准确率指标。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Self-Challenging Language Model Agents
title_zh: 自我挑战的语言模型代理
abstract:
Large language models  are quickly becoming the foundation for intelligent agents that are capable of using tools. However, training such agents is challenging because it requires human creation and annotation of a diverse set of tasks, tools, and evaluation criteria. In this paper, we propose  the Self-Challenging Agent framework for training an agent on high-quality tasks that are generated by itself. The agent first plays the role of challenger and generates a task after interacting with the given tools. The tasks take the form of a novel general class of problems termed Code-as-Task, which are defined by an instruction, a verification function and solution and failure cases which serve as tests, allowing to filter only for high-quality tasks.  
The agent then takes an executor role and trains on those tasks with reinforcement learning using the evaluation feedback as a reward.  We show our method improves the performance of Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct on two existing multi-turn tool-use agent benchmarks, M$^3$ToolEval and TauBench, with a two-fold average success rate increase, despite using only self-generated training data.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型正迅速成为能够使用工具的智能体的基础。然而，训练这类智能体具有挑战性，因为这需要人类创建并标注一组多样化的任务、工具和评估标准。在本文中，我们提出了自挑战智能体框架，用于在由智能体自身生成的高质量任务上训练智能体。该智能体首先扮演挑战者的角色，在与给定工具交互后生成一个任务。这些任务采用一种被称为“代码即任务”的新型通用问题类别的形式，其由一条指令、一个验证函数以及作为测试的解答案例和失败案例所定义，从而能够仅筛选出高质量任务。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: NaViL: Rethinking Scaling Properties of Native Multimodal Large Language Models under Data Constraints
title_zh: NaViL：在数据受限下重新思考原生多模态大语言模型的扩展特性
abstract: Compositional training has been the de-facto paradigm in existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), where pre-trained vision encoders are connected with pre-trained  LLMs through continuous multimodal pre-training. However,  the multimodal scaling property of this paradigm remains difficult to explore due to the separated training. In this paper, we focus on the native training of MLLMs in an end-to-end manner  and systematically study its design space and scaling property under a practical setting, i.e., data constraint. Through careful study of various choices in MLLM, we obtain the optimal meta-architecture that best balances performance and training cost. After that, we further explore the scaling properties of the native MLLM and indicate the positively correlated scaling relationship between visual encoders and LLMs.  Based on these findings, we propose a native MLLM called NaViL, combined with a simple and cost-effective recipe.  Experimental results on 14 multimodal benchmarks confirm the competitive performance of NaViL against existing  MLLMs. Besides that, our findings and results provide in-depth insights for the future study of native MLLMs.
abstract_zh: 组合式训练一直是现有多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的事实标准范式，其中预训练视觉编码器通过连续的多模态预训练与预训练大语言模型（LLMs）相连接。然而，由于训练是分离进行的，这一范式的多模态扩展性质仍然难以探索。在本文中，我们聚焦于以端到端方式对多模态大语言模型进行原生训练，并在一个实际设定下，即数据受限条件下，系统研究其设计空间与扩展性质。通过对多模态大语言模型中各种选择的细致研究，我们获得了在性能与训练成本之间实现最佳平衡的最优元架构。在此之后，我们进一步探索了原生多模态大语言模型的扩展性质，并指出视觉编码器与大语言模型之间存在正相关的扩展关系。基于这些发现，我们提出了一种名为 NaViL 的原生多模态大语言模型，并结合了一套简单且具成本效益的方案。在 14 个多模态基准上的实验结果证实，NaViL 相较于现有多模态大语言模型具有竞争性的性能。除此之外，我们的发现和结果也为未来原生多模态大语言模型的研究提供了深入见解。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Exploration from a Primal-Dual Lens: Value-Incentivized Actor-Critic Methods for Sample-Efficient Online RL
title_zh: 从原始-对偶视角探索：面向样本高效在线强化学习的Value-Incentivized Actor-Critic 方法
abstract: Online reinforcement learning (RL) with complex function approximations such as transformers and deep neural networks plays a significant role in the modern practice of artificial intelligence. Despite its popularity and importance, balancing the fundamental trade-off between exploration and exploitation remains a long-standing challenge; in particular, we are still in lack of efficient and practical schemes that are backed by theoretical performance guarantees. Motivated by recent developments in exploration via optimistic regularization, this paper provides an interpretation of the principle of optimism through the lens of primal-dual optimization. From this fresh perspective, we set forth a new value-incentivized actor-critic (VAC) method, which optimizes a single easy-to-optimize objective integrating exploration and exploitation --- it promotes state-action and policy estimates that are both consistent with collected data transitions and result in higher value functions. Theoretically, the proposed VAC method has near-optimal regret guarantees under linear Markov decision processes (MDPs) in both finite-horizon and infinite-horizon settings, which can be extended to the general function approximation setting under appropriate assumptions.
abstract_zh: 采用诸如 Transformer 和深度神经网络等复杂函数逼近的在线强化学习（RL）在现代人工智能实践中发挥着重要作用。尽管其广受欢迎且意义重大，但如何平衡探索与利用这一基本权衡仍然是一个长期挑战；尤其是，我们仍然缺乏既高效实用、又有理论性能保证支持的方案。受近期通过乐观正则化进行探索的发展启发，本文从原始-对偶优化的视角对乐观性原则给出了一种解释。在这一全新视角下，我们提出了一种新的价值激励型演员-评论家（VAC）方法，该方法优化一个易于优化的单一目标，将探索与利用整合在一起——它鼓励那些既与已收集到的数据转移一致、又能产生更高价值函数的状态-动作估计和策略估计。从理论上看，在有限时域和无限时域设置下，所提出的 VAC 方法在线性马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中都具有近最优的遗憾保证，并且在适当假设下还可以扩展到一般函数逼近设置。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Robust Deep Reinforcement Learning against Adversarial Behavior Manipulation
title_zh: 面向对抗行为操控的鲁棒深度强化学习
abstract: This study investigates behavior-targeted attacks on reinforcement learning and their countermeasures. Behavior-targeted attacks aim to manipulate the victim's behavior as desired by the adversary through adversarial interventions in state observations. Existing behavior-targeted attacks have some limitations, such as requiring white-box access to the victim's policy. To address this, we propose a novel attack method using imitation learning from adversarial demonstrations, which works under limited access to the victim's policy and is environment-agnostic. In addition, our theoretical analysis proves that the policy's sensitivity to state changes impacts defense performance, particularly in the early stages of the trajectory. Based on this insight, we propose time-discounted regularization, which enhances robustness against attacks while maintaining task performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first defense strategy specifically designed for behavior-targeted attacks.
abstract_zh: 本研究考察了针对强化学习的行为定向攻击及其对策。行为定向攻击旨在通过对状态观测进行对抗性干预，按照攻击者的意图操纵受害者的行为。现有的行为定向攻击存在一些局限性，例如需要对白盒方式访问受害者的策略。为此，我们提出了一种新的攻击方法，利用来自对抗性示范的模仿学习，在对受害者策略访问受限的条件下也能发挥作用，并且与环境无关。此外，我们的理论分析证明，策略对状态变化的敏感性会影响防御性能，尤其是在轨迹的早期阶段。基于这一见解，我们提出了时间折扣正则化，在保持任务性能的同时增强了对攻击的鲁棒性。据我们所知，这是首个专门为行为定向攻击设计的防御策略。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Same Task, Different Circuits: Disentangling Modality-Specific Mechanisms in VLMs
title_zh: 相同任务，不同机制：解析 VLM 中的模态特定机制
abstract:
Vision-Language models (VLMs) show impressive abilities to answer questions on visual inputs (e.g., counting objects in an image), yet demonstrate higher accuracies when performing an analogous task on text (e.g., counting words in a text).
We investigate this accuracy gap by identifying and comparing the circuits---the task-specific computational sub-graphs---in different modalities.
We show that while circuits are largely disjoint between modalities, they implement relatively similar functionalities: the differences lie primarily in processing modality-specific data positions (an image or a text sequence).
Zooming in on the image data representations, we observe they become aligned with the higher-performing analogous textual representations only towards later layers, too late in processing to effectively influence subsequent positions. 
To overcome this, we patch the representations of visual data tokens from later layers back into earlier layers. 
In experiments with multiple tasks and models, this simple intervention closes a third of the performance gap between the modalities, on average.
Our analysis sheds light on the multi-modal performance gap in VLMs and suggests a training-free approach for reducing it.
abstract_zh: 我们通过识别和比对不同模态下的计算电路（即任务特定的子图）来调查这一精度差距。虽然各模态的电路几乎不重叠，但它们实现的功能十分相似，差异主要体现在处理特定模态的输入位置（图像或文本序列）上。进一步观察图像表示发现，它们要到后层才与更高性能的文本表示对齐，此时距后续位置的处理已太远，无法有效影响。为了解决这一问题，我们将后层的视觉数据表示“补丁”回早期层。对多个任务与模型的实验表明，这一简单介入平均缩小了两种模态性能差距的三分之一。我们的分析揭示了视觉-语言模型在多模态任务上的性能差异，并提出了一种无需训练即可减小该差距的方法。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Multi-Marginal Flow Matching with Adversarially Learnt Interpolants
title_zh: 具对抗学习插值器的多边际流匹配
abstract:
Learning the dynamics of a process given sampled observations at several time points is an important but difficult task in many scientific applications.
When no ground-truth trajectories are available, but one has only snapshots of data taken at discrete time steps, the problem of modelling the dynamics, and thus inferring the underlying trajectories, can be solved by multi-marginal generalisations of flow matching algorithms.
This paper proposes a novel flow matching method that overcomes the limitations of existing multi-marginal trajectory inference algorithms.
Our proposed method, ALI-CFM, uses a GAN-inspired adversarial loss to fit neurally parametrised interpolant curves between source and target points such that the marginal distributions at intermediate time points are close to the observed distributions.
The resulting interpolants are smooth trajectories that, as we show, are unique under mild assumptions. 
These interpolants are subsequently marginalised by a flow matching algorithm, yielding a trained vector field for the underlying dynamics. 
We showcase the versatility and scalability of our method by outperforming the existing baselines on spatial transcriptomics and cell tracking datasets, while performing on par with them on single-cell trajectory prediction.
abstract_zh: ALI-CFM 使用类 GAN 的对抗目标训练神经参数化的插值曲线，在起点与终点之间拟合出使每个中间时刻的边缘分布都接近观测数据的轨迹；这些插值轨迹在温和条件下唯一且光滑，再通过流匹配算法边缘化得到表示潜在动力学的向量场，从而克服现有多边轨迹推断方法的局限；在空间转录组和细胞追踪数据集上超越基线，在单细胞轨迹预测上与其持平，展示了方法的通用性与可扩展性。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: MagicPIG: LSH Sampling for Efficient LLM Generation
title_zh: MagicPIG：用于高效大语言模型生成的 LSH 采样
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) with long context windows have gained significant attention. However, the KV cache, stored to avoid re-computation, becomes a bottleneck. Various dynamic sparse or TopK-based attention approximation methods have been proposed to leverage the common insight that attention is sparse. In this paper, we first show that TopK attention itself suffers from quality degradation in certain downstream tasks because attention is not always as sparse as expected. Rather than selecting the keys and values with the highest attention scores, sampling with theoretical guarantees can provide a better estimation for attention output. To make the sampling-based approximation practical in LLM generation, we propose MagicPIG, a heterogeneous system based on Locality Sensitive Hashing (LSH). MagicPIG significantly reduces the workload of attention computation while preserving high accuracy for diverse tasks. MagicPIG stores the LSH hash tables and runs the attention computation on the CPU, which allows it to serve longer contexts and larger batch sizes with high approximation accuracy. MagicPIG can improve decoding throughput by up to $5\times$ across various GPU hardware and achieve 54ms decoding latency on a single RTX 4090 for Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct model with a context of 96k tokens.
abstract_zh: 拥有长上下文窗口的大语言模型（LLM）已受到广泛关注。然而，为避免重复计算而存储的KV缓存成为了性能瓶颈。目前已有多种动态稀疏或基于TopK的注意力近似方法被提出，这类方法均基于注意力具有稀疏性这一共识。本文首先表明，TopK注意力本身在部分下游任务中会出现质量下降的问题，原因是注意力的稀疏性并非总能达到预期。与选择注意力得分最高的键、值不同，具备理论保障的采样方法可以对注意力输出实现更优的估计。为使基于采样的近似方法能够实际应用于大语言模型生成，我们提出了MagicPIG，这是一种基于局部敏感哈希（LSH）的异构系统。MagicPIG在大幅降低注意力计算工作负载的同时，能够在各类任务中保持较高精度。MagicPIG将LSH哈希表存储在CPU上并在CPU侧运行注意力计算，这使其能够以较高的近似精度支持更长的上下文与更大的批处理规模。在各类GPU硬件上，MagicPIG最多可将解码吞吐量提升5倍；针对上下文长度为96k令牌的Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct模型，MagicPIG在单张RTX 4090显卡上的解码延迟可达54毫秒。
notes: 论文核心是面向长上下文 LLM 生成的 KV cache/注意力近似优化，并通过 CPU-GPU 异构部署提升吞吐与延迟；不属于解码策略本身或底层内核实现优化。

title: Certifying the Full YOLO Pipeline: A Probabilistic Verification Approach
title_zh: 为完整 YOLO 流水线提供认证：一种概率验证方法
abstract: Object detection systems are essential in safety-critical applications, but they are vulnerable to object disappearance (OD) threat, in which valid objects become undetected under small input perturbations, creating serious risks. This paper addresses the problem of verifying the robustness of YOLO networks against OD by proposing a three-step probabilistic verification framework: (1) estimating output ranges under a distribution of input perturbations, (2) formally verifying the Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS) process within these ranges, and (3) iteratively refining the results to reduce over-approximation. The framework scales to practical YOLO models. Both theoretical analysis and experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves comparable probabilistic guarantees and provides tighter Intersection-over-Union (IoU) lower bounds while requiring significantly fewer samples than existing methods.
abstract_zh: 目标检测系统在安全关键应用中至关重要，但它们容易受到目标消失（OD）威胁的影响，即在小的输入扰动下，有效目标变得无法被检测到，从而带来严重风险。本文通过提出一个三步概率验证框架，解决了验证 YOLO 网络对抗 OD 鲁棒性的问题：(1) 估计输入扰动分布下的输出范围，(2) 在这些范围内对非极大值抑制（NMS）过程进行形式化验证，以及 (3) 通过迭代细化结果来减少过近似。该框架可扩展到实用的 YOLO 模型。理论分析和实验结果都表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法在所需样本数显著更少的同时，实现了可比的概率保证，并提供了更紧的交并比（IoU）下界。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Posterior Sampling by Combining Diffusion Models with Annealed Langevin Dynamics
title_zh: 通过将扩散模型与退火朗之万动力学结合进行后验采样
abstract:
Given a noisy linear measurement $y = Ax + \xi$ of a distribution $p(x)$, and a good approximation to the prior $p(x)$, when can we sample from the posterior $p(x \mid y)$? Posterior sampling provides an accurate and fair framework for tasks such as inpainting, deblurring, and MRI reconstruction, and several heuristics attempt to approximate it. Unfortunately, approximate posterior sampling is computationally intractable in general.

To sidestep this hardness, we focus on (local or global) log-concave distributions $p(x)$. In this regime, Langevin dynamics yields posterior samples when the exact scores of $p(x)$ are available, but it is brittle to score--estimation error, requiring an MGF bound (sub‑exponential error). By contrast, in the unconditional setting, diffusion models succeed with only an $L^2$ bound on the score error. We prove that combining diffusion models with an *annealed* variant of Langevin dynamics achieves conditional sampling in polynomial time using merely an $L^4$ bound on the score error.
abstract_zh: 给定分布 $p(x)$ 的一个带噪线性测量 $y = Ax + \xi$，以及对先验 $p(x)$ 的一个良好近似时，我们何时能够从后验分布 $p(x \mid y)$ 中采样？后验采样为修补、去模糊和 MRI 重建等任务提供了一个准确且公平的框架，并且已有若干启发式方法尝试对其进行近似。不幸的是，一般情况下，近似后验采样在计算上是不可处理的。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: PhysVLM-AVR: Active Visual Reasoning for Multimodal Large Language Models in Physical Environments
title_zh: PhysVLM-AVR：面向物理环境的多模态大语言模型主动视觉推理
abstract: Visual reasoning in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has primarily been studied in passive, static settings, limiting their effectiveness in real-world physical environments where an embodied agent must contend with incomplete information due to occlusion or a limited field of view. Humans, in contrast, leverage their embodiment to actively explore and interact with their environment—moving, examining, and manipulating objects—to gather information through a closed-loop process integrating perception, reasoning, and action. Inspired by this capability, we introduce the Active Visual Reasoning (AVR) task, extending visual reasoning to a paradigm of embodied interaction in partially observable environments. AVR necessitates embodied agents to: (1) actively acquire information via sequential physical actions, (2) integrate observations across multiple steps for coherent reasoning, and (3) dynamically adjust decisions based on evolving visual feedback. To rigorously evaluate AVR, we introduce CLEVR-AVR, a simulation benchmark featuring multi-round interactive environments designed to assess both reasoning correctness and information-gathering efficiency. We present AVR-152k, a large-scale dataset that offers rich Chain-of-Thought (CoT) annotations detailing iterative reasoning for uncertainty identification, action-conditioned information gain prediction, and information-maximizing action selection, crucial for training agents in a higher-order Markov Decision Process. Building on this, we develop PhysVLM-AVR, an embodied MLLM achieving state-of-the-art performance on CLEVR-AVR, embodied reasoning (OpenEQA, RoboVQA), and passive visual reasoning (GeoMath, Geometry30K). Our analysis also reveals that current embodied MLLMs, despite detecting information incompleteness, struggle to actively acquire and integrate new information through interaction, highlighting a fundamental gap in active reasoning capabilities.
abstract_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）中的视觉推理主要是在被动、静态的场景中研究的，这限制了它们在现实世界物理环境中的有效性，因为具身智能体必须应对由遮挡或有限视野造成的信息不完整。相比之下，人类会利用自身的具身性主动探索并与环境交互，通过移动、观察和操纵物体，在整合感知、推理与行动的闭环过程中获取信息。受此能力启发，我们引入了主动视觉推理（AVR）任务，将视觉推理扩展到部分可观测环境中的具身交互范式。AVR要求具身智能体：（1）通过序列化的物理动作主动获取信息，（2）整合多个步骤中的观测以进行连贯推理，以及（3）根据不断演化的视觉反馈动态调整决策。为严格评估AVR，我们提出了CLEVR-AVR，这是一项仿真基准，具有多轮交互环境，旨在同时评估推理正确性与信息收集效率。我们提出了AVR-152k，一个大规模数据集，提供丰富的思维链（CoT）标注，详细描述了针对不确定性识别、动作条件下的信息增益预测以及信息最大化动作选择的迭代推理，这对于在高阶马尔可夫决策过程中训练智能体至关重要。在此基础上，我们开发了PhysVLM-AVR，这是一种具身MLLM，在CLEVR-AVR、具身推理（OpenEQA、RoboVQA）以及被动视觉推理（GeoMath、Geometry30K）上都达到了最先进性能。我们的分析还表明，当前的具身MLLM尽管能够检测到信息不完整性，但难以通过交互主动获取并整合新信息，这凸显了其主动推理能力中的一个根本性缺口。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: DéjàVu: KV-cache Streaming for Fast, Fault-tolerant Generative LLM Serving
title_zh: DéjàVu：面向快速容错生成式大语言模型服务的KV缓存流式传输
abstract: Distributed LLM serving is costly and often underutilizes hardware accelerators due to three key challenges: bubbles in pipeline-parallel deployments caused by the bimodal latency of prompt and token processing, GPU memory overprovisioning, and long recovery times in case of failures. DéjàVu addresses all these challenges using a versatile and efficient KV cache streaming library (DéjàVuLib). Using DéjàVuLib, we propose and implement efficient prompt-token disaggregation to reduce pipeline bubbles, microbatch swapping for efficient GPU memory management, and state replication for fault-tolerance. We highlight the efficacy of these solutions on a range of large models across cloud deployments.
abstract_zh: 分布式大语言模型服务部署成本高昂，且硬件加速器利用率往往较低，其核心挑战有三点：提示词与令牌处理的双峰延迟导致流水线并行部署中出现气泡、GPU内存超额配置，以及故障发生后的恢复时间过长。DéjàVu通过一款通用高效的KV缓存流式传输库（DéjàVuLib）解决了上述所有挑战。借助DéjàVuLib，我们提出并实现了用于减少流水线气泡的高效提示词-令牌解耦机制、用于高效GPU内存管理的微批量交换策略，以及用于实现容错能力的状态复制机制。我们在各类云部署场景下针对一系列大模型验证了这些解决方案的有效性。
notes: 调度专项得分=7；命中组=llm_serving；augment_batch=20260408-scheduling；augment_score=7

title: MARS-Sep: Multimodal-Aligned Reinforced Sound Separation
title_zh: MARS-Sep：多模态对齐的强化音源分离
abstract: Universal sound separation faces a fundamental misalignment: models optimized for low-level signal metrics often produce semantically contaminated outputs, failing to suppress perceptually salient interference from acoustically similar sources. We introduce a preference alignment perspective, analogous to aligning LLMs with human intent. To address this, we introduce MARS-Sep, a reinforcement learning framework that reformulates separation as decision making. Instead of simply regressing ground-truth masks, MARS-Sep learns a factorized Beta mask policy that is steered by a preference reward model and optimized by a stable, clipped trust-region surrogate. The reward, derived from a progressively-aligned audio-text-vision encoder, directly incentivizes semantic consistency with query prompts. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains in Text-, Audio-, and Image-Queried separation, with notable improvements in signal metrics and semantic quality. Our code is available at https://github.com/mars-sep/MARS-Sep. Sound separation samples are available at https://mars-sep.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 通用声音分离面临一个根本性的错位问题：针对低层信号指标进行优化的模型，常常会产生在语义上受污染的输出，无法抑制来自声学上相似来源、但在感知上显著的干扰。我们引入一种偏好对齐视角，这类似于让大语言模型与人类意图对齐。为了解决这一问题，我们提出 MARS-Sep，这是一种将分离任务重新表述为决策过程的强化学习框架。MARS-Sep 不再只是回归真实掩码，而是学习一种因子化的 Beta 掩码策略，该策略由偏好奖励模型引导，并通过一种稳定的、带裁剪的信任区域替代目标进行优化。该奖励来源于一个逐步对齐的音频-文本-视觉编码器，能够直接激励输出与查询提示在语义上的一致性。我们在多个基准上的大量实验表明，MARS-Sep 在文本查询、音频查询和图像查询的分离任务中均取得了一致的性能提升，在信号指标和语义质量方面都有显著改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/mars-sep/MARS-Sep 获取，声音分离样例可在 https://mars-sep.github.io/ 获取。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Towards Safe and Optimal Online Bidding: A Modular Look-ahead Lyapunov Framework
title_zh: 面向安全与最优的在线竞价：一种模块化前瞻 Lyapunov 框架
abstract: This paper studies online bidding subject to simultaneous budget and return-on-investment (ROI) constraints, which encodes the goal of balancing high volume and profitability. We formulate the problem as a general constrained online learning problem that can be applied to diverse bidding settings (e.g., first-price or second-price auctions) and feedback regimes (e.g., full or partial information), among others. We introduce L2FOB, a Look-ahead Lyapunov Framework for Online Bidding with strong empirical and theoretical performance. By combining optimistic reward and pessimistic cost estimation with the look-ahead virtual queue mechanism, L2FOB delivers safe and optimal bidding decisions. We provide adaptive guarantees: L2FOB achieves $O (\mathcal{E}\_r(T,p)+(\nu^* / \rho)  \mathcal{E}\_c(T,p))$ regret and $O (\mathcal{E}\_r(T,p)+\mathcal{E}\_c(T,p))$ anytime ROI constraint violation, where $\mathcal{E}_r(T,p)$ and $\mathcal{E}_c(T,p)$ are cumulative estimation errors over $T$ rounds, $\rho$ is the average per-round budget, and $\nu^*$ is the offline optimal average reward. We instantiate L2FOB in several online bidding settings, demonstrating guarantees that match or improve upon the best-known results. These results are derived from the novel look-ahead design and Lyapunov stability analysis. Numerical experiments further validate our theoretical guarantees.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了同时受预算和投资回报率（ROI）约束的在线竞价问题，这刻画了在高成交量与盈利性之间取得平衡的目标。我们将该问题表述为一个通用的约束在线学习问题，可应用于多种竞价设定（例如一价拍卖或二价拍卖）以及反馈机制（例如全信息或部分信息）等。我们提出了 L2FOB，一个用于在线竞价的前瞻式 Lyapunov 框架，具有很强的经验表现和理论性能。通过将乐观的收益估计、悲观的成本估计与前瞻式虚拟队列机制相结合，L2FOB 能够给出安全且最优的竞价决策。我们给出了自适应保证：L2FOB 实现了 $O (\mathcal{E}\_r(T,p)+(\nu^* / \rho)  \mathcal{E}\_c(T,p))$ 的遗憾，以及 $O (\mathcal{E}\_r(T,p)+\mathcal{E}\_c(T,p))$ 的任意时刻 ROI 约束违背，其中 $\mathcal{E}_r(T,p)$ 和 $\mathcal{E}_c(T,p)$ 分别是在 $T$ 轮中的累计估计误差，$\rho$ 是每轮平均预算，$\nu^*$ 是离线最优平均收益。我们在若干在线竞价设定中实例化了 L2FOB，展示了与当前最佳已知结果相匹配或更优的保证。这些结果来源于新颖的前瞻式设计和 Lyapunov 稳定性分析。数值实验进一步验证了我们的理论保证。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Multimodal Tabular Reasoning with Privileged Structured Information
title_zh: 使用特权结构化信息的多模态表格推理
abstract:
Tabular reasoning requires complex, multi-step information extraction and logical inference, such as aggregation, comparison, or calculation over tabular data. While recent advances have leveraged large language models (LLMs) for reasoning over structured text tables, such high-quality textual representations are often unavailable in real-world settings, where tables typically appear as images. In this paper, we tackle the task of tabular reasoning directly from table images. Our core strategy is to leverage privileged structured information---specifically, the ground-truth structured table data available during training but inaccessible at test time---to enhance multimodal large language models (MLLMs). The key challenges lie in: accurately aligning visual representations with the structured information, particularly mapping the visual evidence to logical steps; and effectively transferring the reasoning skills learned during training to the MLLM for visual inference. 
To address these, we introduce {\sc Turbo} (TabUlar Reasoning with Bridged infOrmation), a new framework for multimodal tabular reasoning using privileged information. {\sc Turbo} benefits from a structure-aware reasoning trace generator based on DeepSeek-R1, which contributes to high-quality modality-bridged information. On this basis, {\sc Turbo} repeatedly generates and selects advantageous reasoning traces, further enhancing the model's tabular reasoning ability. Experimental results demonstrate that, with limited (9k) data, {\sc Turbo} achieves state-of-the-art performance ($+7.2\%$ vs. previous SOTA) across multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: 表格推理需要进行复杂的多步信息提取和逻辑推断，例如对表格数据进行聚合、比较或计算。尽管近期进展已利用大语言模型（LLM）对结构化文本表格进行推理，但在现实场景中，这类高质量的文本表示通常不可获得，因为表格通常以图像形式出现。在本文中，我们直接从表格图像出发处理表格推理任务。我们的核心策略是利用特权结构化信息，具体而言，即训练期间可用但测试时无法访问的真实结构化表格数据，来增强多模态大语言模型（MLLM）。其中的关键挑战在于：如何准确地将视觉表示与结构化信息对齐，尤其是将视觉证据映射到逻辑步骤；以及如何有效地将训练期间学到的推理能力迁移到MLLM中，以进行视觉推理。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: The Persistence of Neural Collapse Despite Low-Rank Bias
title_zh: 尽管存在低秩偏差，神经坍缩仍持续存在
abstract: Neural collapse (NC) and its multi-layer variant, deep neural collapse (DNC), describe a structured geometry that occurs in the features and weights of trained deep networks. Recent theoretical work by Sukenik et al. using a deep unconstrained feature model (UFM) suggests that DNC is suboptimal under mean squared error (MSE) loss. They heuristically argue that this is due to low-rank bias induced by L2 regularization. In this work, we extend this result to deep UFMs trained with cross-entropy loss, showing that high-rank structures—including DNC—are not generally optimal. We characterize the associated low-rank bias, proving a fixed bound on the number of non-negligible singular values at global minima as network depth increases. We further analyze the loss surface, demonstrating that DNC is more prevalent in the landscape than other critical configurations, which we argue explains its frequent empirical appearance. Our results are validated through experiments in deep UFMs and deep neural networks.
abstract_zh: 神经坍缩（NC）及其多层变体深度神经坍缩（DNC）描述了在训练好的深度网络的特征和权重中出现的一种结构化几何。Sukenik 等人近期基于深度无约束特征模型（UFM）的理论工作表明，在均方误差（MSE）损失下，DNC 是次优的。他们通过启发式论证指出，这源于由 L2 正则化诱导的低秩偏置。在本工作中，我们将这一结果扩展到使用交叉熵损失训练的深度 UFM，表明高秩结构（包括 DNC）通常并非最优。我们刻画了相关的低秩偏置，证明随着网络深度增加，在全局极小值处非可忽略奇异值的数量存在一个固定上界。我们还进一步分析了损失曲面，表明与其他临界构型相比，DNC 在该景观中更为普遍，我们认为这解释了它在经验上频繁出现的原因。我们的结果通过深度 UFM 和深度神经网络中的实验得到了验证。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Inner Speech as Behavior Guides: Steerable Imitation of Diverse Behaviors for Human-AI coordination
title_zh: 内在言语作为行为指南：可控的多样行为模仿用于人类与人工智能协调
abstract: Effective human-AI coordination requires artificial agents capable of exhibiting and responding to human-like behaviors while adapting to changing contexts. Imitation learning has emerged as one of the prominent approaches to build such agents by training them to mimic human-demonstrated behaviors. However, current methods struggle to capture the inherent diversity and non-Markovian nature of human behavior and  lack the ability to steer behavior at inference time. Drawing inspiration from the theory of human cognitive processes, where inner speech guides action selection before execution, we propose MIMIC (Modeling Inner Motivations for Imitation and Control), a framework that uses language as an internal representation of behavioral intent. MIMIC employs the novel use of vision-language models as linguistic scaffolding to train a conditional variational autoencoder capable of generating inner speech from observations. A diffusion-based behavior cloning policy then selects actions conditioned on  current observations and the generated inner speech. MIMIC enables fine-grained steering of behavior at inference time by conditioning the agent on behavior-specific speech. Experiments across robotic manipulation tasks and human-AI collaboration games demonstrate that MIMIC significantly enhances both behavior diversity and fidelity to human demonstrations while enabling nuanced behavioral steering without training on additional demonstrations.
abstract_zh: 有效的人机协作需要人工智能体既能够展现和响应类人的行为，又能够适应不断变化的情境。模仿学习已成为构建此类智能体的主要方法之一，其方式是训练智能体去模仿人类示范的行为。然而，现有方法难以捕捉人类行为内在的多样性和非马尔可夫性质，并且缺乏在推理时引导行为的能力。受人类认知过程理论的启发，其中内在言语会在执行之前引导动作选择，我们提出了 MIMIC（用于模仿与控制的内在动机建模），这是一个将语言用作行为意图内部表征的框架。MIMIC 创新性地将视觉语言模型用作语言脚手架，来训练一个条件变分自编码器，使其能够根据观测生成内在言语。随后，一个基于扩散的行为克隆策略根据当前观测和生成的内在言语来选择动作。MIMIC 通过让智能体以特定行为的言语为条件，实现了在推理时对行为进行细粒度引导。在机器人操作任务和人机协作游戏中的实验表明，MIMIC 在无需针对额外示范进行训练的情况下，显著提升了行为多样性以及对人类示范的保真度，同时还能实现细腻的行为引导。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Mixing Importance with Diversity: Joint Optimization for KV Cache Compression in Large Vision-Language Models
title_zh: 在大型视觉语言模型中将重要性与多样性结合：KV缓存压缩的联合优化
abstract:
Recent large vision-language models (LVLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities in processing extended multi-modal sequences, yet the resulting key-value (KV) cache expansion creates a critical memory bottleneck that fundamentally limits deployment scalability.
While existing KV cache compression methods focus on retaining high-importance KV pairs to minimize storage, they often overlook the modality-specific semantic redundancy patterns that emerge distinctively in multi-modal KV caches.
In this work, we first analyze how, beyond simple importance, the KV cache in LVLMs exhibits varying levels of redundancy across attention heads. 
We show that relying solely on importance can only cover a subset of the full KV cache information distribution, leading to potential loss of semantic coverage.
To address this, we propose MixKV, a novel method that mixes importance with diversity for optimized KV cache compression in LVLMs. MixKV adapts to head-wise semantic redundancy, selectively balancing diversity and importance when compressing KV pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MixKV consistently enhances existing methods across multiple LVLMs. Under extreme compression (budget=64), MixKV improves baseline methods by an average of 5.1% across five multi-modal understanding benchmarks and achieves remarkable gains of 8.0% and 9.0% for SnapKV and AdaKV on GUI grounding tasks, all while maintaining comparable inference efficiency. Furthermore, MixKV extends seamlessly to LLMs with comparable performance gains.
abstract_zh: 近期的大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在处理长多模态序列方面展现出显著能力，但由此产生的键值（KV）缓存膨胀带来了严重的内存瓶颈，从根本上限制了部署的可扩展性。现有KV缓存压缩方法聚焦于保留高重要性KV对以最小化存储开销，但这类方法往往忽略了多模态KV缓存中特有的模态专属语义冗余模式。本研究首先分析了除简单重要性之外，LVLM的KV缓存如何在不同注意力头之间呈现出不同程度的冗余。我们证明仅依赖重要性仅能覆盖全部KV缓存信息分布的一个子集，会导致潜在的语义覆盖损失。为解决这一问题，我们提出MixKV，这是一种将重要性与多样性相结合、面向LVLM KV缓存压缩优化的新型方法。MixKV适配逐头语义冗余特性，在压缩KV对时选择性平衡多样性与重要性。大量实验表明，MixKV在多种LVLM上均可稳定提升现有方法的性能。在极端压缩（缓存预算为64）条件下，MixKV在五项多模态理解基准测试中将基线方法的性能平均提升5.1%，并且在GUI接地任务上将SnapKV和AdaKV的性能分别提升了8.0%和9.0%，同时保持了相当的推理效率。此外，MixKV可无缝扩展至大语言模型（LLM），同样能取得相当的性能增益。
notes: 论文聚焦大视觉语言模型的 KV cache compression，核心问题是长多模态序列下的缓存膨胀与内存瓶颈，属于上下文与缓存优化方向。

title: Predictive CVaR Q-learning
title_zh: 预测性 CVaR Q-learning
abstract: We propose a sample-efficient Q-learning algorithm for reinforcement learning with the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) objective. Our algorithm is built upon predictive tail value function, a novel formulation of risk-sensitive action value, that admits a recursive structure as in the conventional risk-neutral Bellman equation. This structure enables the Q-learning algorithm to utilize the entire set of sample trajectories rather than relying only on worst-case outcomes, enhancing the sample efficiency. We further derive a Bellman optimality equation and a policy improvement theorem, which provide theoretical foundations of our algorithm and remedy inconsistencies that have existed in the literature. Empirical results demonstrate that our method consistently improves CVaR performance while maintaining stable and interpretable learning dynamics.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种面向以条件风险价值（CVaR）为目标的强化学习的高样本效率 Q-learning 算法。我们的算法建立在预测性尾部价值函数之上，这是一种新的风险敏感动作价值表述，具有与传统风险中性 Bellman 方程类似的递归结构。这一结构使 Q-learning 算法能够利用全部样本轨迹，而不是仅依赖最坏情况结果，从而提升样本效率。我们进一步推导了一个 Bellman 最优性方程和一个策略改进定理，它们为我们的算法提供了理论基础，并纠正了文献中一直存在的不一致性。实验结果表明，我们的方法在保持学习动态稳定且可解释的同时，能够持续提升 CVaR 性能。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Fine-Grained Privacy Extraction from Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems by Exploiting Knowledge Asymmetry
title_zh: 通过利用知识非对称性从检索增强生成系统中提取精细粒度隐私
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems enhance large language models (LLMs) by incorporating external knowledge bases, significantly improving their factual accuracy and contextual relevance. However, this integration also introduces new privacy vulnerabilities. Existing privacy attacks on RAG systems may trigger data leakage, but they often fail to accurately isolate knowledge base-derived content within mixed responses and perform poorly in multi-domain settings. In this paper, we propose a novel black-box attack framework that exploits knowledge asymmetry between RAG systems and standard LLMs to enable fine-grained privacy extraction across heterogeneous knowledge domains. Our approach decomposes adversarial queries to maximize information divergence between the models, then applies semantic relationship scoring to resolve lexical and syntactic ambiguities. These features are used to train a neural classifier capable of precisely identifying response segments that contain private or sensitive information. Unlike prior methods, our framework generalizes to unseen domains through iterative refinement without requiring prior knowledge of the corpus. Experimental results show that our method achieves over 90\% extraction accuracy in single-domain scenarios and 80\% in multi-domain settings, outperforming baselines by over 30\% in key evaluation metrics. These results represent the first systematic solution for fine-grained privacy localization in RAG systems, exposing critical security vulnerabilities and paving the way for stronger, more resilient defenses.
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统通过引入外部知识库来增强大语言模型（LLM），显著提升了其事实准确性和上下文相关性。然而，这种集成也带来了新的隐私漏洞。现有针对 RAG 系统的隐私攻击可能会触发数据泄露，但它们往往无法在混合响应中准确分离源自知识库的内容，并且在多领域场景下表现较差。本文提出了一种新颖的黑盒攻击框架，利用 RAG 系统与标准 LLM 之间的知识不对称性，实现跨异构知识领域的细粒度隐私提取。我们的方法对对抗性查询进行分解，以最大化模型之间的信息差异，随后利用语义关系评分来消解词汇和句法歧义。基于这些特征，我们训练了一个神经分类器，能够精确识别响应片段中包含私密或敏感信息的部分。不同于先前方法，我们的框架无需事先了解语料库，即可通过迭代优化泛化到未见领域。实验结果表明，该方法在单领域场景下的提取准确率超过 90\%，在多领域设置中达到 80\%，并在关键评估指标上比基线方法高出 30\% 以上。这些结果构成了首个面向 RAG 系统细粒度隐私定位的系统性解决方案，揭示了关键安全漏洞，并为构建更强大、更具韧性的防御机制铺平了道路。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Beyond the Seen: Bounded Distribution Estimation for Open-Vocabulary Learning
title_zh: 超越已见：用于开放词汇学习的有界分布估计
abstract:
Open-vocabulary learning requires modeling the data distribution in open environments, which consists of both seen-class and unseen-class data.
  Existing methods estimate the distribution in open environments using seen-class data, where the absence of unseen classes makes the estimation error inherently unidentifiable.
  Intuitively, learning beyond the seen classes is crucial for distribution estimation to  bound the estimation error.
  We theoretically demonstrate that the distribution can be effectively estimated by generating unseen-class data, through which the estimation error is upper-bounded.
 Building on this theoretical insight, we propose a novel open-vocabulary learning method,  which generates unseen-class data for estimating the distribution in open environments.
The method consists of a class-domain-wise data generation pipeline and a distribution alignment algorithm.
The data generation pipeline generates unseen-class data under the guidance of  a hierarchical semantic tree and domain information inferred from the seen-class data, facilitating accurate distribution estimation.
With the generated data, the distribution alignment algorithm estimates and maximizes the posterior probability to enhance generalization in open-vocabulary learning.
Extensive experiments on 11 datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms baseline approaches by up to 14%, highlighting its effectiveness and superiority.
abstract_zh:
译文**
开放词汇学习需要在包含已见类别与未见类别数据的开放环境中建模数据分布。现有方法仅利用已见类别数据估计分布，而未见类别的缺失使估计误差本质上不可识别。直观上，超越已见类别的学习对于估计分布、从而为估计误差建立上界至关重要。我们从理论上证明，通过生成未见类别数据可以有效估计分布，并使估计误差获得上界。基于这一理论洞见，我们提出一种新的开放词汇学习方法，该方法通过生成未见类别数据来估计开放环境中的分布。该方法包括一个按类别域组织的数据生成流程和一个分布对齐算法。数据生成流程在分层语义树与从已见类别推断出的域信息指导下生成未见类别数据，从而促进准确的分布估计。借助生成的数据，分布对齐算法估计并最大化后验概率，提升开放词汇学习的泛化能力。在 11 个数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法较基线方法最高提升 14%，凸显其有效性与优越性。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Breaking Safety Paradox with Feasible Dual Policy Iteration
title_zh: 通过可行的双策略迭代打破安全悖论
abstract: Achieving zero constraint violations in safe reinforcement learning poses a significant challenge. We discover a key obstacle called the safety paradox, where improving policy safety reduces the frequency of constraint-violating samples, thereby impairing feasibility function estimation and ultimately undermining policy safety. We theoretically prove that the estimation error bound of the feasibility function increases as the proportion of violating samples decreases. To overcome the safety paradox, we propose an algorithm called feasible dual policy iteration (FDPI), which employs an additional policy to strategically maximize constraint violations while staying close to the original policy. Samples from both policies are combined for training, with data distribution corrected by importance sampling. Extensive experiments show FDPI's state-of-the-art performance on the Safety-Gymnasium benchmark, achieving the lowest violation and competitive-to-best return simultaneously.
abstract_zh: 在安全强化学习中实现零约束违背是一个重大挑战。我们发现了一个关键障碍，即安全悖论：策略安全性的提升会降低约束违背样本出现的频率，从而损害可行性函数的估计，并最终削弱策略安全性。我们从理论上证明，随着违背样本占比的下降，可行性函数的估计误差界会增大。为克服安全悖论，我们提出了一种名为可行双策略迭代（FDPI）的算法。该算法引入一个额外策略，在保持接近原始策略的同时，有策略地最大化约束违背。来自两个策略的样本被合并用于训练，并通过重要性采样校正数据分布。大量实验表明，FDPI 在 Safety-Gymnasium 基准上达到了最先进的性能，同时实现了最低的违背次数和具有竞争力到最优的回报。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: EnzyControl: Adding Functional and Substrate-Specific Control for Enzyme Backbone Generation
title_zh: EnzyControl在酶骨架生成中加入功能与底物特异性控制
abstract: Designing enzyme backbones with substrate-specific functionality is a critical challenge in computational protein engineering. Current generative models excel in protein design but face limitations in binding data, substrate-specific control, and flexibility for de novo enzyme backbone generation. To address this, we introduce **EnzyBind**, a dataset with 11,100 experimentally validated enzyme-substrate pairs specifically curated from PDBbind. Building on this, we propose **EnzyControl**, a method that enables functional and substrate-specific control in enzyme backbone generation. Our approach generates enzyme backbones conditioned on MSA-annotated catalytic sites and their corresponding substrates, which are automatically extracted from curated enzyme-substrate data. At the core of EnzyControl is **EnzyAdapter**, a lightweight, modular component integrated into a pretrained motif-scaffolding model, allowing it to become substrate-aware. A two-stage training paradigm further refines the model's ability to generate accurate and functional enzyme structures. Experiments show that our EnzyControl achieves the best performance across structural and functional metrics on EnzyBind and EnzyBench benchmarks, with particularly notable improvements of 13% in designability and 13% in catalytic efficiency compared to the baseline models. The code is released at https://github.com/Vecteur-libre/EnzyControl.
abstract_zh: 设计具有底物特异性功能的酶骨架是计算蛋白质工程中的一项关键挑战。当前的生成模型在蛋白质设计方面表现出色，但在结合数据、底物特异性控制以及从头酶骨架生成的灵活性方面仍存在局限。为此，我们引入了EnzyBind，这是一个包含11,100个经实验验证的酶-底物对的数据集，专门从PDBbind中整理而来。在此基础上，我们提出了EnzyControl，一种能够在酶骨架生成中实现功能性和底物特异性控制的方法。我们的方法以经过MSA注释的催化位点及其对应底物为条件生成酶骨架，这些信息均从整理后的酶-底物数据中自动提取。EnzyControl的核心是EnzyAdapter，这是一个轻量级、模块化的组件，被集成到一个预训练的基序支架生成模型中，使其具备底物感知能力。两阶段训练范式进一步提升了模型生成准确且具有功能性的酶结构的能力。实验表明，在EnzyBind和EnzyBench基准上，我们的EnzyControl在结构和功能指标方面均取得了最佳性能；与基线模型相比，在可设计性和催化效率方面的提升尤为显著，分别达到13%和13%。代码已发布于https://github.com/Vecteur-libre/EnzyControl。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Beyond Attention or Similarity: Maximizing Conditional Diversity for Token Pruning in MLLMs
title_zh: 超越注意力与相似性：在多模态大模型中通过最大化条件多样性实现令牌剪枝
abstract: In multimodal large language models (MLLMs), the length of input visual tokens is often significantly greater than that of their textual counterparts, leading to a high inference cost. Many works aim to address this issue by removing redundant visual tokens. However, current approaches either rely on attention-based pruning, which retains numerous duplicate tokens, or use similarity-based pruning, overlooking the instruction relevance, consequently causing suboptimal performance. In this paper, we go beyond attention or similarity by proposing a novel visual token pruning method named **CDPruner**, which maximizes the conditional diversity of retained tokens. We first define the conditional similarity between visual tokens conditioned on the instruction, and then reformulate the token pruning problem with determinantal point process (DPP) to maximize the conditional diversity of the selected subset. The proposed CDPruner is training-free and model-agnostic, allowing easy application to various MLLMs. Extensive experiments across diverse MLLMs show that CDPruner establishes new state-of-the-art on various vision-language benchmarks. By maximizing conditional diversity through DPP, the selected subset better represents the input images while closely adhering to user instructions, thereby preserving strong performance even with high reduction ratios. When applied to LLaVA, CDPruner reduces FLOPs by **95\%** and CUDA latency by **78\%**, while maintaining **94\%** of the original accuracy. Our code is available at https://github.com/Theia-4869/CDPruner.
abstract_zh: 在多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中，输入视觉令牌的长度通常远高于对应的文本输入令牌长度，导致推理成本居高不下。现有诸多研究通过移除冗余视觉令牌解决该问题，但当前方法要么依赖基于注意力的剪枝，会保留大量重复令牌，要么采用基于相似度的剪枝，忽略了与指令的相关性，最终导致性能不够理想。本文跳出注意力或相似度的设计思路，提出一种名为CDPruner的新型视觉令牌剪枝方法，该方法可最大化保留令牌的条件多样性。我们首先定义了以指令为条件的视觉令牌之间的条件相似度，随后使用行列式点过程（DPP）重构令牌剪枝问题，以最大化所选令牌子集的条件多样性。所提出的CDPruner无需训练且与模型无关，可轻松适配各类多模态大语言模型。在不同多模态大语言模型上开展的大量实验表明，CDPruner在各类视觉-语言基准测试中取得了新的当前最优性能。通过行列式点过程最大化条件多样性，所选令牌子集既能更好地表征输入图像，又能紧密贴合用户指令，因此即使在极高的缩减比例下仍能保持优异性能。将CDPruner应用于LLaVA时，可减少95%的浮点运算量（FLOPs）、降低78%的CUDA延迟，同时仍能维持原模型94%的准确率。本文代码可从https://github.com/Theia-4869/CDPruner获取。
notes: ['论文核心是面向 MLLM 推理阶段的视觉 token pruning，属于多模态 LLM 推理优化。', '方法是 training-free 的输入 token 子集选择，不涉及内核实现或系统调度本身，也不是典型权重量化/蒸馏式模型压缩。']

title: Verification of the Implicit World Model in a Generative Model via Adversarial Sequences
title_zh: 通过对抗序列验证生成模型中的隐式世界模型
abstract: Generative sequence models are typically trained on sample sequences from natural or formal languages. It is a crucial question whether—or to what extent—sample-based training is able to capture the true structure of these languages, often referred to as the "world model". Theoretical results indicate that we can hope for soundness at best, that is, generating valid sequences, but not necessarily all of them. However, it is still important to have practical tools that are able to verify whether a given sequence model is sound. In this study, we focus on chess, as it is a domain that provides enough complexity while having a simple rule-based world model. We propose adversarial sequence generation for verifying the soundness of the sequence model. Our adversaries generate valid sequences so as to force the sequence model to generate an invalid next move prediction. Apart from the falsification of soundness, this method is also suitable for a more fine-grained analysis of the failure modes and the effects of different choices during training. To demonstrate this, we propose a number of methods for adversarial sequence generation and evaluate the approach on a large set of chess models. We train models on random as well as high-quality chess games, using several training recipes. We find that none of the models are sound, but some training techniques and dataset choices are able to improve soundness remarkably. We also investigate the potential application of board state probes in both our training and attack methods. Our findings indicate that the extracted board states have no causal role in next token prediction in most of the models.
abstract_zh: 生成式序列模型通常在来自自然语言或形式语言的样本序列上进行训练。一个关键问题是，基于样本的训练是否能够，以及在多大程度上能够，捕捉这些语言的真实结构，这通常被称为“世界模型”。理论结果表明，我们至多只能期望其具有可靠性，也就是说，能够生成有效序列，但未必能生成所有有效序列。然而，拥有能够验证给定序列模型是否可靠的实用工具仍然很重要。在本研究中，我们聚焦于国际象棋，因为这一领域既具有足够的复杂性，又拥有简单的基于规则的世界模型。我们提出使用对抗性序列生成来验证序列模型的可靠性。我们的对手生成有效序列，以迫使序列模型生成无效的下一步走法预测。除了证伪可靠性之外，这种方法还适用于更细粒度地分析失败模式以及训练过程中不同选择所带来的影响。为展示这一点，我们提出了多种对抗性序列生成方法，并在大量国际象棋模型上评估了该方法。我们使用多种训练方案，在随机棋局和高质量棋局上训练模型。我们发现，没有任何一个模型是可靠的，但某些训练技术和数据集选择能够显著提高可靠性。我们还研究了棋盘状态探针在我们的训练方法和攻击方法中的潜在应用。我们的研究结果表明，在大多数模型中，提取出的棋盘状态在下一词元预测中并不具有因果作用。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: An Agentic Framework with LLMs for Solving Complex Vehicle Routing Problems
title_zh: 结合大语言模型的智能体框架用于求解复杂车辆路径问题
abstract: Complex vehicle routing problems (VRPs) remain a fundamental challenge, demanding substantial expert effort for intent interpretation and algorithm design. While large language models (LLMs) offer a promising path toward automation, current approaches still rely on external intervention, which restrict autonomy and often lead to execution errors and low solution feasibility. To address these challenges, we propose an Agentic Framework with LLMs (AFL) for solving complex vehicle routing problems, achieving full automation from problem instance to solution. AFL directly extracts knowledge from raw inputs and enables self-contained code generation without handcrafted modules or external solvers. To improve trustworthiness, AFL decomposes the overall pipeline into three manageable subtasks and employs four specialized agents whose coordinated interactions enforce cross-functional consistency and logical soundness. Extensive experiments on 20 complex VRPs, ranging from standard benchmarks to practical variants, validate the effectiveness and generality of our framework, showing comparable performance against meticulously designed algorithms. Notably, it substantially outperforms existing LLM-based baselines in both code reliability and solution feasibility, achieving rates close to 100% on the evaluated benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 复杂车辆路径问题（VRP）仍是一项基础性挑战，需要投入大量专家精力开展意图解读与算法设计工作。尽管大语言模型（LLM）为实现自动化提供了极具前景的方向，但现有方法仍依赖外部干预，这限制了自主性，且往往会引发执行错误、解的可行性偏低等问题。为解决上述挑战，我们提出了面向复杂车辆路径问题求解的大语言模型智能体框架（AFL），可实现从问题实例到输出解的全流程自动化。AFL可直接从原始输入中提取知识，无需手工构建模块或外部求解器即可完成自包含代码生成。为提升可信度，AFL将整体流程拆解为三个易于处理的子任务，并采用四个专用智能体，各智能体的协同交互可保障跨职能一致性与逻辑合理性。我们在20个复杂车辆路径问题（涵盖标准基准测试用例与实际场景变体）上开展了大量实验，验证了该框架的有效性与通用性，其性能与经精心设计的算法相当。值得注意的是，该框架在代码可靠性与解的可行性两方面均显著优于现有基于大语言模型的基线方法，在本次评估所用的基准测试集上两项指标的表现接近100%。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: Follow the Energy, Find the Path: Riemannian Metrics from Energy-Based Models
title_zh: 追随能量寻找路径：来自能量式模型的黎曼度量
abstract:
What is the shortest path between two data points lying in a high-dimensional space? While the answer is trivial in Euclidean geometry, it becomes significantly more complex when the data lies on a curved manifold—requiring a Riemannian metric to describe the space's local curvature. Estimating such a metric, however, remains a major challenge in high dimensions.

In this work, we propose a method for deriving Riemannian metrics directly from pretrained Energy-Based Models (EBMs)—a class of generative models that assign low energy to high-density regions.
These metrics define spatially varying distances, enabling the computation of geodesics—shortest paths that follow the data manifold’s intrinsic geometry. We introduce two novel metrics derived from EBMs and show that they produce geodesics that remain closer to the data manifold and exhibit lower curvature distortion, as measured by alignment with ground-truth trajectories.
We evaluate our approach on increasingly complex datasets: synthetic datasets with known data density, rotated character images with interpretable geometry, and high-resolution natural images embedded in a pretrained VAE latent space.
Our results show that EBM-derived metrics consistently outperform established baselines, especially in high-dimensional settings. 

Our work is the first to derive Riemannian metrics from EBMs, enabling data-aware geodesics and unlocking scalable, geometry-driven learning for generative modeling and simulation.
abstract_zh: 位于高维空间中的两个数据点之间的最短路径是什么？在欧几里得几何中，这个问题的答案是显然的；但当数据位于一个弯曲流形上时，问题就会变得显著更为复杂，因为这需要一个黎曼度量来描述该空间的局部曲率。然而，在高维情形下，估计这样的度量仍然是一项重大挑战。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Efficient Multimodal Spatial Reasoning via Dynamic and Asymmetric Routing
title_zh: 高效多模态空间推理：通过动态非对称路由
abstract:
Recently, visualization-of-thought (VoT) has unlocked new opportunities for complex spatial reasoning in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) by complementing verbal reasoning with visual thinking.
However, the autoregressive accumulation of lengthy and redundant tokens substantially increases computation and memory costs.
In this paper, we present a new efficient framework for multimodal spatial reasoning, named *DARE*, designed to adaptively prune multimodal tokens across different network depths, reasoning hops, and modalities. 
First, *DARE* devises an intra- and inter-hop-aware differentiable retention mechanism to dynamically estimate token importance both within each reasoning step and across successive hops. 
Recognizing that deeper network layers encode visual cues into verbal streams, *DARE* introduces an asymmetric compression strategy that prunes tokens according to modality-specific redundancy and semantic importance.
Furthermore, *DARE* incorporates a progressive KV-cache retention policy aligned with cross-modal fusion dynamics, further reducing memory overhead during autoregressive reasoning.
Our method delivers substantial reductions in computation and memory footprint, averaging a 40.37\% reduction in FLOPs and 46.07\% reduction in KV caches usage, 
while consistently preserving or even improving reasoning performance across seven multimodal spatial reasoning benchmarks, and further generalizing to broader multimodal reasoning tasks, 
establishing a scalable and robust recipe for efficient multimodal reasoning.
abstract_zh: 近年来，思维可视化（VoT）通过视觉思维补充言语推理，为多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的复杂空间推理开辟了新机遇。然而，冗长冗余令牌的自回归累积会大幅提升计算与内存成本。本文提出一种面向多模态空间推理的新型高效框架，命名为DARE，该框架可在不同网络深度、推理跳与模态之间自适应剪枝多模态令牌。首先，DARE设计了感知跳内与跳间信息的可微分保留机制，可在每个推理跳内部以及连续推理跳之间动态估算令牌的重要性。考虑到网络更深层会将视觉线索编码至言语流中，DARE引入了非对称压缩策略，根据模态特定的冗余度与语义重要性剪枝令牌。此外，DARE融合了与跨模态融合动态特性相匹配的渐进式KV缓存保留策略，进一步降低自回归推理过程中的内存开销。本方法可大幅削减计算量与内存占用，平均减少40.37%的浮点运算量（FLOPs）与46.07%的KV缓存使用量，同时在7个多模态空间推理基准测试中始终保持甚至提升了推理性能，还可进一步泛化至更广泛的多模态推理任务，为高效多模态推理提供了一种可扩展且鲁棒的实现方案。
notes: 标题直接强调 Dynamic and Asymmetric Routing，属于面向多模态推理路径的结构/路由优化；摘要未体现缓存、调度、算子内核或压缩重点。

title: Anime-Ready: Controllable 3D Anime Character Generation with Body-Aligned Component-Wise Garment Modeling
title_zh: Anime-Ready 可控的 3D 二次元角色生成与身体对齐的组件式服装建模
abstract: 3D anime character generation has become increasingly important in digital entertainment, including animation production, virtual reality, gaming, and virtual influencers. Unlike realistic human modeling, anime-style characters require exaggerated proportions, stylized surface details, and artistically consistent garments, posing unique challenges for automated 3D generation. Previous approaches for 3D anime character generation often suffer from low mesh quality and blurry textures, and they typically do not provide corresponding skeletons, limiting their usability in animation. In this work, we present a novel framework for high-quality 3D anime character generation that overcomes these limitations by combining the expressive power of the Skinned Multi-Person Linear (SMPL) model with precise garment generation. Our approach extends the Anime-SMPL model to better capture the distinct features of anime characters, enabling unified skeleton generation and blendshape-based facial expression control. This results in fully animation-ready 3D characters with expressive faces, bodies, and garments. To complement the body model, we introduce a body-aligned component-wise garments generation pipeline (including hairstyles, upper garments, lower garments, and accessories), which models garments as structured components aligned with body geometry. Furthermore, our method produces high-quality skin and facial textures, as well as detailed garment textures, enhancing the visual fidelity of the generated characters. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms baseline methods in terms of mesh quality, texture clarity, and garment-body alignment, making it suitable for a wide range of applications in anime content creation and interactive media.
abstract_zh: 3D 动漫角色生成在数字娱乐领域变得日益重要，包括动画制作、虚拟现实、游戏和虚拟网红等。与真实人类建模不同，动漫风格角色需要夸张的比例、风格化的表面细节以及在艺术风格上保持一致的服装，这给自动化 3D 生成带来了独特挑战。以往的 3D 动漫角色生成方法常常存在网格质量低和纹理模糊的问题，而且通常不提供对应的骨架，从而限制了其在动画中的可用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于高质量 3D 动漫角色生成的新框架，通过结合 Skinned Multi-Person Linear（SMPL）模型的表达能力与精确的服装生成，克服了这些局限。我们的方法扩展了 Anime-SMPL 模型，以更好地捕捉动漫角色的独特特征，从而实现统一的骨架生成和基于 blendshape 的面部表情控制。由此生成的 3D 角色可直接用于动画制作，并具有富有表现力的面部、身体和服装。为了补充身体模型，我们引入了一条与身体对齐的分组件服装生成流程（包括发型、上装、下装和配饰），将服装建模为与身体几何结构对齐的结构化组件。此外，我们的方法还能生成高质量的皮肤和面部纹理，以及细节丰富的服装纹理，从而提升生成角色的视觉逼真度。实验结果表明，我们的框架在网格质量、纹理清晰度和服装与身体的对齐程度方面显著优于基线方法，使其适用于动漫内容创作和交互媒体中的广泛应用。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Fractional Langevin Dynamics for Combinatorial Optimization via Polynomial-Time Escape
title_zh: 通过多项式时间逃逸的分数朗之万动力学用于组合优化
abstract: Langevin Dynamics (LD) and its discrete proposal have been widely applied in the field of Combinatorial Optimization (CO). Both sampling-based and data-driven approaches have benefited significantly from these methods. However, LD's reliance on Gaussian noise limits its ability to escape narrow local optima, requires costly parallel chains, and performs poorly in rugged landscapes or with non-strict constraints. These challenges have impeded the development of more advanced approaches. To address these issues, we introduce Fractional Langevin Dynamics (FLD) for CO, replacing Gaussian noise with $\alpha$-stable L\'evy noise. FLD can escape from local optima more readily via L\'evy flights, and in multiple-peak CO problems with high potential barriers it exhibits a polynomial escape time that outperforms the exponential escape time of LD. Moreover, FLD coincides with LD when $\alpha = 2$, and by tuning $\alpha$ it can be adapted to a wider range of complex scenarios in the CO fields. We provide theoretical proof that our method offers enhanced exploration capabilities and improved convergence. Experimental results on the Maximum Independent Set, Maximum Clique, and Maximum Cut problems demonstrate that incorporating FLD advances both sampling-based and data-driven approaches, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in most of the experiments.
abstract_zh: Langevin动力学（LD）及其离散提案已被广泛应用于组合优化（CO）领域。基于采样的方法和数据驱动的方法都从这些方法中显著受益。然而，LD对高斯噪声的依赖限制了其逃离狭窄局部最优的能力，需要代价高昂的并行链，并且在崎岖景观或非严格约束下表现不佳。这些挑战阻碍了更先进方法的发展。为了解决这些问题，我们将分数阶Langevin动力学（FLD）引入CO，用α稳定的Lévy噪声替代高斯噪声。FLD可以通过Lévy飞行更容易地从局部最优中逃逸，并且在具有高势垒的多峰CO问题中，其逃逸时间呈多项式级，优于LD呈指数级的逃逸时间。此外，当α = 2时，FLD与LD一致；通过调节α，它可以适应CO领域中更广泛的复杂场景。我们从理论上证明了该方法具有更强的探索能力和更好的收敛性。最大独立集、最大团和最大割问题上的实验结果表明，引入FLD推进了基于采样和数据驱动的两类方法，并在大多数实验中取得了最先进（SOTA）的性能。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Prior-free Tabular Test-time Adaptation
title_zh: 无先验的表格测试时自适应
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been effectively deployed in tabular data modeling for various applications. However, these models suffer severe performance degradation when distribution shifts exist between training and test tabular data. While test-time adaptation (TTA) serves as a promising solution to distribution shifts, existing TTA methods primarily focus on visual modalities and demonstrate poor adaptation when directly applied to tabular modality. Recent efforts have proposed tabular-specific TTA approaches to mitigate distribution shifts on tabular data. Nevertheless, these methods inherently assume the accessibility of source domain or prior and fail to fundamentally address feature shift while overlooking unique characteristics of tabular data, leading to suboptimal adaptation. In this paper, we focus on the problem of \textit{prior-free tabular test-time adaptation} where no access to source data and any prior knowledge is allowed, and we propose a novel method, \underline{P}rior-\underline{F}ree \underline{T}abular \underline{T}est-\underline{T}ime \underline{A}daptation (PFT$_3$A), which has three designs to simultaneously address label shift and feature shift without source domain or prior access. Specially, PFT$_3$A contains the \textit{Class Prior Estimating} module for estimating source-target class priors to calibrate prediction, eliminating dependency on source class prior and mitigating label shift; the \textit{Robust Feature Learning} module for learning robust feature by aligning source-like and target-like features to mitigate feature shift; the \textit{Representative Subspace Exploration} module for eliminating redundant features by projecting feature into subspace to enhance feature alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization of PFT$_3$A in tabular TTA tasks. The implementation is at \url{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PFT3A/README.md}.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已被有效应用于多种表格数据建模任务。然而，当训练与测试表格数据之间存在分布偏移时，这些模型会遭受严重的性能下降。尽管测试时自适应（TTA）为应对分布偏移提供了一种有前景的解决方案，但现有 TTA 方法主要聚焦于视觉模态，直接应用于表格模态时适应效果较差。近期一些工作提出了面向表格数据的专用 TTA 方法来缓解表格数据上的分布偏移。然而，这些方法本质上都假设可以访问源域或先验信息，既未从根本上解决特征偏移问题，也忽视了表格数据的独特特性，因而导致次优的适应效果。本文关注无先验的表格测试时自适应问题，即不允许访问源数据和任何先验知识，并提出了一种新方法，Prior-Free Tabular Test-Time Adaptation（PFT3A）。该方法包含三项设计，可在无法访问源域或先验的情况下同时解决标签偏移和特征偏移。具体而言，PFT3A 包含类别先验估计模块，用于估计源域与目标域的类别先验并校准预测，从而消除对源域类别先验的依赖并缓解标签偏移；稳健特征学习模块，用于通过对齐类源特征与类目标特征来学习稳健特征，从而缓解特征偏移；代表性子空间探索模块，用于通过将特征投影到子空间中消除冗余特征，以增强特征对齐。大量实验表明，PFT3A 在表格 TTA 任务中具有良好的有效性和泛化能力。 implementation is at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PFT3A/README.md.
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: ParallelComp: Parallel Long-Context Compressor for Length Extrapolation
title_zh: ParallelComp：用于长度外推的并行长上下文压缩器
abstract: Extrapolating ultra-long contexts (text length >128K) remains a major challenge for large language models (LLMs), as most training-free extrapolation methods are not only severely limited by memory bottlenecks, but also suffer from the attention sink, which restricts their scalability and effectiveness in practice. In this work, we propose ParallelComp, a parallel long-context compression method that effectively overcomes the memory bottleneck, enabling 8B-parameter LLMs to extrapolate from 8K to 128K tokens on a single A100 80GB GPU in a training-free setting. ParallelComp splits the input into chunks, dynamically evicting redundant chunks and irrelevant tokens, supported by a parallel KV cache eviction mechanism. Importantly, we present a systematic theoretical and empirical analysis of attention biases in parallel attention—including the attention sink, recency bias, and middle bias—and reveal that these biases exhibit distinctive patterns under ultra-long context settings. We further design a KV cache eviction technique to mitigate this phenomenon. Experimental results show that ParallelComp enables an 8B model (trained on 8K context) to achieve 91.17% of GPT-4's performance under ultra-long contexts, outperforming closed-source models such as Claude-2 and Kimi-Chat. We achieve a 1.76x improvement in chunk throughput, thereby achieving a 23.50x acceleration in the prefill stage with negligible performance loss and pave the way for scalable and robust ultra-long contexts extrapolation in LLMs. We release the code at https://github.com/menik1126/ParallelComp.
abstract_zh: 超长上下文（文本长度大于128K）外推目前仍是大语言模型（LLM）面临的核心挑战，大多数免训练外推方法不仅严重受内存瓶颈限制，还存在注意力槽问题，这会限制其实际应用中的可扩展性与有效性。本研究提出ParallelComp，这是一种并行长上下文压缩方法，可有效克服内存瓶颈，支持8B参数大语言模型在单张A100 80GB GPU上以免训练设置实现从8K到128K令牌的上下文外推。ParallelComp将输入拆分为多个块，依托并行KV缓存逐出机制，动态移除冗余块和无关令牌。重要的是，我们对并行注意力中的注意力偏差（包括注意力槽、近因偏差和中间偏差）开展了系统的理论与实证分析，揭示出这些偏差在超长上下文设置下呈现出独特的模式。我们进一步设计了一种KV缓存逐出技术来缓解该现象。实验结果表明，ParallelComp可使在8K上下文上训练的8B模型在超长上下文场景下达到GPT-4性能的91.17%，表现优于Claude-2、Kimi-Chat等闭源模型。我们将块吞吐量提升了1.76倍，进而在性能损失可忽略不计的情况下实现了预填充阶段23.50倍的加速，为大语言模型实现可扩展、鲁棒的超长上下文外推铺平了道路。我们的代码发布于https://github.com/menik1126/ParallelComp。
notes: 核心贡献集中在超长上下文推理中的并行压缩、分块处理与KV cache eviction，明显属于上下文与缓存优化；同时涉及并行处理和吞吐提升，符合系统与调度优化。摘要未体现底层算子/内核级实现细节，因此不标注算子与内核优化。

title: Bridging Crypto with ML-based Solvers: the SAT Formulation and Benchmarks
title_zh: 连接加密与基于 ML 的求解器：SAT 表述与基准
abstract: The Boolean Satisfiability Problem (SAT) plays a crucial role in cryptanalysis, enabling tasks like key recovery and distinguisher construction. Conflict-Driven Clause Learning (CDCL) has emerged as the dominant paradigm in modern SAT solving, and machine learning has been increasingly integrated with CDCL-based SAT solvers to tackle complex cryptographic problems. However, the lack of a unified evaluation framework, inconsistent input formats, and varying modeling approaches hinder fair comparison. Besides, cryptographic SAT instances also differ structurally from standard SAT problems, and the absence of standardized datasets further complicates evaluation. To address these issues, we introduce SAT4CryptoBench, the first comprehensive benchmark for assessing machine learning–based solvers in cryptanalysis. SAT4CryptoBench provides diverse SAT datasets in both Arithmetic Normal Form (ANF) and Conjunctive Normal Form (CNF), spanning various algorithms, rounds, and key sizes. Our framework evaluates three levels of machine learning integration: standalone distinguishers for instance classification, heuristic enhancement for guiding solving strategies, and hyperparameter optimization for adapting to specific problem distributions. Experiments demonstrate that ANF-based networks consistently achieve superior performance over CNF-based networks in learning cryptographic features. Nonetheless, current ML techniques struggle to generalize across algorithms and instance sizes, with computational overhead potentially offsetting benefits on simpler cases. Despite this, ML-driven optimization strategies notably improve solver efficiency on cryptographic SAT instances. Besides, we propose BASIN, a bitwise solver taking plaintext-ciphertext bitstrings as inputs.
