Crucially, its superior performance on high-round problems highlights the importance of input modeling and the advantage of direct input representations for complex cryptographic structures.
abstract_zh:
布尔可满足性问题（SAT）在密码分析中发挥着关键作用，能够支持密钥恢复和区分器构造等任务。冲突驱动子句学习（CDCL）已成为现代 SAT 求解的主导范式，机器学习也日益与基于 CDCL 的 SAT 求解器相结合，以应对复杂的密码学问题。然而，缺乏统一的评测框架、输入格式不一致以及建模方法各异，阻碍了公平比较。此外，密码学 SAT 实例在结构上也不同于标准 SAT 问题，而标准化数据集的缺失进一步加剧了评测难度。
为解决这些问题，我们引入了 SAT4CryptoBench，这是首个用于评估密码分析中基于机器学习的求解器的综合性基准。SAT4CryptoBench 提供了多样化的 SAT 数据集，涵盖算术正规形（ANF）和合取范式（CNF）两种形式，并覆盖多种算法、轮数和密钥长度。我们的框架评估了机器学习集成的三个层次：用于实例分类的独立区分器、用于引导求解策略的启发式增强，以及针对特定问题分布的超参数优化。实验表明，在学习密码学特征方面，基于 ANF 的网络持续优于基于 CNF 的网络。尽管如此，当前的机器学习技术仍难以在不同算法和实例规模之间实现泛化，而且其计算开销在较简单的情形下可能抵消收益。即便如此，机器学习驱动的优化策略仍显著提升了求解器在密码学 SAT 实例上的效率。
此外，我们提出了 BASIN，这是一种以明文-密文比特串作为输入的按位求解器。关键的是，它在高轮数问题上的优越表现凸显了输入建模的重要性，以及对于复杂密码学结构而言直接输入表示所具有的优势。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Reducing information dependency does not cause training data privacy. Adversarially non-robust features do.
title_zh: 减少信息依赖本身不会导致训练数据隐私问题，而对抗性非鲁棒特征才会
abstract: In this paper, we show that the prevailing view that information dependency (including rote memorization) drives training data exposure to image reconstruction attacks is incomplete. We find that extensive exposure can persist without rote memorization, driven instead by a tunable connection to adversarial robustness.  We begin by presenting three surprising results: (1) recent defenses that inhibit reconstruction by Model Inversion Attacks (MIAs), which evaluate leakage under an idealized attacker, do *not* reduce standard measures of information dependency (HSIC); (2) models that maximally memorize their training datasets remain robust to MIA reconstruction; and (3) models trained without seeing 97% of the training pixels, where recent information-theoretic bounds give arbitrarily strong privacy guarantees under standard assumptions, can still be devastatingly reconstructed by MIA. To explain these findings, we provide causal evidence that privacy under MIA arises from what the adversarial examples literature calls ``non-robust'' features (generalizable but imperceptible and unstable features). We further show that recent MIA defenses obtain their privacy improvements by unintentionally shifting models toward such features. We leverage this mechanism to introduce Anti-Adversarial Training (AT-AT), a training regime that intentionally learns non-robust features to obtain both superior reconstruction defense and higher accuracy than state-of-the-art defenses. Our results revise the prevailing understanding of training data exposure and reveal a new privacy-robustness tradeoff.
abstract_zh:
在本文中，我们表明，认为信息依赖性（包括机械记忆）驱动图像重建攻击中的训练数据泄露这一主流观点是不完整的。我们发现，即使不存在机械记忆，广泛的数据暴露仍然可能持续存在，其驱动因素反而是与对抗鲁棒性的一个可调连接。
我们首先给出三个令人惊讶的结果：（1）近期那些抑制模型反演攻击（MIA）重建的防御方法，尽管是在理想化攻击者设定下评估泄露，却并不会降低信息依赖性的标准度量（HSIC）；（2）对其训练数据集进行最大程度记忆的模型，仍然能够对 MIA 重建保持鲁棒；（3）在训练时看不到 97% 训练像素的模型，即使在标准假设下近期的信息论界限可给出任意强的隐私保证，仍然可以被 MIA 严重重建。
为解释这些发现，我们提供了因果证据，说明 MIA 下的隐私性来源于对抗样本文献中所谓的“非鲁棒”特征（即可泛化但不可感知且不稳定的特征）。我们进一步表明，近期的 MIA 防御之所以能提升隐私，是因为它们无意中将模型推向了这类特征。基于这一机制，我们提出了反对抗训练（AT-AT），这是一种有意学习非鲁棒特征的训练方案，从而同时获得比当前最先进防御方法更优的重建防御能力和更高的准确率。我们的结果修正了对训练数据暴露的主流理解，并揭示了一种新的隐私-鲁棒性权衡。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Latent Space Factorization in LoRA
title_zh: LoRA 中的潜在空间分解
abstract:
Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) is a widely used method for parameter-efficient finetuning.
However, existing LoRA variants lack mechanisms to explicitly disambiguate task-relevant information within the learned low-rank subspace, potentially limiting downstream performance. 
We propose Factorized Variational Autoencoder LoRA (FVAE-LoRA), which leverages a VAE to learn two distinct latent spaces.
Our novel Evidence Lower Bound formulation explicitly promotes factorization between the latent spaces, dedicating one latent space to task-salient features and the other to residual information.
Extensive experiments on text, audio, and image tasks demonstrate that FVAE-LoRA consistently outperforms standard LoRA. 
Moreover, spurious correlation evaluations confirm that FVAE-LoRA better isolates task-relevant signals, leading to improved robustness under distribution shifts.
Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/idiap/FVAE-LoRA
abstract_zh: 低秩适配（LoRA）是常用的参数高效微调方法，但现有 LoRA 变体缺乏显式解耦已学习低秩子空间中的任务相关信息的机制，可能限制下游性能。我们提出 Factorized Variational Autoencoder LoRA（FVAE-LoRA），利用 VAE 学习两个互不相同的潜空间。我们提出的新型证据下界（ELBO）推导明确鼓励这两个潜空间的因式分解，将其中一个潜空间专门用于任务显著特征，另一个用于残余信息。对文本、音频与图像任务的大量实验表明 FVAE-LoRA 始终优于标准 LoRA；垃圾相关性评估也证实 FVAE-LoRA 更能隔离任务相关信号，从而在分布漂移下提升鲁棒性。我们的代码已公开，地址为：https://github.com/idiap/FVAE-LoRA
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: When a Robot is More Capable than a Human: Learning from Constrained Demonstrators
title_zh: 当机器人比人类更强：从受限示范者中学习
abstract: Learning from demonstrations enables experts to teach robots complex tasks using interfaces such as kinesthetic teaching, joystick control, and sim-to-real transfer. However, these interfaces often constrain the expert's ability to demonstrate optimal behavior due to indirect control, setup restrictions, and hardware safety. For example, a joystick can move a robotic arm only in a 2D plane, even though the robot operates in a higher-dimensional space. As a result, the demonstrations collected by constrained experts lead to suboptimal performance of the learned policies. This raises a key question: Can a robot learn a better policy than the one demonstrated by a constrained expert? We address this by allowing the agent to go beyond direct imitation of expert actions and explore shorter and more efficient trajectories. We use the demonstrations to infer a state-only reward signal that measures task progress, and self-label reward for unknown states using temporal interpolation. Our approach outperforms common imitation learning in both sample efficiency and task completion time. On a real WidowX robotic arm, it completes the task in 11 seconds, 10x faster than behavioral cloning.
abstract_zh: 从示范中学习使专家能够通过诸如示教、操纵杆控制和仿真到现实迁移等接口教会机器人执行复杂任务。然而，由于间接控制、搭建限制和硬件安全，这些接口往往会限制专家展示最优行为的能力。例如，操纵杆只能在二维平面内移动机械臂，而机器人实际上工作在更高维的空间中。因此，由受限专家收集到的示范会导致学得的策略性能次优。这引出了一个关键问题：机器人能否学到比受限专家所示范的策略更好的策略？我们通过允许智能体超越对专家动作的直接模仿，去探索更短且更高效的轨迹来解决这一问题。我们利用示范来推断一种仅基于状态的奖励信号，以衡量任务进展，并使用时间插值为未知状态进行自标注奖励。我们的方法在样本效率和任务完成时间上都优于常见的模仿学习方法。在真实的 WidowX 机械臂上，它能在 11 秒内完成任务，比行为克隆快 10 倍。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Interactive Speculative Planning: Enhance Agent Efficiency through Co-design of System and User Interface
title_zh: 交互式推测式规划：通过系统与用户界面协同设计提升智能体效率
abstract: Agents, as user-centric tools, are increasingly deployed for human task delegation, assisting with a broad spectrum of requests by generating thoughts, engaging with user proxies, and producing action plans. However, agents based on large language models often face substantial planning latency due to two primary factors: the efficiency limitations of the underlying LLMs due to their large size and high demand, and the structural complexity of the agents due to the extensive generation of intermediate steps to produce the final output. Given that inefficiency in service provision can undermine the value of automation for users, this paper presents a human-centered efficient agent planning method – Interactive Speculative Planning – aiming at enhancing the efficiency of agent planning through both system design and user interaction. Our approach advocates for the co-design of the agent system and user interface, underscoring the importance of an agent system that can fluidly manage user interactions and interruptions. By integrating human interruptions as a fundamental component of the system, we not only make it more user-centric but also expedite the entire process by leveraging human-in-the-loop interactions to provide accurate intermediate steps.
abstract_zh: 智能体作为以用户为中心的工具，越来越多地被用于承接人类的任务委托，通过生成思路、对接用户代理、制定行动方案来响应各类广泛需求。然而，基于大语言模型的智能体往往存在显著的规划延迟，这主要源于两大因素：一是底层大语言模型体量庞大、调用需求高，本身存在效率限制；二是智能体为生成最终输出需要生成大量中间步骤，自身结构复杂度较高。鉴于服务供给效率低下会削弱自动化为用户带来的价值，本文提出一种以人为中心的高效智能体规划方法——交互式推测规划，旨在通过系统设计与用户交互双路径提升智能体的规划效率。该方法倡导智能体系统与用户界面协同设计，强调智能体系统需具备流畅处理用户交互与中断请求的能力。我们将用户中断作为系统的基础组成部分，不仅进一步强化了系统的用户中心属性，还可通过人在回路交互提供准确的中间步骤，加快整个流程的推进速度。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: Beyond Membership: Limitations of Add/Remove Adjacency in Differential Privacy
title_zh: 超越成员资格：差分隐私中加/删邻接的局限性
abstract: Training machine learning models with differential privacy (DP) limits an adversary's ability to infer sensitive information about the training data. It can be interpreted as a bound on the adversary's capability to distinguish two adjacent datasets according to the chosen adjacency relation. In practice, most DP implementations use the add/remove adjacency relation, where two datasets are adjacent if one can be obtained from the other by adding or removing a single record, thereby protecting membership. In many ML applications, however, the goal is to protect attributes of individual records (e.g., labels used in supervised fine-tuning). We show that privacy accounting under add/remove overstates attribute privacy compared to accounting under the substitute adjacency relation, which permits substituting one record. To demonstrate this gap, we develop novel attacks to audit DP under substitute adjacency, and show empirically that audit results are inconsistent with DP guarantees reported under add/remove, yet remain consistent with the budget accounted under the substitute adjacency relation. Our results highlight that the choice of adjacency when reporting DP guarantees is critical when the protection target is per-record attributes rather than membership.
abstract_zh: 使用差分隐私（DP）训练机器学习模型会限制对手推断训练数据中敏感信息的能力。它可以被解释为：根据所选择的邻接关系，对手区分两个相邻数据集能力的一个上界。在实践中，大多数 DP 实现采用添加/删除邻接关系，其中如果一个数据集可以通过向另一个数据集中添加或删除一条记录得到，则这两个数据集被视为相邻，从而保护成员身份。然而，在许多机器学习应用中，目标是保护单条记录的属性（例如监督微调中使用的标签）。我们表明，与在允许替换一条记录的替换邻接关系下进行隐私核算相比，在添加/删除关系下进行隐私核算会高估属性隐私。为展示这一差距，我们开发了新的攻击方法来审计替换邻接关系下的 DP，并通过实验证明：审计结果与在添加/删除关系下报告的 DP 保证并不一致，但与在替换邻接关系下核算的隐私预算仍保持一致。我们的结果强调，当保护目标是逐记录属性而非成员身份时，在报告 DP 保证时对邻接关系的选择至关重要。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: MUSTAFAR: Promoting Unstructured Sparsity for KV Cache Pruning in LLM Inference
title_zh: MUSTAFAR 在大语言模型推理中推动 KV 缓存剪枝的非结构化稀疏性
abstract: We demonstrate that unstructured sparsity significantly improves KV cache compression for LLMs, enabling sparsity levels up to 70\% without compromising accuracy or requiring fine-tuning. We conduct a systematic exploration of pruning strategies and find per-token magnitude-based pruning as highly effective for both Key and Value caches under unstructured sparsity, surpassing prior structured pruning schemes. The Key cache benefits from prominent outlier elements, while the Value cache surprisingly benefits from a simple magnitude-based pruning despite its uniform distribution. KV cache size is the major bottleneck in decode performance due to high memory overhead for large context lengths. To address this, we use a bitmap-based sparse format and a custom attention kernel capable of compressing and directly computing over compressed caches pruned to arbitrary sparsity patterns, significantly accelerating memory-bound operations in decode computations and thereby compensating for the overhead of runtime pruning and compression. Our custom attention kernel coupled with the bitmap-based format delivers substantial compression of KV cache up to 45\% of dense inference and thereby enables longer context lengths and increased tokens/sec throughput of up to 2.23$\times$ compared to dense inference. Our pruning mechanism and sparse attention kernel is available at https://github.com/dhjoo98/mustafar.
abstract_zh: 我们证明非结构化稀疏可显著提升大语言模型的KV缓存压缩效果，在不损失精度且无需微调的前提下可实现最高70%的稀疏度。我们对剪枝策略开展了系统性探究，发现在非结构化稀疏场景下，基于逐令牌幅值的剪枝对键缓存和值缓存均具备极高有效性，表现优于现有结构化剪枝方案。键缓存可借助其突出的离群元素获取剪枝收益，而值缓存尽管分布均匀，却出乎意料地也能通过简单的基于幅值的剪枝获益。由于长上下文场景下内存开销极高，KV缓存大小是解码性能的主要瓶颈。为解决该问题，我们采用了基于位图的稀疏格式以及自定义注意力核，该注意力核能够对经任意稀疏模式剪枝的压缩缓存进行压缩处理并直接执行计算，可显著加速解码计算中受内存限制的操作，从而抵消运行时剪枝与压缩带来的开销。我们的自定义注意力核结合基于位图的格式可实现KV缓存的大幅压缩，其大小最高可降至稠密推理场景下缓存的45%，因此可支持更长的上下文长度，且与稠密推理相比，每秒令牌吞吐量最高可提升至2.23倍。我们的剪枝机制与稀疏注意力内核已开源至https://github.com/dhjoo98/mustafar。
primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施
notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 解码阶段的 KV cache 稀疏剪枝与稀疏注意力内核，实现缓存压缩和吞吐提升，属于推理基础设施优化而非模型训练或结构创新。

title: CodeCrash: Exposing LLM Fragility to Misleading Natural Language in Code Reasoning
title_zh: CodeCrash：揭示语言模型在代码推理中对误导性自然语言的脆弱性
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in code-related tasks, but their robustness in code reasoning under perturbations remains underexplored. We introduce CodeCrash, a stress-testing framework with 1,279 questions from CRUXEVAL and LIVECODEBENCH, designed to evaluate reasoning reliability under structural perturbations and misleading natural language (NL) contexts. Through a systematic evaluation of 17 LLMs, we find that models often shortcut reasoning by over-relying on NL cues, leading to an average performance degradation of 23.2% in output prediction tasks. Even with Chain-of-Thought reasoning, models on average still have a 13.8% drop due to distractibility and rationalization, revealing a lack of critical reasoning capability to distinguish the actual code behaviors. While Large Reasoning Models with internal reasoning mechanisms improve robustness by fostering critical thinking, plausible yet incorrect hints can trigger pathological self-reflection, causing 2-3 times token consumption and even catastrophic cognitive dissonance in extreme cases for QwQ-32B. We refer to this phenomenon as Reasoning Collapse. CodeCrash provides a rigorous benchmark for evaluating robustness in code reasoning, guiding future research and development toward more reliable and resilient models.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）近年来在代码相关任务中展现出强大能力，但它们在扰动条件下进行代码推理的鲁棒性仍缺乏充分探索。我们提出了 CodeCrash，这是一个包含来自 CRUXEVAL 和 LIVECODEBENCH 的 1,279 个问题的压力测试框架，旨在评估模型在结构性扰动和误导性自然语言（NL）上下文下的推理可靠性。通过对 17 个 LLM 的系统评估，我们发现模型常常通过过度依赖自然语言线索来走捷径式推理，导致其在输出预测任务中的平均性能下降 23.2%。即使采用思维链推理，模型平均仍会因易受干扰和事后合理化而下降 13.8%，这揭示了其缺乏区分真实代码行为的关键性推理能力。尽管具有内部推理机制的大型推理模型通过促进批判性思考提升了鲁棒性，但看似合理却错误的提示可能会触发病理性的自我反思，导致令牌消耗增加到 2 至 3 倍，并且在 QwQ-32B 的极端情况下甚至会引发灾难性的认知失调。我们将这一现象称为“推理崩塌”。CodeCrash 为评估代码推理鲁棒性提供了一个严格的基准，并为未来朝着更可靠、更具韧性的模型开展研究与开发提供指引。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Flow-Based Policy for Online Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于在线强化学习的基于流的策略
abstract: We present $\textbf{FlowRL}$, a novel framework for online reinforcement learning that integrates flow-based policy representation with Wasserstein-2-regularized optimization. We argue that in addition to training signals, enhancing the expressiveness of the policy class is crucial for the performance gains in RL. Flow-based generative models offer such potential, excelling at capturing complex, multimodal action distributions. However, their direct application in online RL is challenging due to a fundamental objective mismatch: standard flow training optimizes for static data imitation, while RL requires value-based policy optimization through a dynamic buffer, leading to difficult optimization landscapes. FlowRL first models policies via a state-dependent velocity field, generating actions through deterministic ODE integration from noise. We derive a constrained policy search objective that jointly maximizes Q through the flow polciy while bounding the Wasserstein-2 distance to a behavior-optimal policy implicitly derived from the replay buffer.  This formulation effectively aligns the flow optimization with the RL objective, enabling efficient and value-aware policy learning despite the complexity of the policy class. Empirical evaluations on DMControl and Humanoidbench demonstrate that FlowRL achieves competitive performance in online reinforcement learning benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 FlowRL，这是一种用于在线强化学习的新框架，将基于流的策略表示与 Wasserstein-2 正则化优化相结合。我们认为，除了训练信号之外，提升策略类的表达能力对于强化学习中的性能提升也至关重要。基于流的生成模型具备这种潜力，尤其擅长刻画复杂的、多峰态的动作分布。然而，由于一个根本性的目标不匹配，它们在在线强化学习中的直接应用具有挑战性：标准的流模型训练旨在对静态数据进行模仿优化，而强化学习则需要通过动态缓冲区进行基于价值的策略优化，这会导致困难的优化景观。FlowRL 首先通过与状态相关的速度场对策略进行建模，并通过从噪声出发的确定性 ODE 积分生成动作。我们推导了一个受约束的策略搜索目标，在通过流策略联合最大化 Q 值的同时，将与一种从回放缓冲区中隐式导出的行为最优策略之间的 Wasserstein-2 距离约束在一定范围内。这一表述有效地使流优化与强化学习目标对齐，从而尽管策略类本身较为复杂，仍能实现高效且具备价值感知能力的策略学习。在 DMControl 和 Humanoidbench 上的实证评估表明，FlowRL 在在线强化学习基准测试中取得了有竞争力的性能。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Repurposing Synthetic Data for Fine-grained Search Agent Supervision
title_zh: 重新利用合成数据进行细粒度搜索代理监督
abstract: LLM-based search agents are increasingly trained on entity-centric synthetic data to solve complex, knowledge-intensive tasks. However, prevailing training methods like Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) discard this rich entity information, relying instead on sparse, outcome-based rewards. This critical limitation renders them unable to distinguish informative "near-miss" samples—those with substantially correct reasoning but a flawed final answer—from complete failures, thus discarding valuable learning signals. We address this by leveraging the very entities discarded during training. Our empirical analysis reveals a strong positive correlation between the number of ground-truth entities identified during an agent's reasoning process and final answer accuracy. Building on this insight, we introduce Entity-aware Group Relative Policy Optimization (E-GRPO), a novel framework that formulates a dense entity-aware reward function. E-GRPO assigns partial rewards to incorrect samples proportional to their entity match rate, enabling the model to effectively learn from these ''near-misses''. Experiments on diverse question-answering (QA) and deep research benchmarks show that E-GRPO consistently and significantly outperforms the GRPO baseline. Furthermore, our analysis reveals that E-GRPO not only achieves superior accuracy but also induces more efficient reasoning policies that require fewer tool calls, demonstrating a more effective and sample-efficient approach to aligning search agents.
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型的搜索代理正越来越多地利用以实体为中心的合成数据进行训练，以解决复杂且知识密集型的任务。然而，现有的训练方法，如组相对策略优化（GRPO），会丢弃这些丰富的实体信息，转而仅依赖稀疏的、基于结果的奖励。这一关键局限使其无法区分有信息价值的“近失误”样本，即那些推理过程大体正确但最终答案有误的样本，与完全失败的样本，从而丢弃了宝贵的学习信号。我们通过利用训练过程中被丢弃的实体来解决这一问题。我们的实证分析表明，代理在推理过程中识别出的真实实体数量与最终答案准确率之间存在很强的正相关关系。基于这一发现，我们提出了实体感知组相对策略优化（E-GRPO），这一新框架构建了一个稠密的、实体感知的奖励函数。E-GRPO按照实体匹配率为错误样本分配部分奖励，使模型能够有效地从这些“近失误”中学习。在多样化的问答（QA）和深度研究基准上的实验表明，E-GRPO始终且显著优于GRPO基线。此外，我们的分析显示，E-GRPO不仅实现了更高的准确率，还诱导出了更高效的推理策略，所需的工具调用次数更少，表明它是一种在搜索代理对齐方面更有效且样本效率更高的方法。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Reconstructing Heterogeneous Biomolecules via Hierarchical Gaussian Mixtures and Part Discovery
title_zh: 通过分层高斯混合与部件发现重建异质生物分子
abstract:
Cryo-EM is a transformational paradigm in molecular biology where computational methods are used to infer 3D molecular structure at atomic resolution from extremely noisy 2D electron microscope images.
At the forefront of research is how to model the structure when the imaged particles exhibit non-rigid conformational flexibility and compositional variation where parts are sometimes missing.
We introduce a novel 3D reconstruction framework with a hierarchical Gaussian mixture model, inspired in part by Gaussian Splatting for 4D scene reconstruction. 
In particular, the structure of the model is grounded in an initial process that infers a part-based segmentation of the particle, providing essential inductive bias in order to handle both conformational and compositional variability.  The framework, called \methodName, is shown to reveal biologically meaningful structures on complex experimental datasets, and establishes a new state-of-the-art on CryoBench, a benchmark for cryo-EM heterogeneity methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的三维重建框架，采用层级高斯混合模型，部分灵感来源于用于四维场景重建的高斯喷射方法。该模型以初始步骤推断粒子的基于部件的分割为基础，从而为处理存在构象和组成可变性（包括部件有时缺失）的非刚性粒子结构提供必要的归纳偏置。该框架被命名为 \methodName，在复杂实验数据集上能揭示具有生物学意义的结构，并在 CryoBench（一个用于评估 Cryo-EM 异质性方法的基准）上确立了新的最先进表现。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Accelerating Iterative Retrieval-augmented Language Model Serving with Speculation
title_zh: 利用推测技术加速迭代式检索增强语言模型的推理服务
abstract: This paper introduces RaLMSpec, a framework that accelerates iterative retrieval-augmented language model (RaLM) with *speculative retrieval* and *batched verification*. RaLMSpec further introduces several important systems optimizations, including prefetching, optimal speculation stride scheduler, and asynchronous verification. The combination of these techniques allows RaLMSPec to significantly outperform existing systems. For document-level iterative RaLM serving, evaluation over three LLMs on four QA datasets shows that RaLMSpec improves over existing approaches by $1.75$-$2.39\times$, $1.04$-$1.39\times$, and $1.31$-$1.77\times$ when the retriever is an exact dense retriever, approximate dense retriever, and sparse retriever respectively. For token-level iterative RaLM (KNN-LM) serving, RaLMSpec is up to $7.59\times$ and $2.45\times$ faster than existing methods for exact dense and approximate dense retrievers, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文提出RaLMSpec，这是一款通过推测式检索与批量验证加速迭代检索增强语言模型（RaLM）的框架。RaLMSpec还引入了多项重要的系统优化措施，包括预取、最优推测步长调度器以及异步验证。上述技术相结合使得RaLMSpec的性能显著优于现有系统。针对文档级迭代RaLM服务，在四个问答数据集上对三个大语言模型开展的评估结果表明，当检索器为精确稠密检索器、近似稠密检索器、稀疏检索器时，RaLMSpec相较现有方法的性能提升幅度分别为1.75~2.39倍、1.04~1.39倍和1.31~1.77倍。针对词元级迭代RaLM（KNN-LM）服务，使用精确稠密检索器和近似稠密检索器时，RaLMSpec的速度分别较现有方法最高快7.59倍和2.45倍。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: Cache Me If You Must: Adaptive Key-Value Quantization for Large Language Models
title_zh: 非要缓存不可：大语言模型的自适应键值量化
abstract: Efficient real-world deployments of large language models (LLMs) rely on Key-Value (KV) caching for processing and generating long outputs, reducing the need for repetitive computation. For large contexts, Key-Value caches can take up tens of gigabytes of device memory, as they store vector representations for each token and layer. Recent work has shown that the cached vectors can be compressed through quantization, pruning or merging, but these techniques often compromise quality towards higher compression rates. In this work, we aim to improve Key \& Value compression by exploiting two observations: 1) the inherent dependencies between keys and values across different layers, and 2) the existence of high-compression methods for internal network states (e.g. attention Keys \& Values). We propose AQUA-KV, an adaptive quantization for Key-Value caches that relies on compact adapters to exploit existing dependencies between Keys and Values, and aims to "optimally" compress the information that cannot be predicted. AQUA-KV significantly improves compression rates, while maintaining high accuracy on state-of-the-art LLM families. On Llama 3.2 LLMs, we achieve near-lossless inference at 2-2.5 bits per value with under $1\%$ relative error in perplexity and LongBench scores. AQUA-KV is one-shot, simple, and efficient: it can be calibrated on a single GPU within 1-6 hours, even for 70B models.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的高效实际部署依赖键值（KV）缓存来处理和生成长输出，可降低重复计算需求。对于大上下文场景，由于键值缓存需要存储每个词元和每一层的向量表示，其设备内存占用可达到数十GB。近期研究表明，缓存的向量可通过量化、剪枝或合并操作实现压缩，但这些技术通常在提升压缩率的同时会损失性能质量。本研究通过利用两项观测结论优化键与值的压缩效果：1）不同层的键与值之间存在固有依赖关系；2）针对网络内部状态（例如注意力键与值）已有成熟的高压缩方法。我们提出AQUA-KV，一种面向键值缓存的自适应量化方法，该方法依托紧凑适配器利用键与值之间的现有依赖关系，旨在“最优”压缩无法被预测的信息。AQUA-KV在显著提升压缩率的同时，可在前沿大语言模型系列上保持高精度。在Llama 3.2大语言模型上，我们实现了每值2至2.5比特的近无损推理，其困惑度和LongBench得分的相对误差低于1%。AQUA-KV具有一次性、简单高效的特点：即便是70B参数模型，也可在单块GPU上仅用1至6小时完成校准。
notes: 论文核心是 LLM 的 KV cache 自适应量化压缩，直接对应上下文与缓存优化和模型压缩；摘要未体现系统调度或算子内核层面的实质贡献。

title: MIMIC: Mask-Injected Manipulation Video Generation with Interaction Control
title_zh: MIMIC：注入掩码的操纵式视频生成与交互控制
abstract: Embodied intelligence faces a fundamental bottleneck from limited large-scale interaction data. Video generation offers a scalable alternative, but manipulation videos remain particularly challenging, as they require capturing subtle, contact-rich dynamics. Despite recent advances, video diffusion models still struggle to balance semantic understanding with fine-grained visual details, restricting their effectiveness in manipulation scenarios. Our key insight is that reference videos provide rich semantic and motion cues that can effectively drive manipulation video generation. Building on this, we propose MIMIC, a two-stage image-to-video diffusion framework. (1) We first introduce an Interaction-Motion-Aware (IMA) module to fuse visual features from the reference video, producing coherent semantic masks that correspond to the target image. (2) then utilize these masks as semantic control signals to guide the video generation process. Moreover, considering the ambiguity of the motion attribution,  we introduce a Pair Prompt Control mechanism to disentangle object and camera motion by adding the reference video as an additional input. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MIMIC significantly outperforms existing methods, effectively preserves manipulation intent and motion details, even when handling diverse and deformable objects. Our findings underscore the effectiveness of reference-driven semantics for controllable and realistic manipulation video generation.
abstract_zh: 具身智能面临的一个根本瓶颈是大规模交互数据的匮乏。视频生成提供了一种可扩展的替代方案，但操作视频尤其具有挑战性，因为它们需要捕捉细微且充满接触的动态过程。尽管近期取得了进展，视频扩散模型仍然难以在语义理解与细粒度视觉细节之间取得平衡，从而限制了它们在操作场景中的有效性。我们的关键洞见是，参考视频提供了丰富的语义和运动线索，能够有效驱动操作视频生成。在此基础上，我们提出了 MIMIC，一个两阶段的图像到视频扩散框架。(1) 我们首先引入一个交互-运动感知（IMA）模块，用于融合参考视频中的视觉特征，生成与目标图像相对应的连贯语义掩码。(2) 随后利用这些掩码作为语义控制信号来引导视频生成过程。此外，考虑到运动归因的模糊性，我们引入了一种成对提示控制机制，通过将参考视频作为额外输入，来解耦物体运动与相机运动。大量实验表明，MIMIC 显著优于现有方法，能够有效保留操作意图和运动细节，即使在处理多样且可变形物体时也是如此。我们的发现强调了参考驱动语义对于可控且逼真的操作视频生成的有效性。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: MagicDec: Breaking the Latency-Throughput Tradeoff for Long Context Generation with Speculative Decoding
title_zh: MagicDec：通过投机解码打破长上下文生成中的延迟-吞吐量权衡
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become more prevalent in long-context applications such as interactive chatbots, document analysis, and agent workflows, but it is challenging to serve long-context requests with low latency and high throughput. Speculative decoding (SD) is a widely used technique to reduce latency losslessly, but the conventional wisdom suggests that its efficacy is limited to small batch sizes. In MagicDec, we show that surprisingly SD can achieve speedup even for a high throughput inference regime for moderate to long sequences. More interestingly, an intelligent drafting strategy can achieve better speedup with increasing batch size based on our rigorous analysis. MagicDec first identifies the bottleneck shifts with increasing batch size and sequence length, and uses these insights to deploy SD more effectively for high throughput inference. We leverage draft model with sparse KV cache to address the KV bottleneck, which scales with both sequence length and batch size. Additionally, we propose a theoretical model to select the optimal drafting strategy for maximum speedup. Our work highlights the broad applicability of speculative decoding in long-context serving, as it can enhance throughput and reduce latency without compromising accuracy. For moderate to long sequences, we demonstrate up to 2.51x speedup for LLaMA-3.1-8B when serving batch sizes ranging from 32 to 256 on various types of hardware and tasks.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）在交互式聊天机器人、文档分析、智能体工作流等长上下文应用中已愈发普及，但以低延迟、高吞吐量响应长上下文请求仍是一项挑战。投机解码（SD）是一种被广泛应用的无损降低延迟技术，但传统观点认为其效能仅局限于小批量场景。在MagicDec中，我们意外发现，即便在中长序列的高吞吐量推理场景下，投机解码也能实现加速。更值得注意的是，基于我们的严谨分析，采用智能草稿生成策略时，加速效果会随批量规模增大而提升。MagicDec首先识别出瓶颈会随批量规模和序列长度的增加发生转移，并利用这些认知更高效地将投机解码部署于高吞吐量推理场景。我们采用配备稀疏KV缓存的草稿模型来解决随序列长度和批量规模同步扩大的KV瓶颈问题。此外，我们提出了一个理论模型，用于选择最优草稿生成策略以实现最大加速比。我们的研究凸显了投机解码在长上下文服务中的广泛适用性，它可以在不损失精度的前提下提升吞吐量、降低延迟。针对中长序列，我们在各类硬件和任务上的实验显示，当服务的批量规模处于32到256区间时，LLaMA-3.1-8B的加速比最高可达2.51倍。
notes: 该论文明确属于 LLM 推理优化，且同时覆盖解码策略、KV/上下文缓存以及面向高吞吐服务的系统级部署优化。

title: OCCAM: Towards Cost-Efficient and Accuracy-Aware Classification Inference
title_zh: OCCAM：面向成本高效且准确率感知的分类推理
abstract: Classification tasks play a fundamental role in various applications, spanning domains such as healthcare, natural language processing and computer vision. With the growing popularity and capacity of machine learning models, people can easily access trained classifiers as a service online or offline. However, model use comes with a cost and classifiers of higher capacity (such as large foundation models) usually incur higher inference costs. To harness the respective strengths of different classifiers, we propose a principled approach, OCCAM, to compute the best classifier assignment strategy over classification queries (termed as the optimal model portfolio) so that the aggregated accuracy is maximized, under user-specified cost budgets. Our approach uses an unbiased and low-variance accuracy estimator and effectively computes the optimal solution by solving an integer linear programming problem. On a variety of real-world datasets, OCCAM achieves 40% cost reduction with little to no accuracy drop.
abstract_zh: 分类任务在医疗保健、自然语言处理、计算机视觉等领域的各类应用中发挥着基础性作用。随着机器学习模型的普及度与容量不断提升，用户可以便捷地在线或离线获取作为服务的已训练分类器。但模型的使用存在成本，容量更高的分类器例如大型基础模型通常会产生更高的推理成本。为利用不同分类器的各自优势，我们提出了一种原则性方法OCCAM，用于计算针对分类查询的最佳分类器分配策略称为最优模型组合，从而在用户指定的成本预算下最大化总准确率。我们的方法采用无偏、低方差的准确率估计器，通过求解整数线性规划问题高效计算出最优解。在多种真实世界数据集上的测试结果显示，OCCAM可实现40%的成本降低，同时准确率仅有极小下降甚至完全没有下降。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: HexGen-2: Disaggregated Generative Inference of LLMs in Heterogeneous Environment
title_zh: HexGen-2：在异构环境中面向大模型的解耦生成推理
abstract:
Disaggregating the prefill and decoding phases represents an effective new paradigm for generative inference of large language models (LLM). This approach offers some significant system advantages, such as eliminating prefill-decoding interference and optimizing resource allocation. However, it is still an challenging open problem about how to deploy the disaggregated inference paradigm across a group of heterogeneous GPUs, which can be an economic alternative of the deployment over the homogeneous high performance GPUs.
Towards this end, we introduce HexGen-2, a distributed system for high throughput and cost-efficient LLM serving on heterogeneous GPUs following the disaggragated paradigm. Built on top of HexGen, the core component of HexGen-2 is a sophisticated scheduling algorithm that formalizes the allocation of disaggregated LLM inference computations and communications over heterogeneous GPUs and network connections as a constraint optimization problem. We leverage the graph partitioning and max-flow algorithm to co-optimize resource allocation, parallel strategies for distinct inference phases, and the efficiency of inter-phase key-value (KV) cache communications. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate HexGen-2, i.e., on OPT (30B) and Llama-2 (70B) models in various real-world settings, the results reveal that HexGen-2 delivers up to a 2.0$\times$ and on average a 1.3$\times$ improvement in serving throughput, reduces the average inference latency by 1.5$\times$ compared with state-of-the-art systems given the same price budget, and achieves comparable inference performance with a 30% lower price budget.
abstract_zh:
将预填充与解码阶段解耦是大语言模型生成式推理的一种高效新范式。这种方法具备多项显著的系统优势，例如消除预填充与解码间的干扰、优化资源分配。但如何在一组异构GPU上部署该解耦推理范式仍是一个具有挑战性的开放问题，而异构GPU部署可作为同构高性能GPU部署的高性价比替代方案。
为此，我们提出HexGen-2，这是一款遵循解耦范式、可在异构GPU上实现高吞吐量、高成本效益大语言模型服务的分布式系统。HexGen-2构建于HexGen之上，其核心组件是一套设计精密的调度算法，该算法将异构GPU与网络连接上的解耦式大语言模型推理计算、通信分配问题形式化为一个约束优化问题。我们利用图划分与最大流算法，对资源分配、不同推理阶段的并行策略以及阶段间键值缓存通信效率进行协同优化。我们开展了大量实验对HexGen-2进行评估，即在多种真实场景下测试OPT（30B）和Llama-2（70B）模型的表现，结果显示，在相同价格预算下，HexGen-2的服务吞吐量最高提升2.0倍，平均提升1.3倍，平均推理延迟较现有最优系统降低1.5倍，还可在价格预算降低30%的前提下达到相当的推理性能。
notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 推理系统在异构 GPU 环境下的解耦部署与资源分配，核心是系统设计与调度问题。

title: AI-for-Science Low-code Platform with Bayesian Adversarial Multi-Agent Framework
title_zh: 面向科学的低代码平台：带有贝叶斯对抗多智能体框架
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate potentials for automating scientific code generation but face challenges in reliability, error propagation in multi-agent workflows, and evaluation in domains with ill-defined success metrics. We present a Bayesian adversarial multi-agent framework specifically designed for AI for Science (AI4S) tasks in the form of a Low-code Platform (LCP). Three LLM-based agents are coordinated under the Bayesian framework: a Task Manager that structures user inputs into actionable plans and adaptive test cases, a Code Generator that produces candidate solutions, and an Evaluator providing comprehensive feedback. The framework employs an adversarial loop where the Task Manager iteratively refines test cases to challenge the Code Generator, while prompt distributions are dynamically updated using Bayesian principles by integrating code quality metrics: functional correctness, structural alignment, and static analysis. This co-optimization of tests and code reduces dependence on LLM reliability and addresses evaluation uncertainty inherent to scientific tasks. LCP also streamlines human-AI collaboration by translating non-expert prompts into domain-specific requirements, bypassing the need for manual prompt engineering by practitioners without coding backgrounds. Benchmark evaluations demonstrate LCP’s effectiveness in generating robust code while minimizing error propagation. The proposed platform is also tested on an Earth Science cross-disciplinary task and demonstrates strong reliability, outperforming competing models.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在自动化科学代码生成方面展现出潜力，但在可靠性、多智能体工作流中的错误传播，以及在成功指标定义不明确的领域中的评估方面仍面临挑战。我们提出了一种专为科学人工智能（AI4S）任务设计的贝叶斯对抗性多智能体框架，并将其实现为低代码平台（LCP）的形式。在该贝叶斯框架下，三个基于LLM的智能体协同工作：任务管理器将用户输入组织为可执行计划和自适应测试用例；代码生成器生成候选解决方案；评估器提供全面反馈。该框架采用对抗循环，其中任务管理器迭代细化测试用例以挑战代码生成器，同时通过整合代码质量指标，即功能正确性、结构对齐和静态分析，依据贝叶斯原理动态更新提示分布。对测试和代码的这种协同优化降低了对LLM可靠性的依赖，并解决了科学任务中固有的评估不确定性。LCP还通过将非专家提示转化为特定领域需求，简化了人机协作，使没有编程背景的从业者无需手动进行提示工程。基准评估表明，LCP在生成稳健代码的同时能够最大限度减少错误传播，效果显著。所提出的平台还在一项地球科学跨学科任务上进行了测试，表现出很强的可靠性，并优于竞争模型。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: RGB-to-Polarization Estimation: A New Task and Benchmark Study
title_zh: RGB到偏振估计：一个新任务与基准研究
abstract: Polarization images provide rich physical information that is fundamentally absent from standard RGB images, benefiting a wide range of computer vision applications such as reflection separation and material classification. However, the acquisition of polarization images typically requires additional optical components, which increases both the cost and the complexity of the applications. To bridge this gap, we introduce a new task: RGB-to-polarization image estimation, which aims to infer polarization information directly from RGB images. In this work, we establish the first comprehensive benchmark for this task by leveraging existing polarization datasets and evaluating a diverse set of state-of-the-art deep learning models, including both restoration-oriented and generative architectures. Through extensive quantitative and qualitative analysis, our benchmark not only establishes the current performance ceiling of RGB-to-polarization estimation, but also systematically reveals the respective strengths and limitations of different model families — such as direct reconstruction versus generative synthesis, and task-specific training versus large-scale pre-training. In addition, we provide some potential directions for future research on polarization estimation. This benchmark is intended to serve as a foundational resource to facilitate the design and evaluation of future methods for polarization estimation from standard RGB inputs.
abstract_zh: 偏振图像提供了丰富的物理信息，而这些信息在标准 RGB 图像中从根本上是缺失的，因此有助于广泛的计算机视觉应用，如反射分离和材料分类。然而，获取偏振图像通常需要额外的光学组件，这会同时增加应用的成本和复杂性。为弥合这一差距，我们引入了一项新任务：RGB 到偏振图像估计，其目标是直接从 RGB 图像中推断偏振信息。在这项工作中，我们利用现有的偏振数据集，并评估了一组多样化的最先进深度学习模型，包括面向恢复的架构和生成式架构，从而为该任务建立了首个全面的基准。通过广泛的定量和定性分析，我们的基准不仅确立了 RGB 到偏振估计的当前性能上限，还系统地揭示了不同模型家族各自的优势与局限，例如直接重建与生成式合成、任务特定训练与大规模预训练。此外，我们还为未来的偏振估计研究提供了一些潜在方向。该基准旨在作为一项基础性资源，促进未来基于标准 RGB 输入进行偏振估计的方法设计与评估。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: AdaSTaR: Adaptive Data Sampling for Training Self-Taught Reasoners
title_zh: AdaSTaR：用于训练自学推理器的自适应数据采样
abstract:
Self-Taught Reasoners (STaR), synonymously known as Rejection sampling Fine-Tuning (RFT), is an integral part of the training pipeline of self-improving reasoning Language Models (LMs). 
The self-improving mechanism often employs random observation (data) sampling. 
However, this results in trained observation imbalance; inefficiently over-training on solved examples while under-training on challenging ones. 
In response, we introduce Adaptive STaR (AdaSTaR), a novel algorithm that rectifies this by integrating two adaptive sampling principles: (1) Adaptive Sampling for Diversity: promoting balanced training across observations, and (2) Adaptive Sampling for Curriculum: dynamically adjusting data difficulty to match the model's evolving strength. Across six benchmarks, AdaSTaR achieves best test accuracy in all instances (6/6) and reduces training FLOPs by an average of 58.6\% against an extensive list of baselines. These improvements in performance and efficiency generalize to different pre-trained LMs and larger models, paving the way for more efficient and effective self-improving LMs.
abstract_zh: 自我训练推理器（STaR），也称为拒绝采样微调（RFT），是自我提升推理语言模型训练流程的重要组成部分。当前的自我提升机制常靠随机观测样本采样，导致训练样本分布失衡：对简单已解决的例子过度训练，而对难题训练不足。为此我们提出自适应STaR（AdaSTaR），通过融合两种自适应采样策略来纠正这一问题：一是促进观测多样性的自适应采样，确保训练过程中各类观测获得更均衡的关注；二是面向课程的自适应采样，根据模型能力的变化动态调整数据难度，使模型始终面对恰当挑战。在六个基准测试中，AdaSTaR全部（6/6）达到最佳测试准确率，并与众多基线相比平均降低58.6%的训练浮点运算量。这种性能与效率改善对不同预训练模型及更大规模模型均适用，为更高效、有效的自我提升语言模型铺平道路。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Any-stepsize Gradient Descent for Separable Data under Fenchel–Young Losses
title_zh: Fenchel–Young损失下可分数据的任意步长梯度下降
abstract: The gradient descent (GD) has been one of the most common optimizer in machine learning. In particular, the loss landscape of a neural network is typically sharpened during the initial phase of training, making the training dynamics hover on the edge of stability. This is beyond our standard understanding of GD convergence in the stable regime where arbitrarily chosen stepsize is sufficiently smaller than the edge of stability. Recently, Wu et al. (COLT2024) have showed that GD converges with arbitrary stepsize under linearly separable logistic regression. Although their analysis hinges on the self-bounding property of the logistic loss, which seems to be a cornerstone to establish a modified descent lemma, our pilot study shows that other loss functions without the self-bounding property can make GD converge with arbitrary stepsize. To further understand what property of a loss function matters in GD, we aim to show arbitrary-stepsize GD convergence for a general loss function based on the framework of \emph{Fenchel--Young losses}. We essentially leverage the classical perceptron argument to derive the convergence rate for achieving $\epsilon$-optimal loss, which is possible for a majority of Fenchel--Young losses. Among typical loss functions, the Tsallis entropy achieves the GD convergence rate $T=\Omega(\epsilon^{-1/2})$, and the R{\'e}nyi entropy achieves the far better rate $T=\Omega(\epsilon^{-1/3})$. We argue that these better rate is possible because of \emph{separation margin} of loss functions, instead of the self-bounding property.
abstract_zh: 梯度下降（GD）一直是机器学习中最常用的优化器之一。特别是，神经网络的损失景观通常会在训练初期变得更加尖锐，使得训练动力学徘徊在稳定性边缘。这超出了我们对稳定区间内 GD 收敛性的标准理解；在该区间中，任意选取的步长都需要充分小于稳定性边缘。最近，Wu 等人（COLT2024）表明，在样本线性可分的逻辑回归中，GD 在任意步长下都能收敛。尽管他们的分析依赖于逻辑损失的自有界性质，而这一性质似乎是建立修正下降引理的关键基础，但我们的初步研究表明，其他不具备自有界性质的损失函数同样可以使 GD 在任意步长下收敛。为了进一步理解在 GD 中究竟是损失函数的什么性质起作用，我们旨在基于 Fenchel--Young 损失框架，证明一般损失函数下任意步长 GD 的收敛性。我们本质上利用经典的感知机论证来推导达到 $\epsilon$-最优损失的收敛速率，而这对于大多数 Fenchel--Young 损失都是可行的。在典型损失函数中，Tsallis 熵可实现 GD 收敛速率 $T=\Omega(\epsilon^{-1/2})$，而 R{\'e}nyi 熵则可实现显著更优的速率 $T=\Omega(\epsilon^{-1/3})$。我们认为，这种更优速率之所以可能，是因为损失函数的分离间隔，而不是自有界性质。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Unveiling Chain of Step Reasoning for Vision-Language Models with Fine-grained Rewards
title_zh: 通过细粒度奖励揭示视觉-语言模型的逐步推理链
abstract: Chain of thought reasoning has demonstrated remarkable success in large language models, yet its adaptation to vision-language reasoning remains an open challenge with unclear best practices. Existing attempts typically employ reasoning chains at a coarse-grained level, which struggles to perform fine-grained structured reasoning and, more importantly, are difficult to evaluate the reward and quality of intermediate reasoning. In this work, we delve into chain of step reasoning for vision-language models, enabling assessing reasoning step quality accurately and leading to effective reinforcement learning and inference-time scaling with fine-grained rewards. We present a simple, effective, and fully transparent framework, including the step-level reasoning data, process reward model (PRM), and reinforcement learning training. With the proposed approaches, our models set strong baselines with consistent improvements on challenging vision-language benchmarks. More importantly, we conduct a thorough empirical analysis and ablation study, unveiling the impact of each component and several intriguing properties of inference-time scaling. We believe this paper serves as a baseline for vision-language models and offers insights into more complex multimodal reasoning. Our dataset, PRM, and code at https://github.com/baaivision/CoS.
abstract_zh: 思维链推理已在大语言模型中展现出显著成功，但其在视觉语言推理中的适配仍是一个尚未解决的挑战，最佳实践也不清晰。现有尝试通常在较粗粒度层面采用推理链，这难以进行细粒度的结构化推理，更重要的是，也难以评估中间推理的奖励和质量。在这项工作中，我们深入研究了视觉语言模型中的步骤链推理，使得能够准确评估推理步骤的质量，并借助细粒度奖励实现有效的强化学习和推理时扩展。我们提出了一个简单、有效且完全透明的框架，包括步骤级推理数据、过程奖励模型（PRM）以及强化学习训练。借助所提出的方法，我们的模型在具有挑战性的视觉语言基准上建立了强有力的基线，并取得了一致的性能提升。更重要的是，我们进行了全面的实证分析和消融研究，揭示了各个组成部分的影响以及推理时扩展的若干有趣性质。我们相信，这篇论文可作为视觉语言模型的一个基线，并为更复杂的多模态推理提供见解。我们的数据集、PRM 和代码见 https://github.com/baaivision/CoS。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: BATON: Enhancing Batch-wise Inference Efficiency for Large Language Models via Dynamic Re-batching
title_zh: BATON：通过动态重批提升大语言模型的批次推理效率
abstract:
The advanced capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) have inspired the development of various interactive web services or applications, such as ChatGPT, which offer query inference services for users. Unlike traditional DNN model, the inference of LLM entails different iterations of forward computation for different queries, which result in efficiency challenges for existing run-to-completion batch-wise inference. Hence, some methods refine batch-wise inference to iteration-level by duplicating all nonlinear layers of LLM. However, this approach not only increases resource usage but also introduces idle computations to the batch due to the prefilling of newly added queries. 

Therefore, we propose BATON, an efficient batch-wise LLM inference scheme by dynamically adjusting processing batch, which can achieve near-zero idle computations without incurring additional resource consumption. To do so, BATON 1) shapes the vectors involved in the inference of the newly inserted query and processing batch to align dimensions and generates a new attention mask based on vector shaping to ensure inference correctness, which enables query inserting without consuming additional resource; 2) embeds prefilled \textit{Keys} and \textit{Values} of the new query into the \textit{KV\_Cache} of the processing batch by leveraging the prefilling and decoding separation mechanism, eliminating idle computations to the batch introduced by the prefilling process of the new query. Experimental results show that compared to the state-of-the-art solution Orca, \name outperforms improves query processing by up to 1.75$\times$.
abstract_zh:
大语言模型的先进性能推动了各类交互式网页服务或应用的发展，例如为用户提供查询推理服务的ChatGPT。与传统深度神经网络模型不同，大语言模型的推理需要针对不同查询执行不同轮次的前向计算，这给现有“运行至完成”的批量推理模式带来了效率挑战。因此已有方法通过复制大语言模型的所有非线性层，将批量推理优化到迭代级，但该方法不仅会提升资源用量，还会因新增查询的预填充过程导致批量内出现空闲计算。
为此我们提出BATON，这是一种通过动态调整处理批次实现的高效大语言模型批量推理方案，能够在不产生额外资源消耗的前提下实现近乎为零的空闲计算。为实现该目标，BATON采取两项设计：1）对新插入查询和处理中批次的推理涉及的向量进行塑形以对齐维度，同时基于向量塑形生成新的注意力掩码保证推理正确性，从而在不消耗额外资源的前提下完成查询插入；2）利用预填充与解码分离机制，将新查询预填充得到的键与值嵌入到处理中批次的KV缓存中，消除新查询的预填充过程给批次带来的空闲计算。实验结果表明，与当前最优方案Orca相比，BATON的查询处理性能最高可提升1.75倍。
notes: 调度专项得分=7；命中组=llm_serving；augment_batch=20260402-scheduling；augment_score=7

title: Generative Universal Verifier as Multimodal Meta-Reasoner
title_zh: 生成式通用验证器作为多模态元推理器
abstract: We introduce *Generative Universal Verifier*, a novel concept and plugin designed for next-generation multimodal reasoning in vision-language models and unified multimodal models, providing the fundamental capability of reflection and refinement on visual outcomes during the reasoning and generation process. This work makes three main contributions: (1) We build **ViVerBench**, a comprehensive benchmark spanning $16$ categories of critical tasks for evaluating visual outcomes in multimodal reasoning. Results show that existing VLMs consistently underperform across these tasks, underscoring a substantial gap from human-level capability in reliable visual verification. (2) We design two automated pipelines to construct large-scale visual verification data and train **OmniVerifier-7B**, the first omni-capable generative verifier trained for universal visual verification and achieves notable gains on ViVerBench(+$8.3$). Through training, we identify three atomic capabilities in visual verification and demonstrate how they generalize and interact synergistically. (3) We propose **OmniVerifier-TTS**, a sequential test-time scaling paradigm that leverages the universal verifier to bridge image generation and editing within unified models, enhancing the upper bound of generative ability through iterative fine-grained optimization. Beyond generation, we extend universal verifier to broader world-modeling interleaved reasoning scenarios. Empirically, OmniVerifier-TTS achieves improvements on T2I-ReasonBench(+$3.7$), and GenEval++(+$4.3$), outperforming existing parallel test-time scaling methods, such as Best-of-N. By endowing multimodal reasoning with reliable visual verification, OmniVerifier advances both reliable reflection during generation and scalable test-time refinement, marking a step toward more trustworthy and controllable next-generation reasoning systems.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了生成式通用验证器，这是一种新颖概念和插件，面向视觉语言模型与统一多模态模型中的下一代多模态推理，为其在推理与生成过程中对视觉结果进行反思和优化提供了基础能力。本文有三项主要贡献：（1）我们构建了ViVerBench，这是一个全面的基准，涵盖16类用于评估多模态推理中视觉结果的关键任务。结果表明，现有视觉语言模型在这些任务上持续表现不佳，凸显出其在可靠视觉验证方面与人类水平能力之间存在显著差距。（2）我们设计了两条自动化流程来构建大规模视觉验证数据，并训练了OmniVerifier-7B，这是首个为通用视觉验证而训练、具备全模态能力的生成式验证器，并在ViVerBench上取得了显著提升（+8.3）。通过训练，我们识别出视觉验证中的三种原子能力，并展示了它们如何实现泛化并产生协同交互作用。（3）我们提出了OmniVerifier-TTS，这是一种序列式测试时扩展范式，利用通用验证器在统一模型中桥接图像生成与编辑，通过迭代式细粒度优化提升生成能力的上限。除生成之外，我们还将通用验证器扩展到更广泛的世界建模交错推理场景中。实验上，OmniVerifier-TTS在T2I-ReasonBench（+3.7）和GenEval++（+4.3）上均取得提升，优于现有并行测试时扩展方法，如Best-of-N。通过为多模态推理赋予可靠的视觉验证能力，OmniVerifier同时推进了生成过程中的可靠反思与可扩展的测试时优化，朝着更可信、可控的下一代推理系统迈出了一步。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Position: Machine Learning Conferences Should Establish a "Refutations and Critiques" Track
title_zh: 立场：机器学习会议应设立“反驳与批评”分会场
abstract:
Science progresses by iteratively advancing and correcting humanity's understanding of the world. In machine learning (ML) research, rapid advancements have led to an explosion of publications, but have also led to misleading, incorrect, flawed or perhaps even fraudulent studies being accepted and sometimes highlighted at ML conferences due to the fallibility of peer review. While such mistakes are understandable, ML conferences do not offer robust processes to help the field systematically correct when such errors are made.
This position paper argues that ML conferences should establish a dedicated "Refutations and Critiques" (R&C) Track. This R&C Track would provide a high-profile, reputable platform to support vital research that critically challenges prior research, thereby fostering a dynamic self-correcting research ecosystem.
We discuss key considerations including track design, review principles, potential pitfalls, and provide an illustrative example submission concerning a recent ICLR 2025 Oral.
We conclude that ML conferences should create official, reputable mechanisms to help ML research self-correct.
abstract_zh: 科学通过迭代地推进并纠正人类对世界的理解而不断进步。在机器学习（ML）研究中，快速的发展导致了论文发表数量的激增，但也使得一些具有误导性、不正确、有缺陷，甚至可能存在欺诈性的研究由于同行评审的局限性而被机器学习会议接收，有时还会被重点展示。虽然这类错误可以理解，但当这类错误发生时，机器学习会议并未提供健全的机制来帮助该领域进行系统性的纠正。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Generalization of RLVR Using Causal Reasoning as a Testbed
title_zh: 以因果推理作为试验平台的 RLVR 泛化
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising paradigm for post-training large language models (LLMs) on complex reasoning tasks. Yet, the conditions under which RLVR yields robust generalization remain poorly understood. This paper provides an empirical study of RLVR generalization in the setting of probabilistic inference over causal graphical models. This setting offers two natural axes along which to examine generalization: (i) the level of the probabilistic query—associational, interventional, or counterfactual—and (ii) the structural complexity of the query, measured by the size of its relevant subgraph. We construct datasets of causal graphs and queries spanning these difficulty axes and fine-tune Qwen-2.5-Instruct models using RLVR or supervised fine-tuning (SFT). We vary both the model scale (3B–32B) and the query level included in training. We find that RLVR yields stronger within-level and across-level generalization than SFT, but only for specific combinations of model size and training query level. Further analysis shows that RLVR’s effectiveness depends on the model’s initial reasoning competence. With sufficient initial competence, RLVR improves an LLM’s marginalization strategy and reduces errors in intermediate probability calculations, producing substantial accuracy gains, particularly on more complex queries. These findings show that RLVR can improve specific causal reasoning subskills, with its benefits emerging only when the model has sufficient initial competence.
abstract_zh: 具有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已成为在复杂推理任务上对大语言模型（LLM）进行后训练的一种很有前景的范式。然而，RLVR 在何种条件下能够实现稳健泛化，仍然缺乏充分理解。本文在因果图模型上的概率推断场景中，对 RLVR 的泛化能力进行了实证研究。该场景提供了两个可用于考察泛化的自然维度：（i）概率查询的层级，即关联、干预或反事实；以及（ii）查询的结构复杂度，用其相关子图的大小来度量。我们构建了覆盖这些难度维度的因果图和查询数据集，并使用 RLVR 或监督微调（SFT）对 Qwen-2.5-Instruct 模型进行微调。我们同时改变模型规模（3B–32B）以及训练中包含的查询层级。我们发现，与 SFT 相比，RLVR 能够带来更强的同层级和跨层级泛化，但这种优势只出现在特定的模型规模与训练查询层级组合下。进一步分析表明，RLVR 的有效性取决于模型的初始推理能力。当初始能力足够时，RLVR 能够改进 LLM 的边缘化策略，并减少中间概率计算中的错误，从而带来显著的准确率提升，尤其是在更复杂的查询上。这些发现表明，RLVR 可以提升特定的因果推理子技能，但其收益只有在模型具备足够初始能力时才会显现。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Learning Escorted Protocols For Multistate Free-Energy Estimation
title_zh: 学习陪伴协议以估计多态自由能
abstract: Estimating relative free energy differences between multiple thermodynamic states lies at the core of numerous problems in computational biochemistry. Traditional estimators, such as Free Energy Perturbation and its non-equilibrium counterpart based on the Jarzynski equality, rely on defining a switching protocol between thermodynamic states and computing the free energy difference from the work performed during this process. In this work, we present a method for learning such switching protocols within the class of escorted protocols that combine deterministic and stochastic steps. For this purpose, we use Conditional Flow Matching, and  introduce Conditional Density Matching (CDM)  for the purpose of estimating the change in Free-Energy. We further reduce the variance in the multistate setting by coupling multiple flows between thermodynamic states into a Flow Graph, enforcing estimator consistency across different transition paths.
abstract_zh: 估计多个热力学状态之间的相对自由能差异是计算生物化学中众多问题的核心。传统估计方法，如自由能微扰及其基于 Jarzynski 等式的非平衡对应方法，依赖于在热力学状态之间定义切换协议，并根据这一过程中所做的功来计算自由能差。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，用于在结合确定性步骤与随机性步骤的护送协议类中学习此类切换协议。为此，我们使用条件流匹配，并引入条件密度匹配（CDM）以估计自由能的变化。我们还通过将热力学状态之间的多个流耦合为一个流图，在多状态设定下进一步降低方差，并强制不同跃迁路径上的估计器保持一致性。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Noise Hypernetworks: Amortizing Test-Time Compute in Diffusion Models
title_zh: 噪声超网络：在扩散模型中摊平测试时的计算
abstract: The new paradigm of test-time scaling has yielded remarkable breakthroughs in Large Language Models (LLMs) (e.g. reasoning models) and in generative vision models, allowing models to allocate additional computation during inference to effectively tackle increasingly complex problems. Despite the improvements of this approach, an important limitation emerges: the substantial increase in computation time makes the process slow and impractical for many applications. Given the success of this paradigm and its growing usage, we seek to preserve its benefits while eschewing the inference overhead. In this work we propose one solution to the critical problem of integrating test-time scaling knowledge into a model during post-training. Specifically, we replace reward guided test-time noise optimization in diffusion models with a Noise Hypernetwork that modulates initial input noise. We propose a theoretically grounded framework for learning this reward-tilted distribution for distilled generators, through a tractable noise-space objective that maintains fidelity to the base model while optimizing for desired characteristics. We show that our approach recovers a substantial portion of the quality gains from explicit test-time optimization at a fraction of the computational cost.
abstract_zh: 测试时扩展这一新范式已在大语言模型（LLM）（例如推理模型）和生成式视觉模型中带来了显著突破，使模型能够在推理过程中分配额外计算，以有效应对日益复杂的问题。尽管这种方法带来了提升，但也出现了一个重要局限：计算时间的大幅增加使这一过程对许多应用而言缓慢且不切实际。鉴于这一范式的成功及其日益广泛的使用，我们希望在避免推理开销的同时保留其优势。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种解决方案，以应对在后训练阶段将测试时扩展知识整合进模型这一关键问题。具体而言，我们用一种调制初始输入噪声的噪声超网络，替代了扩散模型中奖励引导的测试时噪声优化。我们提出了一个具有理论依据的框架，用于通过一个可处理的噪声空间目标，为蒸馏生成器学习这种经奖励倾斜的分布；该目标在优化期望特性的同时，保持对基础模型的保真度。我们表明，我们的方法以一小部分计算成本，恢复了显式测试时优化所带来的相当大一部分质量增益。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Time-Embedded Algorithm Unrolling for Computational MRI
title_zh: 用于计算磁共振成像的时间嵌入算法展开
abstract: Algorithm unrolling methods have proven powerful for solving the regularized least squares problem in computational magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). These approaches unfold an iterative algorithm with a fixed number of iterations, typically alternating between a neural network-based proximal operator for regularization, a data fidelity operation and auxiliary updates with learnable parameters. While the connection to optimization methods dictate that the proximal operator network should be shared across unrolls, this can introduce artifacts or blurring. Heuristically, practitioners have shown that using distinct networks may be beneficial, but this significantly increases the number of learnable parameters, making it challenging to prevent overfitting. To address these shortcomings, by taking inspirations from proximal operators with varying thresholds in approximate message passing (AMP) and the success of time-embedding in diffusion models, we propose a time-embedded algorithm unrolling scheme for inverse problems. Specifically, we introduce a novel perspective on the iteration-dependent proximal operation in vector AMP (VAMP) and the subsequent Onsager correction in the context of algorithm unrolling, framing them as a time-embedded neural network. Similarly, the scalar weights in the data fidelity operation and its associated Onsager correction are cast as time-dependent learnable parameters. Our extensive experiments on the fastMRI dataset, spanning various acceleration rates and datasets, demonstrate that our method effectively reduces aliasing artifacts and mitigates noise amplification, achieving state-of-the-art performance. Furthermore, we show that our time-embedding strategy extends to existing algorithm unrolling approaches, enhancing reconstruction quality without increasing the computational complexity significantly. Code available at https://github.com/JN-Yun/TE-Unrolling-MRI.
abstract_zh: 算法展开方法已被证明在计算磁共振成像（MRI）中的正则化最小二乘问题求解方面非常有效。这些方法将一个迭代算法展开为固定次数的迭代，通常在基于神经网络的用于正则化的近端算子、数据保真操作以及带有可学习参数的辅助更新之间交替进行。尽管与优化方法的联系表明近端算子网络应在各次展开中共享，但这可能会引入伪影或模糊。经验上，研究人员发现使用不同的网络可能更有利，但这会显著增加可学习参数的数量，使得防止过拟合变得具有挑战性。为解决这些不足，我们受近似消息传递（AMP）中具有可变阈值的近端算子以及扩散模型中时间嵌入成功经验的启发，提出了一种面向逆问题的时间嵌入算法展开方案。具体而言，我们在算法展开的背景下，对向量 AMP（VAMP）中依赖迭代的近端操作及其后续的 Onsager 校正提出了一种新的视角，将其构造为一个时间嵌入神经网络。类似地，数据保真操作中的标量权重及其相关的 Onsager 校正也被表示为随时间变化的可学习参数。我们在 fastMRI 数据集上开展了大量实验，涵盖多种加速倍率和数据集，结果表明我们的方法能够有效减少混叠伪影并缓解噪声放大，实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们还表明，该时间嵌入策略可以扩展到现有的算法展开方法，在不显著增加计算复杂度的情况下提升重建质量。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: SpaCE-10: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Multimodal Large Language Models in Compositional Spatial Intelligence
title_zh: SpaCE-10：用于组合空间智能的多模态大语言模型全面评测
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in various multimodal tasks. To pursue higher intelligence in space, MLLMs require integrating multiple atomic spatial capabilities to handle complex and dynamic tasks. However, existing benchmarks struggle to comprehensively evaluate the spatial intelligence of common MLLMs from the atomic level to the compositional level. To fill this gap, we present SpaCE-10, a comprehensive benchmark for compositional spatial evaluations. In SpaCE-10, we define 10 atomic spatial capabilities, which are combined to form 8 compositional capabilities. Based on these definitions, we propose a novel hierarchical annotation pipeline to generate high-quality and diverse question-answer (QA) pairs. With over 150+ hours of human expert effort, we obtain over 5k QA pairs for 811 real indoor scenes in SpaCE-10, which covers various evaluation settings like point cloud input and multi-choice QA. We conduct an extensive evaluation of common MLLMs on SpaCE-10 and find that even the most advanced MLLM still lags behind humans by large margins. Through our careful study, we also draw several significant findings that benefit the MLLM community. For example, we reveal that the shortcoming of counting capability greatly limits the compositional spatial capabilities of existing MLLMs. We will release the code and benchmark soon.
abstract_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在各种多模态任务中已经取得了显著进展。为了在空间方面追求更高智能，MLLM 需要整合多种原子级空间能力，以处理复杂且动态的任务。然而，现有基准难以从原子级到组合级全面评估常见 MLLM 的空间智能。为填补这一空白，我们提出了 SpaCE-10，这是一个用于组合空间评测的综合基准。在 SpaCE-10 中，我们定义了 10 种原子级空间能力，并将其组合形成 8 种组合能力。基于这些定义，我们提出了一种新颖的分层标注流程，以生成高质量且多样化的问答（QA）对。通过超过 150 小时的人类专家投入，我们在 SpaCE-10 中为 811 个真实室内场景获得了超过 5k 个 QA 对，覆盖了点云输入和多选 QA 等多种评测设置。我们在 SpaCE-10 上对常见 MLLM 进行了广泛评估，发现即使是最先进的 MLLM，与人类相比仍然存在很大差距。通过细致研究，我们还得出了一些有益于 MLLM 社区的重要发现。例如，我们揭示了计数能力的不足极大限制了现有 MLLM 的组合空间能力。我们将很快发布代码和基准。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Guiding LLM Decision-Making with Fairness Reward Models
title_zh: 用公平奖励模型指导LLM决策
abstract: Large language models are increasingly used to support high-stakes decisions, potentially influencing who is granted bail or receives a loan. Naive chain-of-thought sampling can improve average decision accuracy, but has also been shown to amplify unfair bias. To address this challenge and enable the trustworthy use of reasoning models in high-stakes decision-making, we propose a framework for training a generalizable Fairness Reward Model (FRM). Our model assigns a fairness score to LLM reasoning, enabling the system to down-weight biased trajectories and favor equitable ones when aggregating decisions across reasoning chains. We show that a single Fairness Reward Model, trained on weakly supervised, LLM-annotated examples of biased versus unbiased reasoning, transfers across tasks, domains, and model families without additional fine-tuning. When applied to real-world decision-making tasks including recidivism prediction and social media moderation, our approach consistently improves fairness while matching, or even surpassing, baseline accuracy.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型正越来越多地被用于支持高风险决策，并可能影响谁会被批准保释或获得贷款。朴素的思维链采样虽然可以提高平均决策准确率，但也已被证明会放大不公平偏见。为应对这一挑战，并使推理模型能够在高风险决策中被可信地使用，我们提出了一个用于训练可泛化公平性奖励模型（FRM）的框架。我们的模型为大语言模型的推理分配公平性分数，从而使系统在跨推理链汇总决策时，能够降低带有偏见轨迹的权重，并偏向更公平的轨迹。我们表明，一个在弱监督、由大语言模型标注的有偏与无偏推理示例上训练得到的单一公平性奖励模型，无需额外微调即可迁移到不同任务、领域和模型家族。当应用于包括累犯预测和社交媒体审核在内的真实世界决策任务时，我们的方法在保持与基线相当、甚至超过基线准确率的同时，能够持续提升公平性。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: R2R: Efficiently Navigating Divergent Reasoning Paths with Small-Large Model Token Routing
title_zh: R2R：基于大小模型词元路由的发散推理路径高效导航
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve impressive reasoning capabilities at the cost of substantial inference overhead, posing substantial deployment challenges. Although distilled Small Language Models (SLMs) significantly enhance efficiency, their performance suffers as they fail to follow LLMs' reasoning paths. Luckily, we reveal that only a small fraction of tokens genuinely diverge reasoning paths between LLMs and SLMs. Most generated tokens are either identical or exhibit neutral differences, such as minor variations in abbreviations or expressions. Leveraging this insight, we introduce **Roads to Rome (R2R)**, a neural token router that selectively utilizes LLMs only for these critical, path-divergent tokens, while leaving the majority of token generation to the SLM. We also develop an automatic data generation pipeline that identifies divergent tokens and generates token-level routing labels to train the lightweight router. We apply R2R to combine R1-1.5B and R1-32B models from the DeepSeek family, and evaluate on challenging math, coding, and QA benchmarks. With an average activated parameter size of 5.6B, R2R surpasses the average accuracy of R1-7B by 1.6×, outperforming even the R1-14B model. Compared to R1-32B, it delivers a 2.8× wall-clock speedup with comparable performance, advancing the Pareto frontier of test-time scaling efficiency.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）以极高的推理开销为代价实现了出色的推理能力，这给实际部署带来了极大挑战。尽管经过蒸馏的小语言模型（SLM）可显著提升效率，但由于无法遵循大语言模型的推理路径，其性能存在明显短板。幸运的是，我们发现仅有极少部分词元会真正导致大语言模型与小语言模型的推理路径出现分歧，大部分生成词元要么完全相同，要么仅存在中性差异，比如缩写或表述的微小变动。基于这一发现，我们提出了“条条大路通罗马（R2R）”这一神经词元路由器，仅在生成这些会导致路径分歧的关键词元时选择性调用大语言模型，其余大部分词元的生成工作则交由小语言模型完成。我们还开发了一套自动数据生成流水线，可识别分歧词元并生成词元级别的路由标签，用于训练该轻量路由器。我们应用R2R融合DeepSeek系列的R1-1.5B与R1-32B模型，在高难度数学、代码生成和问答基准测试上开展评估。在平均激活参数量仅为5.6B的情况下，R2R的平均准确率是R1-7B的1.6倍，性能甚至优于R1-14B模型。与R1-32B相比，R2R在性能相当的前提下实现了2.8倍的实际运行速度提升，拓展了测试阶段缩放效率的帕累托前沿。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: Machine Unlearning under Overparameterization
title_zh: 过参数化下的机器遗忘
abstract: Machine unlearning algorithms aim to remove the influence of specific training samples, ideally recovering the model that would have resulted from training on the remaining data alone. We study unlearning in the overparameterized setting, where many models interpolate the data, and defining the solution as any loss minimizer over the retained set—as in prior work in the underparameterized setting—is inadequate, since the original model may already interpolate the retained data and satisfy this condition. In this regime, loss gradients vanish, rendering prior methods based on gradient perturbations ineffective, motivating both new unlearning definitions and algorithms. For this setting, we define the unlearning solution as the minimum-complexity interpolator over the retained data and propose a new algorithmic framework that only requires access to model gradients on the retained set at the original solution. We minimize a regularized objective over perturbations constrained to be orthogonal to these model gradients, a first-order relaxation of the interpolation condition. For different model classes, we provide exact and approximate unlearning guarantees and demonstrate that an implementation of our framework outperforms existing baselines across various unlearning experiments.
abstract_zh: 机器遗忘算法旨在消除特定训练样本的影响，理想情况下恢复出仅在剩余数据上训练所得到的模型。我们研究过参数化设定下的遗忘问题，在这种情况下，许多模型都能对数据实现插值；而像先前针对欠参数化设定的工作那样，将解定义为保留集上的任意损失最小化器是不充分的，因为原始模型可能已经对保留数据实现了插值并满足这一条件。在这种情形下，损失梯度会消失，使得先前基于梯度扰动的方法失效，这也推动了新的遗忘定义和算法的发展。针对这一设定，我们将遗忘解定义为保留数据上的最小复杂度插值器，并提出了一个新的算法框架，该框架只需要访问原始解处模型在保留集上的梯度。我们在扰动上最小化一个正则化目标，并将扰动约束为与这些模型梯度正交，这是对插值条件的一阶松弛。针对不同的模型类别，我们给出了精确和近似的遗忘保证，并表明该框架的一个实现版本在各种遗忘实验中优于现有基线方法。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Rethinking Causal Mask Attention for Vision-Language Inference
title_zh: 重新思考视觉-语言推理中的因果遮掩注意力
abstract:
Causal attention has become a foundational mechanism in autoregressive Vision-Language models (VLMs), unifying textual and visual inputs under a single generative framework. However, existing causal mask-based strategies are inherited from large language models (LLMs) where they are tailored for text-only decoding, and their adaptation to vision tokens is insufficiently addressed in the prefill stage. Strictly masking future positions for vision queries introduces overly rigid constraints, which hinder the model’s ability to leverage future context that often contains essential semantic cues for accurate inference.
In this work, we empirically investigate how different causal masking strategies affect vision-language inference and then propose a family of future-aware attentions tailored for this setting.
We first empirically analyze the effect of previewing future tokens for vision queries and demonstrate that rigid masking undermines the model’s capacity to capture useful contextual semantic representations. Based on these findings, we propose a lightweight attention family that aggregates future visual context into past representations via pooling, effectively preserving the autoregressive structure while enhancing cross-token dependencies.
We evaluate a range of causal masks across diverse vision-language inference settings and show that selectively compressing future semantic context into past representations benefits the inference.
abstract_zh:
因果注意力已成为自回归视觉语言模型（VLM）的基础机制，可将文本与视觉输入统一到单个生成框架下。然而，现有基于因果掩码的策略继承自专为纯文本解码设计的大语言模型（LLM），其在预填充阶段对视觉令牌的适配问题尚未得到充分研究。针对视觉查询严格掩码未来位置的做法会引入过度僵化的约束，阻碍模型利用未来上下文的能力，而这类上下文通常包含实现准确推理所需的关键语义线索。
本研究通过实验探究了不同因果掩码策略对视觉语言推理的影响，进而提出了一类适配该场景的未来感知注意力方法。
我们首先通过实验分析了视觉查询预览未来令牌的效果，证实僵化掩码会削弱模型捕获有效上下文语义表示的能力。基于上述发现，我们提出了一类轻量级注意力方法，通过池化操作将未来视觉上下文聚合到历史表示中，可在保留自回归结构的同时增强跨令牌依赖关系。
我们在多种视觉语言推理场景下对一系列因果掩码进行了评估，结果表明，将未来语义上下文选择性压缩到历史表示中有助于提升推理效果。
notes: 论文聚焦VLM推理阶段的causal mask/attention设计，核心是调整视觉token在prefill阶段的注意力掩码约束，属于推理时的模型结构侧优化；摘要未直接涉及缓存、调度、内核或压缩。

title: Zero-shot Denoising via Neural Compression: Theoretical and algorithmic framework
title_zh: 通过神经压缩实现零样本去噪：理论与算法框架
abstract: Zero-shot denoising aims to denoise observations without access to training samples or clean reference images. This setting is particularly relevant in practical imaging scenarios involving specialized domains such as  medical imaging or biology. In this work, we propose the *Zero-Shot Neural Compression Denoiser* (ZS-NCD), a novel denoising framework based on neural compression. ZS-NCD treats a neural compression network as an untrained model, optimized directly on patches extracted from a single noisy image. The final reconstruction is then obtained by aggregating the outputs of the trained model over overlapping patches. Thanks to the built-in entropy constraints of compression architectures, our method naturally avoids overfitting and does not require manual regularization or early stopping. Through extensive experiments, we show that ZS-NCD achieves state-of-the-art performance among zero-shot denoisers for both Gaussian and Poisson noise, and generalizes well to both natural and non-natural images. Additionally, we provide new finite-sample theoretical results that characterize upper bounds on the achievable reconstruction error of general maximum-likelihood compression-based denoisers. These results further establish the theoretical foundations of compression-based denoising. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Computational-Imaging-RU/ZS-NCDenoiser.
abstract_zh: 零样本去噪旨在在无法获得训练样本或干净参考图像的情况下，对观测数据进行去噪。这一设定在涉及医学成像或生物学等专门领域的实际成像场景中尤为相关。在这项工作中，我们提出了零样本神经压缩去噪器（ZS-NCD），这是一种基于神经压缩的新型去噪框架。ZS-NCD 将神经压缩网络视为一个未经训练的模型，并直接在从单幅噪声图像中提取的图像块上进行优化。最终重建结果则通过聚合训练后模型在重叠图像块上的输出得到。得益于压缩架构内置的熵约束，我们的方法能够自然避免过拟合，不需要手动正则化或提前停止。通过大量实验，我们表明，ZS-NCD 在高斯噪声和泊松噪声条件下都达到了零样本去噪器中的最新最优性能，并且对自然图像和非自然图像都具有良好的泛化能力。此外，我们还给出了新的有限样本理论结果，用以刻画一般基于最大似然的压缩型去噪器所能达到的重建误差上界。这些结果进一步奠定了基于压缩的去噪方法的理论基础。我们的代码可在以下地址获取：https://github.com/Computational-Imaging-RU/ZS-NCDenoiser。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Learning the Inverse Temperature of Ising Models under Hard Constraints using One Sample
title_zh: 在硬约束下使用一个样本学习伊辛模型的逆温度
abstract:
We consider the problem of estimating the inverse temperature parameter $\beta$ of an $n$-dimensional truncated Ising model using a single sample. Given a graph $G = (V,E)$ with $n$ vertices, a truncated Ising model is a probability distribution over the $n$-dimensional hypercube {-1,1}$^n$ where each configuration $\mathbf{\sigma}$ is constrained to lie in a truncation set $S \subseteq $ {-1,1}$^n$ and has probability $\Pr(\mathbf{\sigma}) \propto \exp(\beta\mathbf{\sigma}^\top A_G \mathbf{\sigma})$ with $A_G$ being the adjacency matrix of $G$. We adopt the recent setting of [Galanis et al. SODA'24], where the truncation set $S$ can be expressed as the set of satisfying assignments of a $k$-CNF formula. Given a single sample $\mathbf{\sigma}$ from a truncated Ising model, with inverse parameter $\beta^\*$, underlying graph $G$ of bounded degree $\Delta$ and $S$ being expressed as the set of satisfying assignments of a $k$-CNF formula, we design in nearly $\mathcal{O}(n)$ time an estimator $\hat{\beta}$ that is $\mathcal{O}(\Delta^3/\sqrt{n})$-consistent with the true parameter $\beta^\*$ for $k \gtrsim \log(d^2 k)\Delta^3.$

Our estimator is based on the maximization of the pseudolikelihood, a notion that has received extensive analysis for various probabilistic models without [Chatterjee, Annals of Statistics '07] or with truncation [Galanis et al. SODA '24]. Our approach generalizes recent techniques from [Daskalakis et al. STOC '19, Galanis et al. SODA '24], to confront the more challenging setting of the truncated Ising model.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑这样一个问题：利用一个样本来估计一个 n 维截断 Ising 模型的逆温度参数 β。给定一个具有 n 个顶点的图 G = (V,E)，截断 Ising 模型是在 n 维超立方体 {-1,1}^n 上的一个概率分布，其中每个构型 σ 都被约束在一个截断集合 S ⊆ {-1,1}^n 中，并且其概率满足 Pr(σ) ∝ exp(βσ^⊤A_Gσ)，其中 A_G 是图 G 的邻接矩阵。我们采用 [Galanis et al. SODA'24] 最近提出的设定，其中截断集合 S 可以表示为一个 k-CNF 公式的满足赋值集合。给定一个来自截断 Ising 模型的单一样本 σ，其逆参数为 β*，底层图 G 的最大度有界为 Δ，且 S 表示为一个 k-CNF 公式的满足赋值集合，我们设计了一个几乎在线性时间 O(n) 内运行的估计量 β̂，当 k ≳ log(d^2 k)Δ^3 时，它与真实参数 β* 的一致误差为 O(Δ^3/√n)。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Janus-Pro-R1: Advancing Collaborative Visual Comprehension and Generation via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: Janus-Pro-R1：通过强化学习推进协作式视觉理解与生成
abstract: Recent endeavors in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) aim to unify visual comprehension and generation. However, these two capabilities remain largely independent, as if they are two separate functions encapsulated within the same model. Consequently, visual comprehension does not enhance visual generation, and the reasoning mechanisms of LLMs have not been fully integrated to revolutionize image generation. In this paper, we propose to enable the collaborative co-evolution of visual comprehension and generation, advancing image generation into an iterative introspective process. We introduce a two-stage training approach: supervised fine-tuning teaches the MLLM with the foundational ability to generate genuine CoT for visual generation, while reinforcement learning activates its full potential via an exploration-exploitation trade-off. Ultimately, we unlock the Aha moment in visual generation, advancing MLLMs from text-to-image tasks to unified image generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model not only excels in text-to-image generation and image editing, but also functions as a superior image semantic evaluator with enhanced visual comprehension capabilities. Project Page: \url{https://janus-pro-r1.github.io}.
abstract_zh: 近年来，多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的研究致力于统一视觉理解与生成。然而，这两种能力在很大程度上仍然彼此独立，仿佛是封装在同一模型中的两个分离功能。因此，视觉理解并未促进视觉生成，而大语言模型的推理机制也尚未被充分整合，以推动图像生成的革新。在本文中，我们提出使视觉理解与生成实现协同共进的共同演化，将图像生成推进为一个迭代式的自省过程。我们引入了一种两阶段训练方法：监督微调赋予 MLLM 为视觉生成产生真实思维链的基础能力，而强化学习则通过探索与利用之间的权衡激发其全部潜力。最终，我们在视觉生成中释放了“Aha 时刻”，推动 MLLM 从文本到图像任务迈向统一图像生成。大量实验表明，我们的模型不仅在文生图生成和图像编辑方面表现出色，还能够作为更优越的图像语义评估器，并具备增强的视觉理解能力。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Guided Flow Policy: Learning from High-Value Actions in Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: Guided Flow Policy 在离线强化学习中从高价值动作中学习
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning often relies on behavior regularization that enforces policies to remain close to the dataset distribution.  However, such approaches fail to distinguish between high-value and low-value actions in their regularization components. We introduce Guided Flow Policy (GFP), which couples a multi-step flow-matching policy with a distilled one-step actor. The actor directs the flow policy through weighted behavior cloning to focus on cloning high-value actions from the dataset rather than indiscriminately imitating all state-action pairs. In turn, the flow policy constrains the actor to remain aligned with the dataset's best transitions while maximizing the critic. This mutual guidance enables GFP to achieve state-of-the-art performance across 144 state and pixel-based tasks from the OGBench, Minari, and D4RL benchmarks, with substantial gains on suboptimal datasets and challenging tasks.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习通常依赖行为正则化，要求策略保持接近数据集分布。然而，这类方法在其正则化组成部分中无法区分高价值动作和低价值动作。我们提出了引导流策略（GFP），它将一个多步流匹配策略与一个蒸馏得到的单步行动者耦合起来。该行动者通过加权行为克隆引导流策略，使其专注于克隆数据集中的高价值动作，而不是不加区分地模仿所有状态-动作对。反过来，流策略约束行动者在最大化评论家函数的同时，保持与数据集中最佳转移的一致性。这种相互引导使得 GFP 在来自 OGBench、Minari 和 D4RL 基准的 144 个基于状态和像素的任务上实现了最先进的性能，并在次优数据集和具有挑战性的任务上取得了显著提升。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: SWIFT: On-the-Fly Self-Speculative Decoding for LLM Inference Acceleration
title_zh: SWIFT：用于大模型推理加速的即时自我推测解码
abstract: Speculative decoding (SD) has emerged as a widely used paradigm to accelerate LLM inference without compromising quality. It works by first employing a compact model to draft multiple tokens efficiently and then using the target LLM to verify them in parallel. While this technique has achieved notable speedups, most existing approaches necessitate either additional parameters or extensive training to construct effective draft models, thereby restricting their applicability across different LLMs and tasks. To address this limitation, we explore a novel plug-and-play SD solution with layer-skipping, which skips intermediate layers of the target LLM as the compact draft model. Our analysis reveals that LLMs exhibit great potential for self-acceleration through layer sparsity and the task-specific nature of this sparsity. Building on these insights, we introduce SWIFT, an on-the-fly self-speculative decoding algorithm that adaptively selects intermediate layers of LLMs to skip during inference. SWIFT does not require auxiliary models or additional training, making it a plug-and-play solution for accelerating LLM inference across diverse input data streams. Our extensive experiments across a wide range of models and downstream tasks demonstrate that SWIFT can achieve over a $1.3\times$$\sim$$1.6\times$ speedup while preserving the original distribution of the generated text. We release our code in https://github.com/hemingkx/SWIFT.
abstract_zh: 推测解码（SD）已成为一种在不损失质量的前提下加速大语言模型（LLM）推理的广泛使用的范式。其工作原理为先使用一个紧凑模型高效草拟多个令牌，再使用目标大语言模型并行验证这些令牌。尽管这项技术已经实现了显著的提速效果，但现有大多数方法要么需要额外参数，要么需要大量训练才能构建有效的草稿模型，从而限制了其在不同大语言模型和任务中的适用性。为解决这一局限，我们探索了一种采用跳层机制的新型即插即用推测解码方案，该方案将跳过部分中间层的目标大语言模型作为紧凑草稿模型。我们的分析表明，大语言模型通过层稀疏性以及该稀疏性的任务特定特性，展现出极大的自加速潜力。基于这些洞见，我们提出SWIFT，一种动态自推测解码算法，能够在推理过程中自适应选择大语言模型中需要跳过的中间层。SWIFT不需要辅助模型，也无需额外训练，是一种可面向各类输入数据流实现大语言模型推理加速的即插即用解决方案。我们在多种模型和下游任务上开展的大量实验表明，SWIFT可实现1.3倍~1.6倍以上的提速，同时能够保留生成文本的原始分布。我们的代码发布于https://github.com/hemingkx/SWIFT。
notes: ['论文核心是自推测解码与按需跳层推理加速，属于 LLM 推理阶段优化。', '“layer-skipping”更接近Negative，而非模型压缩；摘要未涉及权重剪枝、量化或蒸馏后的静态压缩模型。']

title: Seg4Diff: Unveiling Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation in Text-to-Image Diffusion Transformers
title_zh: Seg4Diff：在文本到图像扩散Transformer中揭示开放词汇语义分割
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models excel at translating language prompts into photorealistic images by implicitly grounding textual concepts through their cross-modal attention mechanisms. Recent multi-modal diffusion transformers extend this by introducing joint self-attention over concatenated image and text tokens, enabling richer and more scalable cross-modal alignment. However, a detailed understanding of how and where these attention maps contribute to image generation remains limited. In this paper, we introduce Seg4Diff (Segmentation for Diffusion), a systematic framework for analyzing the attention structures of MM-DiT, with a focus on how specific layers propagate semantic information from text to image. Through comprehensive analysis, we identify a semantic grounding expert layer, a specific MM-DiT block that consistently aligns text tokens with spatially coherent image regions, naturally producing high-quality semantic segmentation masks. We further demonstrate that applying a lightweight fine-tuning scheme with mask-annotated image data enhances the semantic grouping capabilities of these layers and thereby improves both segmentation performance and generated image fidelity. Our findings demonstrate that semantic grouping is an emergent property of diffusion transformers and can be selectively amplified to advance both segmentation and generation performance, paving the way for unified models that bridge visual perception and generation.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像扩散模型通过其跨模态注意力机制对文本概念进行隐式锚定，能够出色地将语言提示转化为逼真的图像。近期的多模态扩散 Transformer 通过在拼接后的图像与文本标记上引入联合自注意力，进一步扩展了这一能力，从而实现更丰富且更具可扩展性的跨模态对齐。然而，目前对于这些注意力图如何以及在何处对图像生成作出贡献，仍缺乏细致的理解。本文提出 Seg4Diff（用于扩散的分割），这是一个用于分析 MM-DiT 注意力结构的系统性框架，重点研究特定层如何将语义信息从文本传播到图像。通过全面分析，我们识别出一个语义锚定专家层，即一个能够持续将文本标记与空间上连贯的图像区域对齐的特定 MM-DiT 模块，并自然地产生高质量的语义分割掩码。我们进一步表明，使用带掩码标注的图像数据进行一种轻量级微调方案，可以增强这些层的语义聚组能力，从而同时提升分割性能和生成图像的保真度。我们的发现表明，语义聚组是扩散 Transformer 的一种涌现属性，并且可以被选择性地放大，以推进分割与生成两方面的性能，为连接视觉感知与生成的统一模型铺平道路。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: CAKE: Cascading and Adaptive KV Cache Eviction with Layer Preferences
title_zh: CAKE：具有层偏好的级联自适应 KV 缓存驱逐
abstract:
Large language models (LLMs) excel at processing long sequences, boosting demand for key-value (KV) caching. While recent efforts to evict KV cache have alleviated the inference burden, they often fail to allocate resources rationally across layers with different attention patterns. In this paper, we introduce Cascading and Adaptive KV cache Eviction (CAKE), a novel approach that frames KV cache eviction as a ``cake-slicing problem.''
CAKE assesses layer-specific preferences by considering attention dynamics in both spatial and temporal dimensions, allocates rational cache size for layers accordingly, and manages memory constraints in a cascading manner. This approach enables a global view of cache allocation, adaptively distributing resources across diverse attention mechanisms while maintaining memory budgets.
CAKE also employs a new eviction indicator that considers the shifting importance of tokens over time, addressing limitations in existing methods that overlook temporal dynamics.
Comprehensive experiments on LongBench and NeedleBench show that CAKE maintains model performance with only 3.2\% of the KV cache and consistently outperforms current baselines across various models and memory constraints, particularly in low-memory settings. Additionally, CAKE achieves over 10$\times$ speedup in decoding latency compared to full cache when processing contexts of 128K tokens with FlashAttention-2. Our code is available at https://github.com/antgroup/cakekv.
abstract_zh:
大语言模型擅长处理长序列，推高了对键值缓存的需求。尽管近期KV缓存淘汰相关工作已缓解了推理负担，但这类方法通常无法在注意力模式存在差异的不同层之间合理分配资源。本文提出级联自适应KV缓存淘汰方法，这是一种将KV缓存淘汰建模为切蛋糕问题的全新方案。
CAKE通过同时考量空间和时间维度的注意力动态评估各层的特定偏好，据此为各层分配合理的缓存大小，并以级联方式管理内存约束。这种方法可实现缓存分配的全局视角，在维持内存预算的同时，面向不同的注意力机制自适应分配资源。
CAKE还采用了一种新型淘汰指标，该指标考虑了词元重要性随时间的变化，解决了现有方法忽略时间动态性的缺陷。
在LongBench和NeedleBench上开展的综合实验表明，仅使用3.2%的KV缓存时，CAKE即可维持模型性能，且在各类模型和内存约束下的表现始终优于当前基线方法，在低内存场景下优势尤为明显。此外，当使用FlashAttention-2处理128K词元的上下文时，与全缓存相比，CAKE的解码延迟加速超过10倍。本文代码可从https://github.com/antgroup/cakekv获取。
notes: 论文核心聚焦 LLM 推理阶段的 KV Cache 驱逐与分配优化，属于上下文与缓存优化方向。

title: Tell me Habibi, is it Real or Fake?
title_zh: 告诉我，Habibi，是真是假
abstract: Deepfake generation methods are evolving fast, making fake media harder to detect and raising serious societal concerns. Most deepfake detection and dataset creation research focuses on monolingual content, often overlooking the challenges of multilingual and code-switched speech, where multiple languages are mixed within the same discourse.
