abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）通常依赖人工设计的奖励函数，但这类函数难以精确定义，并且会导致奖励黑客和次优行为等问题。诸如逆向强化学习和基于偏好的强化学习等替代方法，试图从示范或偏好中推断代理奖励，但它们受到歧义性和分布失配的困扰。一种更直接的方法受模仿学习启发，通过利用专家示范来避免奖励建模。然而，现有大多数方法只在单个状态上对齐动作，无法捕捉长时域轨迹的一致性。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: MuxServe: Flexible Spatial-Temporal Multiplexing for Multiple LLM Serving
title_zh: MuxServe：面向多个大语言模型服务的灵活时空多路复用技术
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance, and organizations are racing to serve LLMs of varying sizes as endpoints for use-cases like chat, programming and search. However, efficiently serving multiple LLMs poses significant challenges for existing approaches due to varying popularity of LLMs. In the paper, we present MuxServe, a flexible spatial-temporal multiplexing system for efficient multiple LLM serving. The key insight behind is to colocate LLMs considering their popularity to multiplex memory resources, and leverage the characteristics of prefill and decoding phases to separate and flexibly colocate them to multiplex computation resources. MuxServe formally formulates the multiplexing problem, and proposes a novel placement algorithm and adaptive batch scheduling strategy to identify optimal colocations and maximize utilization. MuxServe designs a unified resource manager to enable flexible and efficient multiplexing. Evaluation results show that MuxServe can achieves up to $1.8\times$ higher throughput or processes $2.9\times$ more requests within $99\%$ SLO attainment. The code is available at: https://github.com/hao-ai-lab/MuxServe.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）已展现出卓越性能，各机构正竞相将不同规模的大语言模型作为服务端点，支撑聊天、编程、搜索等各类应用场景。然而，由于不同大语言模型的流行度存在差异，现有方法在高效服务多个大语言模型时面临严峻挑战。本文提出MuxServe，这是一款用于高效多LLM服务的灵活时空复用系统。其核心思路是结合不同LLM的流行度对其进行共部署以复用内存资源，同时利用预填充和解码阶段的特性将二者分离并灵活共部署，从而复用计算资源。MuxServe对复用问题进行了形式化建模，提出了一种新型放置算法和自适应批处理调度策略，以确定最优共部署方案、最大化资源利用率。MuxServe设计了统一资源管理器，可实现灵活高效的复用。评估结果表明，MuxServe的吞吐量最高可提升1.8倍，或是在满足99%服务级别目标（SLO）的前提下多处理2.9倍的请求。代码可从以下地址获取：https://github.com/hao-ai-lab/MuxServe。
notes: 调度专项得分=21；命中组=muxserve, llm_serving, multi_tenant；augment_batch=20260408-scheduling；augment_score=21

title: DualMPNN: Harnessing Structural Alignments for High-Recovery Inverse Protein Folding
title_zh: DualMPNN：利用结构对齐实现高回收率逆蛋白折叠
abstract: Inverse protein folding addresses the challenge of designing amino acid sequences that fold into a predetermined tertiary structure, bridging geometric and evolutionary constraints to advance protein engineering.  Inspired by the pivotal role of multiple sequence alignments (MSAs) in structure prediction models like AlphaFold, we hypothesize that structural alignments can provide an informative prior for inverse folding. In this study, we introduce DualMPNN, a dual-stream message passing neural network that leverages structurally homologous templates to guide amino acid sequence design of predefined query structures. DualMPNN processes the query and template proteins via two interactive branches, coupled through alignment-aware cross-stream attention mechanisms that enable exchange of geometric and co-evolutionary signals. Comprehensive evaluations across on CATH 4.2, TS50 and T500 benchmarks demonstrate DualMPNN achieves state-of-the-art recovery rates of 65.51\%, 70.99\%, and 70.37\%, significantly outperforming base model ProteinMPNN by 15.64\%, 16.56\%, 12.29\%, respectively. Further template quality analysis and structural foldability assessment underscore the value of structural alignment priors for protein design.
abstract_zh: 逆蛋白折叠旨在解决设计能够折叠成预定三级结构的氨基酸序列这一挑战，通过结合几何约束与进化约束来推动蛋白质工程的发展。受多序列比对（MSA）在 AlphaFold 等结构预测模型中关键作用的启发，我们提出假设：结构比对能够为逆折叠提供有信息量的先验。在本研究中，我们提出 DualMPNN，这是一种双流消息传递神经网络，利用结构同源模板来指导对预定义查询结构的氨基酸序列设计。DualMPNN 通过两个交互分支处理查询蛋白和模板蛋白，并借助具备比对感知能力的跨流注意力机制进行耦合，从而实现几何信号与共进化信号的交换。在 CATH 4.2、TS50 和 T500 基准上的全面评估表明，DualMPNN 分别实现了 65.51%、70.99% 和 70.37% 的最先进恢复率，相比基础模型 ProteinMPNN 分别显著提高了 15.64%、16.56% 和 12.29%。进一步的模板质量分析和结构可折叠性评估进一步证明了结构比对先验对蛋白质设计的价值。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Randomization Boosts KV Caching, Learning Balances Query Load: A Joint Perspective
title_zh: 随机化提升 KV 缓存，学习在联合视角下平衡查询负载
abstract:
KV caching is a fundamental technique for accelerating Large Language Model (LLM) inference by reusing key-value (KV) pairs from previous queries, but its effectiveness under limited memory is highly sensitive to the eviction policy. 
The default Least Recently Used (LRU) eviction algorithm struggles with dynamic online query arrivals, especially in multi-LLM serving scenarios, where balancing query load across workers and maximizing cache hit rate of each worker are inherently conflicting objectives.
We give the first unified mathematical model that captures the core trade-offs between KV cache eviction and query routing.
Our analysis reveals the theoretical limitations of existing methods and leads to principled algorithms that integrate provably competitive randomized KV cache eviction with learning-based methods to adaptively route queries with evolving patterns, thus balancing query load and cache hit rate. 
Our theoretical results are validated by extensive experiments across 4 benchmarks and 3 prefix-sharing settings, demonstrating improvements of up to **6.92$\times$** in cache hit rate, **11.96$\times$** reduction in latency, **14.06$\times$** reduction in time-to-first-token (TTFT), and **77.4%** increase in throughput over the state-of-the-art methods.
Our code is available at https://github.com/fzwark/KVRouting.
abstract_zh: KV缓存是通过复用先前查询的键值（KV）对来加速大语言模型（LLM）推理的基础技术，但在内存有限的场景下，其有效性对驱逐策略高度敏感。默认的最近最少使用（LRU）驱逐算法难以应对动态到达的在线查询，尤其是在多LLM服务场景中，平衡各工作节点的查询负载与最大化每个工作节点的缓存命中率本质上是相互冲突的目标。我们首次提出了统一的数学模型，可刻画KV缓存驱逐与查询路由之间的核心权衡关系。我们的分析揭示了现有方法的理论局限性，并基于此设计了原则性算法，该算法将具备可证明竞争力的随机KV缓存驱逐策略与基于学习的方法相结合，可对模式持续演变的查询进行自适应路由，从而实现查询负载与缓存命中率的平衡。我们的理论结果通过覆盖4个基准测试、3种前缀共享设置的大量实验得到验证，实验结果表明，与现有最优方法相比，本方法的缓存命中率最高提升6.92倍，延迟最高降低11.96倍，首令牌生成时间（TTFT）最高降低14.06倍，吞吐量提升达77.4%。我们的代码可从https://github.com/fzwark/KVRouting获取。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: ActiveDPO: Active Direct Preference Optimization for Sample-Efficient Alignment
title_zh: ActiveDPO：面向样本高效对齐的主动直接偏好优化
abstract: The recent success in using human preferences to align large language models (LLMs) has significantly improved their performance in various downstream tasks, such as question answering, mathematical reasoning, and code generation. However, achieving effective LLM alignment depends on high-quality human preference datasets. Collecting these datasets requires human preference annotation, which is costly and resource-intensive, necessitating efficient active data selection methods. Existing methods either lack a strong theoretical foundation or depend on restrictive reward function assumptions, such as linear latent reward function. To this end, we propose an algorithm, ActiveDPO, that uses a theoretically grounded data selection criterion for non-linear reward functions while directly leveraging the LLM itself to parameterize the reward model that is used for active data selection. As a result, ActiveDPO explicitly accounts for the influence of LLM on data selection, unlike methods that select the data without considering the LLM that is being aligned, thereby leading to more effective and efficient data collection. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that ActiveDPO outperforms existing methods across various models and real-life preference datasets.
abstract_zh: 近年来，利用人类偏好来对齐大语言模型（LLM）的成功，显著提升了它们在各种下游任务中的性能，例如问答、数学推理和代码生成。然而，实现有效的 LLM 对齐依赖于高质量的人类偏好数据集。收集这些数据集需要进行人类偏好标注，这一过程成本高昂且资源密集，因此需要高效的主动数据选择方法。现有方法要么缺乏坚实的理论基础，要么依赖于受限的奖励函数假设，例如线性的潜在奖励函数。为此，我们提出了一种算法 ActiveDPO，它针对非线性奖励函数使用具有理论依据的数据选择准则，同时直接利用 LLM 本身对用于主动数据选择的奖励模型进行参数化。因此，与那些在选择数据时不考虑正在被对齐的 LLM 的方法不同，ActiveDPO 明确考虑了 LLM 对数据选择的影响，从而带来更有效率且更高效的数据收集。我们的大量实验表明，ActiveDPO 在各种模型和真实偏好数据集上都优于现有方法。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: AOR: Anatomical Ontology-Guided Reasoning for Medical Large Multimodal Model in Chest X-Ray Interpretation
title_zh: AOR：在胸部X光解读中用于医学大规模多模态模型的解剖本体引导推理
abstract: Chest X-rays (CXRs) are the most frequently performed imaging examinations in clinical settings. Recent advancements in Medical Large Multimodal Models (MLMMs) have enabled automated CXR interpretation, improving diagnostic accuracy and efficiency. However, despite their strong visual understanding, current MLMMs still face two major challenges: (1) insufficient region-level understanding and interaction, and (2) limited accuracy and interpretability due to single-step prediction. In this paper, we address these challenges by empowering MLMMs with anatomy-centric reasoning capabilities to enhance their interactivity and explainability. Specifically, we propose an Anatomical Ontology-Guided Reasoning (AOR) framework that accommodates both textual and optional visual prompts, centered on region-level information to enable multimodal multi-step reasoning. We also develop AOR-Instruction, a large instruction dataset for MLMMs training, under the guidance of expert physicians. Our experiments demonstrate AOR's superior performance in both Visual Question Answering (VQA) and report generation tasks. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/Liqq1/AOR.
abstract_zh: 胸部X线片（CXR）是临床环境中最常进行的影像学检查。近年来，医学大规模多模态模型（MLMM）的进展使自动化胸部X线片解读成为可能，从而提高了诊断准确性和效率。然而，尽管当前的MLMM具有较强的视觉理解能力，它们仍面临两个主要挑战：（1）区域级理解与交互不足；（2）由于单步预测而导致准确性和可解释性有限。在本文中，我们通过赋予MLMM以解剖学中心的推理能力来应对这些挑战，从而增强其交互性和可解释性。具体而言，我们提出了解剖本体引导推理（AOR）框架，该框架兼容文本提示和可选的视觉提示，并以区域级信息为中心，实现多模态多步推理。我们还在专家医生的指导下，构建了用于MLMM训练的大规模指令数据集AOR-Instruction。实验结果表明，AOR在视觉问答（VQA）和报告生成任务中均表现出优越性能。代码和数据可在以下地址获取：https://github.com/Liqq1/AOR。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: When majority rules, minority loses: bias amplification of gradient descent
title_zh: 多数规则时少数受损：梯度下降的偏差放大
abstract: Despite growing empirical evidence of bias amplification in machine learning, its theoretical foundations remain poorly understood. We develop a formal framework for majority-minority learning tasks, showing how standard training can favor majority groups and produce stereotypical predictors that neglect minority-specific features. Assuming population and variance imbalance, our analysis reveals three key findings: (i) the close proximity between "full-data" and stereotypical predictors, (ii) the dominance of a region where training the entire model tends to merely learn the majority traits, and (iii) a lower bound on the additional training required. Our results are illustrated through experiments in deep learning for tabular and image classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器学习中偏见放大的经验性证据日益增多，但其理论基础仍然知之甚少。我们为多数群体—少数群体学习任务建立了一个形式化框架，展示了标准训练如何偏向多数群体，并产生忽视少数群体特有特征的刻板化预测器。在假设总体分布不平衡和方差不平衡的条件下，我们的分析揭示了三个关键发现：（i）“全数据”预测器与刻板化预测器之间的高度接近性；（ii）在一个占主导地位的区域内，训练整个模型往往只会学习多数群体特征；（iii）所需额外训练量的一个下界。我们通过深度学习在表格数据和图像分类任务中的实验对这些结果进行了说明。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: La-Proteina: Atomistic Protein Generation via Partially Latent Flow Matching
title_zh: La-Proteina：通过部分潜变量流匹配实现原子级蛋白质生成
abstract: Recently, many generative models for de novo protein structure design have emerged. Yet, only few tackle the difficult task of directly generating fully atomistic structures jointly with the underlying amino acid sequence. This is challenging, for instance, because the model must reason over side chains that change in length during generation. We introduce La-Proteina for atomistic protein design based on a novel partially latent protein representation: coarse backbone structure is modeled explicitly, while sequence and atomistic details are captured via per-residue latent variables of fixed dimensionality, thereby effectively side-stepping challenges of explicit side-chain representations. Flow matching in this partially latent space then models the joint distribution over sequences and full-atom structures. La-Proteina achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple generation benchmarks, including all-atom co-designability, diversity, and structural validity, as confirmed through detailed structural analyses and evaluations. Notably, La-Proteina also surpasses previous models in atomistic motif scaffolding performance, unlocking critical atomistic structure-conditioned protein design tasks. Moreover, La-Proteina is able to generate co-designable proteins of up to 800 residues, a regime where most baselines collapse and fail to produce valid samples, demonstrating La-Proteina's scalability and robustness.
abstract_zh: 近年来，许多用于从头蛋白质结构设计的生成模型不断涌现。然而，只有少数方法处理了这样一项困难任务：直接生成完整的原子级结构，并同时生成其对应的氨基酸序列。这一任务具有挑战性，例如因为模型必须对在生成过程中长度会发生变化的侧链进行推理。我们提出了用于原子级蛋白质设计的 La-Proteina，其基于一种新的部分潜在蛋白质表示：粗粒度的骨架结构被显式建模，而序列和原子级细节则通过每个残基固定维度的潜变量来表征，从而有效规避了显式侧链表示所带来的挑战。随后，在这一部分潜在空间中的流匹配对序列与全原子结构的联合分布进行建模。La-Proteina 在多个生成基准上达到了当前最优性能，包括全原子协同可设计性、多样性和结构有效性，并通过详细的结构分析与评估得到了验证。值得注意的是，La-Proteina 在原子级基序支架构建性能上也超过了以往模型，从而解锁了关键的、以原子级结构为条件的蛋白质设计任务。此外，La-Proteina 能够生成长度高达 800 个残基且具备协同可设计性的蛋白质；在这一区间内，大多数基线方法都会崩溃并无法产生有效样本，这表明 La-Proteina 具有良好的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: EasySpec: Layer-Parallel Speculative Decoding for Efficient Multi-GPU Utilization
title_zh: EasySpec：面向高效多 GPU 利用的层并行推测解码
abstract: Speculative decoding is an effective and lossless method for Large Language Model (LLM) inference acceleration. It employs a smaller model to generate a draft token sequence, which is then verified by the original base model. In multi-GPU systems, inference latency can be further reduced through tensor parallelism (TP), while the optimal TP size of the draft model is typically smaller than that of the base model, leading to GPU idling during the drafting stage. We observe that such inefficiency stems from the sequential execution of layers, which is seemingly natural but actually unnecessary. Therefore, we propose EasySpec, a layer-parallel speculation strategy that optimizes the efficiency of multi-GPU utilization. EasySpec breaks the inter-layer data dependencies in the draft model, enabling multiple layers to run simultaneously across multiple devices as ``fuzzy'' speculation. After each drafting-and-verification iteration, the draft model’s key-value cache is calibrated in a single forward pass, preventing long-term fuzzy-error accumulation at minimal additional latency. EasySpec is a training-free and plug-in method. We evaluated EasySpec on several mainstream open-source LLMs, using smaller versions of models from the same series as drafters. The results demonstrate that EasySpec can achieve a peak speedup of 4.17x compared to vanilla decoding, while preserving the original distributions of the base LLMs. Specifically, the drafting stage can be accelerated by up to 1.62x with a maximum speculation accuracy drop of only 7\%. The code is available at https://github.com/Yize-Wu/EasySpec.
abstract_zh: 推测解码是实现大语言模型（LLM）推理加速的一种有效无损方法，它利用更小的模型生成草稿令牌序列，再由原始基础模型对该序列进行验证。在多GPU系统中，可通过张量并行（TP）进一步降低推理延迟，但草稿模型的最优张量并行度通常小于基础模型的最优张量并行度，这会导致草稿生成阶段出现GPU空闲。我们观察到，这种效率低下问题的根源是层的顺序执行，这种执行方式看似理所当然，实则并非必要。因此，我们提出EasySpec，这是一种可优化多GPU利用效率的层并行推测策略。EasySpec打破了草稿模型的层间数据依赖，使得多层可以作为“模糊”推测任务在多台设备上同时运行。每次草稿生成与验证迭代完成后，草稿模型的键值缓存会通过单次前向传播进行校准，能够以极低的额外延迟避免模糊误差的长期累积。EasySpec是一种无需训练、可即插即用的方法。我们在多个主流开源大语言模型上对EasySpec进行了评估，采用同系列模型的更小版本作为草稿生成器。结果表明，与普通解码相比，EasySpec可实现最高4.17倍的加速比，同时能够保留基础大语言模型的原始输出分布。具体而言，草稿生成阶段最多可获得1.62倍的加速，而推测准确率的最大降幅仅为7%。相关代码可从https://github.com/Yize-Wu/EasySpec获取。
notes: ['论文主体是 LLM 推理加速中的 speculative decoding，并针对多 GPU 利用率做层并行调度优化。', '不属于算子与内核优化，摘要未涉及 kernel/operator 级实现或底层算子改写。']

title: End-to-End Probabilistic Framework for Learning with Hard Constraints
title_zh: 带硬约束学习的端到端概率框架
abstract: We present ProbHardE2E, a probabilistic forecasting framework that incorporates hard operational/physical constraints and provides uncertainty quantification. Our methodology uses a novel differentiable probabilistic projection layer (DPPL) that can be combined with a wide range of neural network architectures. DPPL allows the model to learn the system in an end-to-end manner, compared to other approaches where constraints are satisfied either through a post-processing step or at inference. ProbHardE2E optimizes a strictly proper scoring rule, without making any distributional assumptions on the target, which enables it to obtain robust distributional estimates (in contrast to existing approaches that generally optimize likelihood-based objectives, which can be biased by their distributional assumptions and model choices); and it can incorporate a range of non-linear constraints (increasing the power of modeling and flexibility). We apply ProbHardE2E in learning partial differential equations with uncertainty estimates and to probabilistic time-series forecasting, showcasing it as a broadly applicable general framework that connects these seemingly disparate domains.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ProbHardE2E，一种结合硬性操作/物理约束并提供不确定性量化的概率预测框架。我们的方法使用了一种新颖的可微概率投影层（DPPL），可与广泛的神经网络架构结合。与其他通过后处理步骤或在推断时满足约束的方法相比，DPPL 使模型能够以端到端的方式学习系统。ProbHardE2E 在不对目标作任何分布假设的情况下优化严格适定评分规则，这使其能够获得稳健的分布估计（相比之下，现有方法通常优化基于似然的目标，这可能受其分布假设和模型选择的偏置影响）；并且它能够纳入一系列非线性约束（从而增强建模能力和灵活性）。我们将 ProbHardE2E 应用于带有不确定性估计的偏微分方程学习以及概率时间序列预测，展示了它作为一个广泛适用的通用框架，连接了这些看似不同的领域。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: LookaheadKV: Fast and Accurate KV Cache Eviction by Glimpsing into the Future without Generation
title_zh: LookaheadKV：通过窥视未来而无需生成，实现快速且准确的KV缓存驱逐
abstract: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) rely on key–value (KV) caching to avoid redundant computation during autoregressive inference. While this mechanism greatly improves efficiency, the cache size grows linearly with the input sequence length, quickly becoming a bottleneck for long‑context tasks. Existing solutions mitigate this problem by evicting prompt KV that are deemed unimportant, guided by estimated importance scores. Notably, a recent line of work improves eviction quality by “glimpsing into the future”, in which a low‑cost draft generator first produces a surrogate response that mimics the target model's true response, which is subsequently used to estimate the importance scores of cached KV. In this paper, we propose LookaheadKV, a lightweight eviction framework that leverages the strength of surrogate future response without the need for costly draft generation. LookaheadKV augments transformer layers with parameter‑efficient modules trained to predict true importance scores with high accuracy. Our design ensures negligible runtime overhead comparable to existing inexpensive heuristics, while achieving accuracy superior to more costly approximation methods. Extensive experiments on long-context understanding benchmarks, across a wide range of models, demonstrate that our method not only outperform recent competitive baseline by long-context understanding tasks by $25$\%, but also reduces the eviction cost by up to $14.5$×, leading to significantly faster time-to-first-token (TTFT).
abstract_zh: 基于Transformer的大语言模型依赖键值缓存来避免自回归推理过程中的冗余计算。尽管该机制极大提升了推理效率，但缓存大小会随输入序列长度线性增长，很快会成为长上下文任务的性能瓶颈。现有解决方案通过驱逐被判定为不重要的提示键值缓存来缓解这一问题，驱逐操作由估算得到的重要性分数引导。值得注意的是，近期的一类研究通过前瞻未来提升了驱逐质量：这类方法先用低成本的草稿生成器生成一个模拟目标模型真实响应的代理响应，再利用该代理响应估算缓存键值的重要性分数。本文提出LookaheadKV，这是一种轻量级键值缓存驱逐框架，无需执行成本高昂的草稿生成，就能发挥代理未来响应的优势。LookaheadKV在Transformer层中加入参数高效模块，这类模块经过训练可高精度预测真实重要性分数。我们的设计保证了可忽略的运行时开销，与现有低成本启发式方法的开销相当，同时准确率优于成本更高的近似方法。针对长上下文理解基准、覆盖多种模型的大量实验表明，我们的方法不仅在长上下文理解任务上较近期的优秀基线性能高出25%，还将驱逐成本最高降低了14.5倍，进而显著缩短了首令牌生成时间。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: CLEAR: Calibrated Learning for Epistemic and Aleatoric Risk
title_zh: CLEAR：面向认识论和概率风险的校准学习
abstract: Existing methods typically address either aleatoric uncertainty due to measurement noise or epistemic uncertainty resulting from limited data, but not both in a balanced manner. We propose CLEAR, a calibration method with two distinct parameters, $\gamma_1$ and $\gamma_2$, to combine the two uncertainty components and improve the conditional coverage of predictive intervals for regression tasks. CLEAR is compatible with any pair of aleatoric and epistemic estimators; we show how it can be used with (i) quantile regression for aleatoric uncertainty and (ii) ensembles drawn from the Predictability–Computability–Stability (PCS) framework for epistemic uncertainty. Across 17 diverse real-world datasets, CLEAR achieves an average improvement of 28.2\% and 17.4\% in the interval width compared to the two individually calibrated baselines while maintaining nominal coverage. Similar improvements are observed when applying CLEAR to Deep Ensembles (epistemic) and Simultaneous Quantile Regression (aleatoric). The benefits are especially evident in scenarios dominated by high aleatoric or epistemic uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 现有方法通常只处理由测量噪声引起的偶然不确定性，或由数据有限导致的认知不确定性中的一种，而不能以均衡的方式同时处理两者。我们提出了 CLEAR，这是一种具有两个不同参数 $\gamma_1$ 和 $\gamma_2$ 的校准方法，用于结合这两种不确定性成分，并改进回归任务中预测区间的条件覆盖率。CLEAR 与任意一对偶然不确定性和认知不确定性估计器兼容；我们展示了它如何与 (i) 用于偶然不确定性的分位数回归，以及 (ii) 来自 Predictability–Computability–Stability（PCS）框架、用于认知不确定性的集成方法结合使用。在 17 个多样化的真实世界数据集上，CLEAR 在保持名义覆盖率的同时，相比两个分别独立校准的基线，在区间宽度上平均分别提升了 28.2% 和 17.4%。当将 CLEAR 应用于深度集成（认知不确定性）和同步分位数回归（偶然不确定性）时，也观察到了类似的改进。在高偶然不确定性或高认知不确定性占主导的场景中，这些收益尤为明显。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: AdaLRS: Loss-Guided Adaptive Learning Rate Search for Efficient Foundation Model Pretraining
title_zh: AdaLRS：面向高效基础模型预训练的基于损失引导的自适应学习率搜索
abstract:
Learning rate is widely regarded as crucial for effective foundation model pretraining.
Recent research explores and demonstrates the transferability of learning rate configurations across varying model and dataset sizes, etc. 
Nevertheless, these approaches are constrained to specific training scenarios and typically necessitate extensive hyperparameter tuning on proxy models.
In this work, we propose \textbf{AdaLRS}, a plug-in-and-play adaptive learning rate search algorithm that conducts online optimal learning rate search via optimizing loss descent velocities.
We provide theoretical and experimental analyzes to show that foundation model pretraining loss and its descent velocity are both convex and share the same optimal learning rate. 
Relying solely on training loss dynamics, AdaLRS involves few extra computations to guide the search process, and its convergence is guaranteed via theoretical analysis. 
Experiments on both LLM and VLM pretraining show that AdaLRS adjusts suboptimal learning rates to the neighborhood of optimum with marked efficiency and effectiveness, with model performance improved accordingly. 
We also show the robust generalizability of AdaLRS across varying training scenarios, such as different model sizes, training paradigms, base learning rate scheduler choices, and hyperparameter settings.
abstract_zh: AdaLRS 是一个即插即用的自适应学习率搜索算法，通过优化损失下降速度在线寻找最优学习率。我们从理论和实验上分析，基础模型预训练的损失与其下降速度都具有凸性，且共享同一个最优学习率。AdaLRS 仅依赖训练损失的动态特征，只需少量额外计算即可引导搜索过程，并通过理论分析保证收敛。无论是大型语言模型（LLM）还是视觉语言模型（VLM）预训练实验证明，AdaLRS 能有效地把原本次优的学习率调整到最优附近，从而提升模型性能。同时，我们也展示了 AdaLRS 在不同模型规模、训练范式、底层学习率调度策略和超参数设置等多种训练场景下具备稳健的泛化能力。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Leveraging Explanation to Improve Generalization of Meta Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 利用解释提升元强化学习的泛化能力
abstract: A common and effective human strategy to improve a poor outcome is to first identify prior experiences most relevant to the outcome and then focus on learning from those experiences. This paper investigates whether this human strategy can improve generalization of meta-reinforcement learning (MRL). MRL learns a meta-prior from a set of training tasks such that the meta-prior can adapt to new tasks in a distribution. However, the meta-prior usually has imbalanced generalization, i.e., it adapts well to some tasks but adapts poorly to others. We propose a two-stage approach to improve generalization. The first stage identifies "critical" training tasks that are most relevant to achieve good performance on the poorly adapted tasks. The second stage improves generalization by encouraging the meta-prior to pay more attention to the critical tasks. We use conditional mutual information to mathematically formalize the notion of "paying more attention". We formulate a bilevel optimization problem to maximize the conditional mutual information by augmenting the critical tasks and propose an algorithm to solve the bilevel optimization problem. We theoretically guarantee that (1) the algorithm converges at the rate of $O(1/\sqrt{K})$ and (2) the generalization improves after the task augmentation. We use two real-world experiments, two MuJoCo experiments, and a Meta-World experiment to validate the algorithm.
abstract_zh: 一种常见且有效的人类策略是：当结果不理想时，先识别与该结果最相关的既往经验，再重点从这些经验中学习。本文研究这种人类策略能否改善元强化学习（MRL）的泛化能力。MRL 从一组训练任务中学习一个元先验，使其能够适应某一分布中的新任务。然而，元先验通常存在泛化不平衡的问题，即它对某些任务适应良好，但对另一些任务适应较差。我们提出一种两阶段方法来改善泛化。第一阶段识别那些对于在适应较差的任务上取得良好性能最相关的“关键”训练任务。第二阶段通过鼓励元先验更多关注这些关键任务来提升泛化能力。我们使用条件互信息从数学上形式化“更多关注”这一概念。我们将通过增强关键任务来最大化条件互信息的问题表述为一个双层优化问题，并提出了一种求解该双层优化问题的算法。我们从理论上保证：(1) 该算法以 $O(1/\sqrt{K})$ 的速率收敛；(2) 在任务增强之后，泛化性能得到提升。我们通过两个真实世界实验、两个 MuJoCo 实验以及一个 Meta-World 实验来验证该算法。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Transcending Cost-Quality Tradeoff in Agent Serving via Session-Awareness
title_zh: 通过会话感知突破智能体服务中的成本-质量权衡
abstract:
Large Language Model (LLM) agents are capable of task execution across various domains by autonomously interacting with environments and refining LLM responses based on feedback.
However, existing model serving systems are not optimized for the unique demands of serving agents. Compared to classic model serving, agent serving has different characteristics:
predictable request pattern, increasing quality requirement, and unique prompt formatting. We identify a key problem for agent serving: LLM serving systems lack session-awareness. They neither perform effective KV cache management nor precisely select the cheapest yet competent model in each round.
This leads to a cost-quality tradeoff, and we identify an opportunity to surpass it in an agent serving system.

To this end, we introduce AgServe for AGile AGent SERVing.
AgServe features a session-aware server that boosts KV cache reuse via Estimated-Time-of-Arrival-based eviction and in-place positional embedding calibration, a quality-aware client that performs session-aware model cascading through real-time quality assessment, and a dynamic resource scheduler that maximizes GPU utilization. 
With AgServe, we allow agents to select and upgrade models during the session lifetime, and to achieve similar quality at much lower costs, effectively transcending the tradeoff. Extensive experiments on real testbeds demonstrate that AgServe (1) achieves comparable response quality to GPT-4o at a 16.5\% cost. (2) delivers 1.8$\times$ improvement in quality relative to the tradeoff curve.
abstract_zh:
大语言模型（LLM）智能体可通过自主与环境交互、基于反馈优化LLM响应，实现跨多领域的任务执行。然而现有模型服务系统并未针对智能体服务的独特需求开展优化。与传统模型服务相比，智能体服务具有不同的特征：可预测的请求模式、不断提升的质量要求以及独特的提示词格式。我们发现智能体服务存在一个核心问题：LLM服务系统缺乏会话感知能力，既无法实现有效的KV缓存管理，也无法在每一轮请求中精准选择成本最低且能力适配的模型。这会导致成本-质量权衡问题，而我们发现在智能体服务系统中存在突破这一权衡的机会。
为此，我们提出了面向敏捷智能体服务的AgServe系统。AgServe具备三大核心特性：具备会话感知能力的服务端，通过基于预计到达时间的缓存淘汰机制和原位位置嵌入校准提升KV缓存复用率；具备质量感知能力的客户端，通过实时质量评估实现会话感知的模型级联；以及可最大化GPU利用率的动态资源调度器。
借助AgServe，我们支持智能体在会话生命周期内选择和升级模型，能够以大幅降低的成本达到相近的质量，有效突破了上述权衡。在真实测试平台上开展的大量实验表明，AgServe（1）仅需16.5%的成本即可达到与GPT-4o相当的响应质量；（2）相较于现有权衡曲线，质量提升了1.8倍。
notes: 调度专项得分=7；命中组=llm_serving；augment_batch=20260402-scheduling；augment_score=7

title: RocketKV: Accelerating Long-Context LLM Inference via Two-Stage KV Cache Compression
title_zh: RocketKV：通过两阶段 KV 缓存压缩加速长上下文大语言模型推理
abstract: Transformer-based Large Language Models rely critically on the KV cache to efficiently handle extended contexts during the decode phase. Yet, the size of the KV cache grows proportionally with the input length, burdening both memory bandwidth and capacity as decoding progresses. To address this challenge, we present RocketKV, a training-free KV cache compression strategy containing two consecutive stages. In the first stage, it performs coarse-grain permanent KV cache eviction on the input sequence tokens. In the second stage, it adopts a hybrid sparse attention method to conduct fine-grain top-k sparse attention, approximating the attention scores by leveraging both head and sequence dimensionality reductions. We show that RocketKV provides a compression ratio of up to 400×, end-to-end speedup of up to 3.7× as well as peak memory reduction of up to 32.6% in the decode phase on an NVIDIA A100 GPU compared to the full KV cache baseline, while achieving negligible accuracy loss on a variety of long-context tasks. We also propose a variant of RocketKV for multi-turn scenarios, which consistently outperforms other existing methods and achieves accuracy nearly on par with an oracle top-k attention scheme.
abstract_zh: 基于Transformer的大语言模型极为依赖KV缓存，以在解码阶段高效处理扩展上下文。然而，KV缓存的大小随输入长度成正比增长，随着解码进程推进，会对内存带宽和容量都造成负担。为应对这一挑战，我们提出RocketKV，这是一种包含两个连续阶段的免训练KV缓存压缩策略。在第一阶段，它对输入序列令牌执行粗粒度的KV缓存永久逐出。在第二阶段，它采用混合稀疏注意力方法开展细粒度top-k稀疏注意力，同时利用头维度降维和序列维度降维来近似计算注意力得分。我们的实验表明，与全KV缓存基线相比，在NVIDIA A100 GPU上运行时，RocketKV在解码阶段可实现最高400倍的压缩率、最高3.7倍的端到端加速比，且峰值内存最高降低32.6%，同时在各类长上下文任务上的准确率损失可忽略不计。我们还针对多轮场景提出了一种RocketKV变体，其表现始终优于其他现有方法，且准确率几乎与理想top-k注意力方案相当。
notes: 论文核心是长上下文 LLM 推理中的两阶段 KV cache 压缩与稀疏注意力加速，明显属于缓存/上下文优化，并直接作用于解码阶段推理效率；未见算子或内核级实现细节，故不标注算子与内核优化。

title: Evaluating Robustness of Monocular Depth Estimation with Procedural Scene Perturbations
title_zh: 使用程序化场景扰动评估单目深度估计的鲁棒性
abstract:
Recent years have witnessed substantial progress on monocular depth estimation, particularly as measured by the success of large models on standard benchmarks. However, performance on standard benchmarks does not offer a complete assessment, because most evaluate accuracy but not robustness. 
In this work, we introduce PDE (Procedural Depth Evaluation), a new benchmark which enables systematic evaluation of robustness to changes in 3D scene content.
PDE uses procedural generation to create 3D scenes that test robustness to various controlled perturbations, including object, camera, material and lighting changes. 
Our analysis yields interesting findings on what perturbations are challenging for state-of-the-art depth models, which we hope will inform further research. Code and data are available at https://github.com/princeton-vl/proc-depth-eval.
abstract_zh: 近年来单目深度估计取得了显著进展，尤其是在标准基准上大模型表现优异，但这些成绩多集中在准确性评估上，无法反映模型在鲁棒性方面的差异。为此我们提出 PDE（Procedural Depth Evaluation），一个新的基准，能够系统地评估模型对三维场景内容变化的鲁棒性。PDE 通过过程生成制作三维场景，设计了包括物体、摄像机、材质和光照等受控扰动，检验模型面对这些变化时的性能。基于该评估我们分析了当前最先进深度模型在哪些扰动类型下面临挑战，并希望相关结果能为后续研究指明方向。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: CosmoBench: A Multiscale, Multiview, Multitask Cosmology Benchmark for Geometric Deep Learning
title_zh: CosmoBench：面向几何深度学习的多尺度多视角多任务宇宙学基准
abstract: Cosmological simulations provide a wealth of data in the form of point clouds and directed trees. A crucial goal is to extract insights from this data that shed light on the nature and composition of the Universe. In this paper we introduce CosmoBench, a benchmark dataset curated from state-of-the-art cosmological simulations whose runs required more than 41 million core-hours and generated over two petabytes of data. CosmoBench is the largest dataset of its kind: it contains 34 thousand point clouds from simulations of dark matter halos and galaxies at three different length scales, as well as 25 thousand directed trees that record the formation history of halos on two different time scales. The data in CosmoBench can be used for multiple tasks---to predict cosmological parameters from point clouds and merger trees, to predict the velocities of individual halos and galaxies from their collective positions, and to reconstruct merger trees on finer time scales from those on coarser time scales. We provide multiple baselines on these tasks, some based on established approaches from cosmological modeling and others rooted in machine learning. For the latter, we study different approaches---from simple linear models that are minimally constrained by symmetries to much larger and more computationally-demanding models in deep learning, such as graph neural networks. We find that least-squares fits with a handful of invariant features sometimes outperform deep architectures with many more parameters and far longer training times. Still there remains tremendous potential to improve these baselines by combining machine learning and cosmological modeling in a more principled way, one that fully exploits the structure in the data. CosmoBench sets the stage for bridging cosmology and geometric deep learning at scale. We invite the community to push the frontier of scientific discovery by engaging with this challenging, high-impact dataset. The data and code are available at [this URL](https://cosmobench.streamlit.app/).
abstract_zh: 宇宙学模拟以点云和有向树的形式提供了海量数据。一个关键目标是从这些数据中提取洞见，以揭示宇宙的本质和组成。本文介绍了 CosmoBench，这是一个从最先进的宇宙学模拟中整理而成的基准数据集，这些模拟运行耗费了超过 4100 万核小时，并生成了超过 2 PB 的数据。CosmoBench 是同类数据集中规模最大的：它包含 3.4 万个点云，这些点云来自三个不同长度尺度上的暗物质晕和星系模拟；还包含 2.5 万棵有向树，用于记录两种不同时间尺度上的晕形成历史。CosmoBench 中的数据可用于多项任务，即根据点云和并合树预测宇宙学参数，根据晕和星系的群体位置预测单个晕和星系的速度，以及根据较粗时间尺度上的并合树重建较细时间尺度上的并合树。我们为这些任务提供了多种基线方法，其中一些基于宇宙学建模中的既有方法，另一些则植根于机器学习。对于后者，我们研究了不同的方法，从仅受对称性极少约束的简单线性模型，到规模大得多、计算需求也高得多的深度学习模型，例如图神经网络。我们发现，仅使用少量不变特征的最小二乘拟合有时优于参数更多且训练时间长得多的深层架构。尽管如此，仍然有巨大的潜力通过以更具原则性的方式结合机器学习与宇宙学建模来改进这些基线，从而充分利用数据中的结构。CosmoBench 为大规模连接宇宙学与几何深度学习奠定了基础。我们邀请社区通过参与这一具有挑战性且高影响力的数据集，推动科学发现的前沿。数据和代码可在 [this URL](https://cosmobench.streamlit.app/) 获取。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Convex Efficient Coding
title_zh: 凸高效编码
abstract: Why do neurons encode information the way they do? Normative answers to this question model neural activity as the solution to an optimisation problem; for example, the celebrated efficient coding hypothesis frames neural activity as the optimal encoding of information under efficiency constraints. Successful normative theories have varied dramatically in complexity, from simple linear models (Atick & Redlich, 1990), to complex deep neural networks (Lindsay, 2021). What complex models gain in flexibility, they lose in tractability and often understandability. Here, we split the difference by constructing a set of tractable but flexible normative representational theories. Instead of optimising the neural activities directly, following (Sengupta et al. 2018), we instead optimise the representational similarity, a matrix formed from the dot products of each pair of neural responses. Using this, we show that a large family of interesting optimisation problems are convex. This includes problems corresponding to linear and some non-linear neural networks, and problems from the literature not previously recognised as convex such as modified versions of semi-nonnegative matrix factorisation or nonnegative sparse coding. We put these findings to work in two ways. First, we extend previous results on modularity and mixed selectivity in neural activity; in so doing we provide the first necessary and sufficient identifiability result for a form of semi-nonnegative matrix factorisations. Second, we seek to understand the meaningfulness of single neural tuning curves as compared to neural representations. In particular we derive an identifiability result stating that, for an optimal representational similarity matrix, if neural tunings are `different enough' then they are uniquely linked to the optimal representational similarity, partially justifying the use of single neuron tuning analysis in neuroscience. In sum, we identify an interesting space of convex problems, and use that to derive neural coding results.
abstract_zh: 为什么神经元会以这样的方式编码信息？对这一问题的规范性回答通常将神经活动建模为某个优化问题的解；例如，著名的高效编码假说将神经活动表述为在效率约束下对信息进行最优编码。成功的规范性理论在复杂度上差异巨大，从简单的线性模型（Atick & Redlich, 1990）到复杂的深度神经网络（Lindsay, 2021）不等。复杂模型在灵活性上的收获，往往以可处理性以及通常还有可理解性的损失为代价。本文通过构建一组既可处理又灵活的规范性表征理论，在两者之间取得平衡。我们不再直接优化神经活动，而是沿着（Sengupta et al. 2018）的思路，转而优化表征相似性，即由每一对神经响应的点积构成的矩阵。基于此，我们表明，一大类有趣的优化问题都是凸的。这包括对应于线性和某些非线性神经网络的问题，也包括文献中此前未被识别为凸的问题，例如半非负矩阵分解的修正版本或非负稀疏编码。我们将这些发现用于两个方面。第一，我们扩展了先前关于神经活动中的模块化和混合选择性的结果；在此过程中，我们为一种半非负矩阵分解形式给出了首个充要的可辨识性结果。第二，我们试图理解单个神经元调谐曲线相较于神经表征的意义。具体而言，我们推导出一个可辨识性结果，表明对于最优表征相似性矩阵，如果神经调谐“足够不同”，那么它们就与最优表征相似性唯一对应，这在一定程度上为神经科学中对单个神经元调谐的分析提供了依据。总之，我们识别出了一类有趣的凸问题，并据此导出了关于神经编码的结果。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Derandomized Online-to-Non-convex Conversion for Stochastic Weakly Convex Optimization
title_zh: 弱凸随机优化中的去随机在线到非凸转换
abstract: Online-to-non-convex conversion (O2NC) is an online updates learning framework for producing Goldstein $(\delta,\epsilon)$-stationary points of non-smooth non-convex functions with optimal oracle complexity $\mathcal{O}(\delta^{-1} \epsilon^{-3})$. Subject to auxiliary \emph{random interpolation or scaling}, O2NC recapitulates the stochastic gradient descent with momentum (SGDM) algorithm popularly used for training neural networks. Randomization, however, introduces deviations from practical SGDM. So a natural question arises: Can we derandomize O2NC to achieve the same optimal guarantees while resembling SGDM? On the negative side, the general answer is \emph{no} due to the impossibility results of~\citet{jordan23deterministic}, showing that no dimension-free rate can be achieved by deterministic algorithms. On the positive side, as the primary contribution of the present work, we show that O2NC can be naturally derandomized for \emph{weakly convex} functions. Remarkably, our deterministic algorithm converges at an optimal rate as long as the weak convexity parameter is no larger than $\mathcal{O}(\delta^{-1}\epsilon^{-1})$. In other words, the stronger stationarity is expected, the higher non-convexity can be tolerated by our optimizer. Additionally, we develop a periodically restarted variant of our method to allow for more progressive update when the iterates are far from stationary. The resulting algorithm, which corresponds to a momentum-restarted version of SGDM, has been empirically shown to be effective and efficient for training ResNet and ViT networks.
abstract_zh: 在线到非凸转换（O2NC）是一种基于在线更新的学习框架，用于在非光滑非凸函数上产生 Goldstein $(\delta,\epsilon)$-驻点，并具有最优的预言机复杂度 $\mathcal{O}(\delta^{-1} \epsilon^{-3})$。在附加的随机插值或缩放条件下，O2NC 可重现广泛用于训练神经网络的带动量随机梯度下降（SGDM）算法。然而，随机化会引入与实际 SGDM 的偏差。因此，一个自然的问题是：能否将 O2NC 去随机化，在保持同样最优保证的同时，又与 SGDM 更相似？从负面来看，由于 \citet{jordan23deterministic} 的不可能性结果表明确定性算法无法实现与维度无关的收敛速率，因此一般情形下答案是否定的。从正面来看，作为本文的主要贡献，我们表明对于弱凸函数，O2NC 可以自然地实现去随机化。值得注意的是，只要弱凸参数不超过 $\mathcal{O}(\delta^{-1}\epsilon^{-1})$，我们的确定性算法就能以最优速率收敛。换言之，所期望的驻性越强，我们的优化器所能容忍的非凸性就越高。此外，我们还提出了该方法的周期性重启变体，以便在迭代点远离驻点时实现更渐进的更新。所得算法对应于 SGDM 的一种带动量重启版本，实验表明其在训练 ResNet 和 ViT 网络时是有效且高效的。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: ArtVIP: Articulated Digital Assets of Visual Realism, Modular Interaction, and Physical Fidelity for Robot Learning
title_zh: ArtVIP：用于机器人学习的视觉写实、模块化交互与物理保真度的关节化数字资产
abstract: Robot learning increasingly relies on simulation to advance complex ability such as dexterous manipulations and precise interactions, necessitating high-quality digital assets to bridge the sim-to-real gap. However, existing open-source articulated object datasets for simulation are limited by insufficient visual realism and low physical fidelity, which hinder their utility for training models mastering robotic tasks in real world. To address these challenges, we introduce ArtVIP, a comprehensive open-source dataset comprising high-quality digital-twin articulated objects, accompanied by indoor-scene assets.Crafted by professional 3D modelers adhering to unified standards, ArtVIP ensures visual realism through precise geometric meshes and high-resolution textures, and physical fidelity is achieved via fine-tuned dynamic parameters. Meanwhile, the dataset pioneers embedded modular interaction behaviors within assets and pixel-level affordance annotations. Feature-map visualization and optical motion capture are employed to quantitatively demonstrate ArtVIP's visual and physical fidelity, with its applicability validated across imitation learning and reinforcement learning experiments. Provided in USD format with detailed production guidelines, ArtVIP is fully open-source, benefiting the research community and advancing robot learning research.
abstract_zh: 机器人学习日益依赖仿真来推进诸如灵巧操作和精确交互等复杂能力，这就需要高质量的数字资产来弥合仿真到现实的差距。然而，现有面向仿真的开源可动对象数据集受限于视觉真实感不足和物理保真度低，从而妨碍了其在训练能够掌握现实世界机器人任务的模型中的效用。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了 ArtVIP，这是一个全面的开源数据集，包含高质量的数字孪生可动对象，并配套提供室内场景资产。ArtVIP 由专业 3D 建模师按照统一标准制作，通过精确的几何网格和高分辨率纹理确保视觉真实感，并通过精细调校的动力学参数实现物理保真度。同时，该数据集率先在资产中嵌入模块化交互行为和像素级可供性标注。我们采用特征图可视化和光学动作捕捉对 ArtVIP 的视觉与物理保真度进行定量展示，并通过模仿学习和强化学习实验验证其适用性。ArtVIP 以 USD 格式提供，并附有详细的制作指南，且完全开源，从而惠及研究社区并推动机器人学习研究的发展。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Dialogue Without Limits: Constant-Sized KV Caches for Extended Response in LLMs
title_zh: 具有固定大小 KV 缓存的对话系统：为大型语言模型实现超长响应
abstract:
Autoregressive Transformers rely on Key-Value (KV) caching to accelerate inference. However, the linear growth of the KV cache with context length leads to excessive memory consumption and bandwidth constraints. Existing methods drop distant tokens or compress states in a lossy manner, sacrificing accuracy by discarding vital context or introducing bias.

We propose ${MorphKV}$, an inference-time technique that maintains a constant-sized KV cache while preserving accuracy. MorphKV balances long-range dependencies and local coherence during text generation. It eliminates early-token bias while retaining high-fidelity context by adaptively ranking tokens through correlation-aware selection. Unlike heuristic retention or lossy compression, MorphKV iteratively refines the KV cache via lightweight updates guided by attention patterns of recent tokens. This approach captures inter-token correlation with greater accuracy, which is crucial for tasks like content creation and code generation. Our studies on long-response tasks show 52.9\% memory savings and 18.2\% higher accuracy on average compared to state-of-the-art prior works, enabling efficient deployment.
abstract_zh:
自回归Transformer依赖键值（KV）缓存来加速推理。然而，KV缓存随上下文长度线性增长会导致内存消耗过高以及带宽受限。现有方法要么丢弃远期令牌，要么以有损方式压缩状态，会因丢弃重要上下文或引入偏差而牺牲准确率。
我们提出MorphKV，这是一种推理时技术，可在保持准确率的同时维持大小恒定的KV缓存。MorphKV在文本生成过程中平衡长距离依赖与局部连贯性，通过相关性感知选择对令牌进行自适应排序，在保留高保真上下文的同时消除早期令牌偏差。与启发式保留或有损压缩不同，MorphKV以近期令牌的注意力模式为指导，通过轻量级更新迭代优化KV缓存。该方法能够更准确地捕获令牌间的相关性，这对于内容创作、代码生成等任务至关重要。我们在长响应任务上的研究表明，与现有最先进的方法相比，该方法平均可节省52.9%的内存，准确率平均高出18.2%，能够实现高效部署。
notes: 论文核心聚焦 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 常数化与长上下文/长响应支持，最匹配“上下文与缓存优化”。

title: Huxley-G\"odel Machine: Human-Level Coding Agent Development by an Approximation of the Optimal Self-Improving Machine
title_zh: Huxley-Gödel Machine：通过对最优自我改进机器的近似实现开发人类级编码代理
abstract:
Recent studies operationalize self-improvement through coding agents that edit their own codebases, grow a tree of self-modifications through expansion strategies that favor higher software engineering benchmark performance, 
considering that this implies more promising subsequent self-modifications. However, we identify a mismatch between the agent’s self-improvement potential (metaproductivity) and its coding benchmark performance, namely the \emph{Metaproductivity-Performance~Mismatch}. Inspired by Huxley’s concept of clade, we propose a metric ($\mathrm{CMP}$) that aggregates the benchmark performances of the \emph{descendants} of an agent as an indicator of its potential for self-improvement. We show that the G\"odel Machine, the optimal self-improving machine, is achieved with access to true $\mathrm{CMP}$. We introduce the Huxley-G\"odel Machine (HGM), which, by estimating $\mathrm{CMP}$ and using it as guidance, searches the tree of self-modifications. On SWE-bench Verified and Polyglot, HGM outperforms prior self-improving coding agent search methods while using less wall-clock time. Moreover, the agent optimized by HGM on SWE-bench Verified outperforms SWE-agent, a leading human-engineered open source coding agent on SWE-bench Lite, where SWE-agent ranks the best on the official leaderboard, when both use the GPT-5-mini backbone, demonstrating that HGM self-improvement indeed enhances genuine coding capability.
abstract_zh: 我们观察到以往通过自我修改来提升自身的软件代理在“元产能”与其在编程基准上的表现之间存在脱节，即“元产能-表现不匹配”。受赫胥黎“类群”概念启发，我们提出用代理“后代”在一系列基准上的表现加权汇总得到的CMP指标，作为衡量其自我改进潜力的代理信号。我们证明若能够获取真实CMP，就能实现哥德尔机——理论上最优的自我改进机制。基于此，构建出赫胥黎-哥德尔机（HGM），通过估计CMP并以此指导，在自我修改树中进行更高效的搜索。在SWE-bench Verified与Polyglot上，HGM在耗时更少的前提下，优于先前的自我改进编码代理搜索方法。更进一步，使用GPT-5-mini骨干，HGM在SWE-bench Verified上优化出的代理，与在官方排行榜上排名第一、由人类工程师设计的开源SWE-agent在SWE-bench Lite上的表现相比更胜一筹，证明了HGM的自我改进确实强化了其真实的编码能力。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Partition-Then-Adapt: Combating Prediction Bias for Reliable Multi-Modal Test-Time Adaptation
title_zh: 先分区再适应：应对预测偏差以实现可靠的多模态测试时自适应
abstract: Existing test-time adaptation (TTA) methods primarily focus on scenarios involving domain shifts in a single modality. However, they often prove ineffective when multiple modalities simultaneously undergo domain shifts, as they struggle to identify and utilize reliable samples within testing batches amid severe prediction bias. To address this problem, we propose Partition-Then-Adapt (PTA), a novel approach combating prediction bias for TTA with multi-modal domain shifts. PTA comprises two key components: Partition and Debiased Reweighting (PDR) and multi-modal Attention-Guided Alignment (AGA). Specifically, PDR evaluates each sample’s predicted label frequency relative to the batch average, partitioning the batch into potential reliable and unreliable subsets. It then reweights each sample by jointly assessing its bias and confidence levels through a quantile-based approach. By applying weighted entropy loss, PTA simultaneously promotes learning from reliable subsets and discourages reliance on unreliable ones. Moreover, AGA regularizes PDR to focus on semantically meaningful multi-modal cues. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of PTA, surpassing state-of-the-art method by 6.1\% on Kinetics50-MC and 5.8\% on VGGSound-MC, respectively. Code of this paper is available at https://github.com/MPI-Lab/PTA.
abstract_zh: 现有的测试时自适应（TTA）方法主要关注单一模态发生域偏移的场景。然而，当多种模态同时发生域偏移时，这些方法往往效果不佳，因为在严重的预测偏差下，它们难以在测试批次中识别并利用可靠样本。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了 Partition-Then-Adapt（PTA），这是一种针对多模态域偏移下 TTA 中预测偏差问题的新方法。PTA 包含两个关键组件：Partition and Debiased Reweighting（PDR）和多模态 Attention-Guided Alignment（AGA）。具体而言，PDR 通过评估每个样本的预测标签频率相对于批次平均值的情况，将批次划分为潜在可靠和不可靠的子集。随后，它通过一种基于分位数的方法，联合评估每个样本的偏差和置信度水平，从而对每个样本重新加权。通过应用加权熵损失，PTA 在促进从可靠子集学习的同时，也抑制对不可靠子集的依赖。此外，AGA 对 PDR 进行正则化，使其聚焦于具有语义意义的多模态线索。大量实验验证了 PTA 的有效性，在 Kinetics50-MC 和 VGGSound-MC 上分别比当前最先进方法高出 6.1\% 和 5.8\%。该论文的代码可在 https://github.com/MPI-Lab/PTA 获取。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Sharp Analysis for KL-Regularized Contextual Bandits and RLHF
title_zh: KL正则化上下文多臂赌博机与RLHF的精确分析
abstract: Reverse-Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization has emerged to be a predominant technique to enhance policy optimization in reinforcement learning (RL) and reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), which forces the learned policy to stay close to a reference policy. While the effectiveness of KL-regularization has been empirically demonstrated in various practical scenarios, current theoretical analyses of KL-regularized RLHF still yield the same $\mathcal{O}(1 / \epsilon^2)$ sample complexity as ones without KL-regularization. To understand the fundamental distinction between objectives with KL-regularization and ones without KL-regularization, we are the first to theoretically demonstrate the power of KL-regularization by providing a sharp analysis for KL-regularized contextual bandits and RLHF, revealing an $\mathcal{O}(1 / \epsilon)$ sample complexity when $\epsilon$ is sufficiently small. We also prove matching lower bounds for both settings. More specifically, we study how the coverage of the reference policy affects the sample complexity of KL-regularized online contextual bandits and RLHF. We show that with sufficient coverage from the reference policy, a simple two-stage mixed sampling algorithm can achieve an $\mathcal{O}(1 / \epsilon)$ sample complexity with only an additive dependence on the coverage coefficient, thus proving the benefits of online data even without explicit exploration. Our results provide a comprehensive understanding of the roles of KL-regularization and data coverage in online decision making, shedding light on the design of more efficient algorithms.
abstract_zh: 反向库尔贝克-莱布勒（KL）正则化已成为增强强化学习（RL）和基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）中策略优化的一项主导技术，它迫使学得的策略保持接近参考策略。尽管 KL 正则化的有效性已在各种实际场景中得到经验性验证，但当前对 KL 正则化 RLHF 的理论分析仍然给出与不带 KL 正则化情形相同的 $\mathcal{O}(1 / \epsilon^2)$ 样本复杂度。为了理解带 KL 正则化目标与不带 KL 正则化目标之间的根本区别，我们首次通过对 KL 正则化上下文赌博机和 RLHF 给出尖锐分析，从理论上证明了 KL 正则化的力量，揭示出当 $\epsilon$ 足够小时其样本复杂度可达 $\mathcal{O}(1 / \epsilon)$。我们还证明了这两种设定下相匹配的下界。更具体地说，我们研究了参考策略的覆盖性如何影响 KL 正则化在线上下文赌博机和 RLHF 的样本复杂度。我们表明，在参考策略具有充分覆盖的情况下，一个简单的两阶段混合采样算法可以达到 $\mathcal{O}(1 / \epsilon)$ 的样本复杂度，并且对覆盖系数仅具有加性依赖，从而证明了即使没有显式探索，在线数据也具有益处。我们的结果为理解 KL 正则化和数据覆盖在在线决策中的作用提供了全面认识，并为设计更高效的算法提供了启示。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: From Pixels to Views: Learning Angular-Aware and Physics-Consistent Representations for Light Field Microscopy
title_zh: 从像素到视角：为光场显微镜学习角度敏感且物理一致的表示
abstract: Light field microscopy (LFM) has become an emerging tool in neuroscience for large-scale neural imaging in vivo, with XLFM (eXtended Light Field Microscopy) notable for its single-exposure volumetric imaging, broad field of view, and high temporal resolution.  However, learning-based 3D reconstruction in XLFM remains underdeveloped due to two core challenges: the absence of standardized datasets and the lack of methods that can efficiently model its angular–spatial structure while remaining physically grounded. We address these challenges by introducing three key contributions. First, we construct the XLFM-Zebrafish benchmark, a large-scale dataset and evaluation suite for XLFM reconstruction. Second, we propose Masked View Modeling for Light Fields (MVM-LF), a self-supervised task that learns angular priors by predicting occluded views, improving data efficiency. Third, we formulate the Optical Rendering Consistency Loss (ORC Loss), a differentiable rendering constraint that enforces alignment between predicted volumes and their PSF-based forward projections. On the XLFM-Zebrafish benchmark, our method improves PSNR by 7.7\% over state-of-the-art baselines. Code and datasets are publicly available at: https://github.com/hefengcs/XLFM-Former.
abstract_zh: 光场显微镜（LFM）已成为神经科学中用于体内大规模神经成像的一种新兴工具，其中 XLFM（扩展光场显微镜）因其单次曝光体积成像、宽视场和高时间分辨率而尤为突出。然而，由于两个核心挑战，基于学习的 XLFM 三维重建仍发展不足：缺乏标准化数据集，以及缺少既能高效建模其角度-空间结构又能保持物理合理性的方法。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了三项关键贡献。首先，我们构建了 XLFM-Zebrafish 基准，这是一个面向 XLFM 重建的大规模数据集与评测套件。其次，我们提出了用于光场的掩码视图建模（MVM-LF），这是一项通过预测被遮挡视图来学习角度先验的自监督任务，从而提高数据效率。第三，我们提出了光学渲染一致性损失（ORC Loss），这是一种可微渲染约束，用于强制预测体数据与其基于点扩散函数（PSF）的前向投影之间保持一致。在 XLFM-Zebrafish 基准上，我们的方法相比最先进基线将 PSNR 提升了 7.7%。代码和数据集已公开发布于：https://github.com/hefengcs/XLFM-Former。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: LiTo: Surface Light Field Tokenization
title_zh: LiTo：表面光场分词
abstract: We propose a 3D latent representation that jointly models object geometry and view-dependent appearance. Most prior works focus on either reconstructing 3D geometry or predicting view-independent diffuse appearance, and thus struggle to capture realistic view-dependent effects. Our approach leverages the fact that RGB-depth images provide samples of a surface light field. By encoding random subsamples of this surface light field into a compact set of latent vectors, our model learns to represent both geometry and appearance within a unified 3D latent space. This representation can reproduce view-dependent effects such as lighting reflections and Fresnel reflections under complex lighting. We further train a latent flow matching model on this representation to learn its distribution conditioned on a single input image, enabling the generation of 3D objects with appearances consistent with the lighting and materials in the input. Experiments show that our approach achieves higher reconstruction quality and better separation of geometry and appearance than existing methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种联合建模物体几何与视角相关外观的三维潜在表示。以往大多数工作要么侧重于重建三维几何，要么侧重于预测与视角无关的漫反射外观，因此难以捕捉真实的视角相关效应。我们的方法利用了这样一个事实：RGB-D 图像提供了表面光场的采样。通过将该表面光场的随机子采样编码为一组紧凑的潜在向量，我们的模型学会了在统一的三维潜在空间中同时表示几何与外观。该表示能够在复杂光照条件下重现光照反射和菲涅耳反射等视角相关效应。我们进一步在这种表示上训练了一个潜在流匹配模型，以学习其在单张输入图像条件下的分布，从而能够生成外观与输入中的光照和材质一致的三维物体。实验表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法实现了更高的重建质量，以及更好的几何与外观分离。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: HShare: Fast LLM Decoding by Hierarchical Key-Value Sharing
title_zh: HShare：通过分层键值共享实现快速 LLM 解码
abstract: The frequent retrieval of Key-Value (KV) cache data has emerged as a significant factor contributing to the inefficiency of the inference process in large language models. Previous research has demonstrated that a small subset of critical KV cache tokens largely influences attention outcomes, leading to methods that either employ fixed sparsity patterns or dynamically select critical tokens based on the query. While dynamic sparse patterns have proven to be more effective, they introduce significant computational overhead, as critical tokens must be reselected for each self-attention computation. In this paper, we reveal substantial similarities in KV cache token criticality across neighboring queries, layers, and heads. Motivated by this insight, we propose HShare, a hierarchical KV sharing framework. HShare facilitates the sharing of critical KV cache token indices across layers, heads, and queries, which significantly reduces the computational overhead associated with query-aware dynamic token sparsity. In addition, we introduce a greedy algorithm that dynamically determines the optimal layer-level and head-level sharing configuration for the decoding phase. We evaluate the effectiveness and efficiency of HShare across various tasks using three models: LLaMA2-7b, LLaMA3-70b, and Mistral-7b. Experimental results demonstrate that HShare achieves competitive accuracy with different sharing ratios, while delivering up to an $8.6\times$ speedup in self-attention operations and a $2.7\times$ improvement in end-to-end throughput compared with FlashAttention2 and GPT-fast respectively. The source code is publicly available at ~\url{https://github.com/wuhuaijin/HShare}.
abstract_zh: 键值（KV）缓存数据的频繁检索已成为导致大语言模型推理过程低效的重要因素。既往研究表明，一小部分关键KV缓存令牌在很大程度上影响注意力输出，因此现有方法要么采用固定稀疏模式，要么基于查询动态选择关键令牌。尽管动态稀疏模式已被证实效果更优，但由于每次自注意力计算都必须重新选择关键令牌，会产生巨大的计算开销。本文揭示了相邻查询、层与注意力头之间的KV缓存令牌重要性存在显著相似性。受这一发现启发，我们提出了分层KV共享框架HShare。HShare支持在层、注意力头与查询之间共享关键KV缓存令牌索引，可大幅降低查询感知动态令牌稀疏性带来的计算开销。此外，我们引入了一种贪心算法，可在解码阶段动态确定最优的层级与头级共享配置。我们使用LLaMA2-7b、LLaMA3-70b和Mistral-7b三个模型在多项任务上评估了HShare的有效性与效率。实验结果表明，HShare在不同共享比例下均能达到具有竞争力的准确率，同时与FlashAttention2和GPT-fast相比，其自注意力运算速度最高提升8.6倍，端到端吞吐量最高提升2.7倍。源代码公开于https://github.com/wuhuaijin/HShare。
notes: 论文核心是面向 LLM 解码阶段的分层 KV cache 共享，通过跨 layer/head/query 复用关键 token 索引来降低动态稀疏注意力开销；不属于模型压缩。

title: Preserving LLM Capabilities through Calibration Data Curation: From Analysis to Optimization
title_zh: 通过校准数据策划保持大模型能力：从分析到优化
abstract: Post-training compression has been a widely employed approach to scale down large language model (LLM) and facilitate efficient inference. In various proposed compression methods, including pruning and quantization, calibration data plays a vital role by informing the weight importance and activation dynamic ranges. However, how calibration data impacts the LLM capability after compression is less explored. Few of the existing works, though recognizing the significance of this study, only investigate the language modeling or commonsense reasoning performance degradation from limited angles, like the data sources or sample amounts. More systematic research is still needed to examine the impacts on  different LLM capabilities in terms of compositional properties and domain correspondence of calibration data. In this work, we aim at bridging this gap and further analyze underlying influencing mechanisms from the activation pattern perspective. Especially, we explore the calibration data's impacts on high-level complex reasoning capabilities, like math problem solving and code generation. Delving into the underlying mechanism, we find that the representativeness and diversity in activation space more fundamentally determine the quality of calibration data. Finally, we propose a calibration data curation framework based on such observations and analysis, enhancing the performance of existing post-training compression methods on preserving critical LLM capabilities. Our code is provided in [Link](https://github.com/BokwaiHo/COLA.git).
abstract_zh: 训练后压缩是被广泛采用的技术，可缩小大语言模型（LLM）规模，实现高效推理。在剪枝、量化等各类已提出的压缩方法中，校准数据通过提供权重重要性与激活动态范围信息发挥着关键作用。然而，校准数据如何影响压缩后大语言模型的性能，目前相关研究仍较为匮乏。现有研究虽已意识到该方向的研究价值，但仅有极少数工作从数据源、样本量等有限角度探究语言建模或常识推理的性能下降问题，仍需开展更系统的研究，从校准数据的组合属性、域对应性等维度分析其对大语言模型不同能力的影响。本研究旨在填补这一研究空白，进一步从激活模式视角分析底层影响机制，重点探究校准数据对数学问题求解、代码生成等高阶复杂推理能力的影响。通过深挖底层机制，我们发现激活空间的代表性与多样性是决定校准数据质量的更根本因素。最后，基于上述观测与分析，我们提出了一种校准数据遴选框架，可提升现有训练后压缩方法保留大语言模型核心能力的性能。我们的代码可在https://github.com/BokwaiHo/COLA.git获取。
notes: 主题聚焦于 LLM 后训练压缩中的校准数据筛选与能力保持，属于模型压缩；未体现系统与调度优化的核心贡献。

title: Is Grokking a Computational Glass Relaxation?
title_zh: Grokking是计算性玻璃松弛吗？
abstract:
Understanding neural network' (NN) generalizability remains a central question in deep learning research.
The special phenomenon of grokking, where NNs abruptly generalize long after the training performance reaches near-perfect level, offers a unique window to investigate the underlying mechanisms of NNs' generalizability.
Here we propose an interpretation for grokking by framing it as a computational glass relaxation: viewing NNs as a physical system where parameters are the degrees of freedom and train loss is the system energy, we find memorization process resembles a rapid cooling of liquid into non-equilibrium glassy state at low temperature and the later generalization is like a slow relaxation towards a more stable configuration. 
This mapping enables us to sample NNs' Boltzmann entropy (states of density) landscape as a function of training loss and test accuracy. 
Our experiments in transformers on arithmetic tasks suggests that there is NO entropy barrier in the memorization-to-generalization transition of grokking, challenging previous theory that defines grokking as a first-order phase transition.
We identify a high-entropy advantage under grokking, an extension of prior work linking entropy to generalizability but much more significant. 
Inspired by grokking's far-from-equilibrium nature, we develop a toy optimizer WanD based on Wang-landau molecular dynamics, which can eliminate grokking without any constraints and find high-norm generalizing solutions. 
This provides strictly-defined counterexamples to theory attributing grokking solely to weight norm evolution towards the Goldilocks zone and also suggests new potential ways for optimizer design.
abstract_zh: 我们将神经网络（NN）类比为一个物理系统：参数是自由度，训练损失是系统能量，认为 grokking 现象相当于计算玻璃的弛豫过程。模型先迅速“冻结”于非平衡的玻璃态，对训练集进行记忆；之后的泛化则像系统缓慢地向更稳定状态弛豫。基于此映射，我们将训练损失与测试准确率视为自变量，采样 NN 的玻尔兹曼熵（态密度）景观。在算术类任务上的 Transformer 实验表明，在 grokking 的记忆到泛化跃迁中并不存在熵障碍，从而挑战将 grokking 归为一阶相变的旧理论。我们进一步发现 grokking 下的高熵优势，这是此前将熵与泛化能力联系起来的工作的一种更显著扩展。在 grokking 远离平衡的特性启发下，我们设计了基于 Wang-Landau 分子动力学的 toy 优化器 WanD：它可以不加任何约束地消除 grokking，并找到范数较高的泛化解。这不仅给出单纯把 grokking 归因于权重范数向“金发区”演进的理论的严格反例，也提出了新的优化器设计算法思路。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: PUATE: Efficient ATE Estimation from Treated (Positive) and Unlabeled Units
title_zh: PUATE：来自处理（正例）与无标签单元的高效 ATE 估计
abstract: The estimation of average treatment effects (ATEs), defined as the difference in expected outcomes between treatment and control groups, is a central topic in causal inference. This study develops semiparametric efficient estimators for ATE in a setting where only a treatment group and an unlabeled group—consisting of units whose treatment status is unknown—are observed. This scenario constitutes a variant of learning from positive and unlabeled data (PU learning) and can be viewed as a special case of ATE estimation with missing data. For this setting, we derive the semiparametric efficiency bounds, which characterize the lowest achievable asymptotic variance for regular estimators. We then construct semiparametric efficient ATE estimators that attain these bounds. Our results contribute to the literature on causal inference with missing data and weakly supervised learning.
abstract_zh: 平均处理效应（ATE）的估计被定义为处理组与对照组之间期望结果之差，是因果推断中的核心主题。本文在仅观察到处理组和未标记组的设定下，发展了用于ATE的半参数有效估计量；未标记组由处理状态未知的个体组成。该情形构成了从正类与未标记数据中学习（PU学习）的一种变体，也可视为带有缺失数据的ATE估计的一个特例。针对这一设定，我们推导了半参数有效性界，该界刻画了正则估计量所能达到的最低渐近方差。随后，我们构造了能够达到这些界的半参数有效ATE估计量。我们的结果为带有缺失数据的因果推断和弱监督学习文献作出了贡献。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: A Little Goes a Long Way: Efficient Long Context Training and Inference with Partial Contexts
title_zh: 一点即足：用部分上下文高效训练与推理长上下文
abstract:
Training and serving long-context large language models (LLMs) incurs substantial overhead. 
To address this, two critical steps are often required: a pretrained LLM typically undergoes a separate stage for context length extension by training on long-context data, followed by architectural modifications to reduce the overhead of KV cache during serving. 
This paper argues that integrating length extension with a GPU-friendly KV cache reduction architecture not only reduces training overhead during length extension, but also achieves better long-context performance. 
This leads to our proposed LongGen, which finetunes a pretrained LLM into an efficient architecture during length extension. 
LongGen builds on three key insights: 
(1) Sparse attention patterns, such as window attention (attending to recent tokens), attention sink (initial ones), and blockwise sparse attention (strided token blocks) are well-suited for building efficient long-context models, primarily due to their GPU-friendly memory access patterns, enabling efficiency gains not just theoretically but in practice as well. 
(2) It is essential for the model to have direct access to all tokens. 
A hybrid architecture with 1/3 full attention layers and 2/3 efficient ones achieves a balanced trade-off between efficiency and long-context performance.
(3) Lightweight training on 5B long-context data is sufficient to extend the hybrid model's context length from 4K to 128K.

We evaluate LongGen on both Llama-2 7B and Llama-2 70B, demonstrating its effectiveness across different scales. 
During training with 128K-long contexts, LongGen achieves 1.55x training speedup and reduces wall-clock time by 36%, compared to a full-attention baseline. 
During inference, LongGen reduces KV cache memory by 62%, achieving 1.67x prefilling speedup and 1.41x decoding speedup.
Compared to baselines that apply KV-cache reduction techniques to full-attention long-context LLMs, LongGen achieves substantially stronger performance not only on the Needle-in-a-Haystack retrieval task, but also on more challenging long-context reasoning tasks, including BABILong and RULER.
abstract_zh:
训练和部署长上下文大语言模型（LLM）会产生极高的开销。为解决这一问题，通常需要两个关键步骤：预训练大语言模型一般会先经过独立的上下文长度扩展阶段，在长上下文数据上训练，之后再进行架构修改，以降低部署阶段的KV缓存开销。本文认为，将长度扩展与对GPU友好的KV缓存缩减架构相整合，不仅可以降低长度扩展过程中的训练开销，还能取得更优的长上下文性能。由此我们提出了LongGen，该方法可在长度扩展过程中将预训练大语言模型微调为高效架构。
LongGen基于三项核心洞察：（1）窗口注意力（关注最近令牌）、注意力沉底（关注初始令牌）、分块稀疏注意力（跨步令牌块）等稀疏注意力模式非常适合构建高效长上下文模型，这主要是因为它们具备对GPU友好的内存访问模式，不仅在理论上可实现效率提升，在实际应用中也能取得效率增益。（2）让模型能够直接访问所有令牌至关重要。由1/3全注意力层和2/3高效注意力层组成的混合架构可在效率与长上下文性能之间实现平衡权衡。（3）在5B规模的长上下文数据上开展轻量训练，足以将混合模型的上下文长度从4K扩展到128K。
我们在Llama-2 7B和Llama-2 70B上对LongGen开展评估，证明其在不同模型规模下均具备有效性。在128K长度上下文的训练过程中，与全注意力基线模型相比，LongGen实现了1.55倍的训练加速，挂钟时间降低36%。在推理阶段，LongGen将KV缓存内存占用降低62%，实现1.67倍的预填充加速和1.41倍的解码加速。与将KV缓存缩减技术应用于全注意力长上下文大语言模型的基线方法相比，LongGen不仅在“大海捞针”检索任务上取得了明显更优的性能，在BABILong、RULER等难度更高的长上下文推理任务上也表现更佳。
notes: 论文聚焦长上下文训练与推理效率，通过 partial contexts 降低长上下文开销，属于上下文处理效率优化。

title: f-INE: A Hypothesis Testing Framework for Estimating Influence under Training Randomness
title_zh: f-INE：在训练随机性下估计影响的假设检验框架
abstract:
Influence estimation methods promise to explain and debug machine learning by estimating the impact of individual samples on the final model. Yet, existing methods collapse under training randomness: the same example may appear critical in one run and irrelevant in the next. Such instability undermines their use in data curation or cleanup since it is unclear if we indeed deleted/kept the correct datapoints. To overcome this, we introduce *f-influence* -- a new influence estimation framework grounded in hypothesis testing that explicitly accounts for training randomness, and establish desirable properties that make it suitable for reliable influence estimation.
We also design a highly efficient algorithm *f*-*IN*fluence *E*stimation (**f-INE**) that computes f-influence in a **in a single training run**. Finally, we scale up f-INE to estimate influence of instruction tuning data on Llama 3.1 8B and show it can reliably detect poisoned samples that steer model opinions,
demonstrating its utility for data cleanup and attributing model behavior.
abstract_zh: 影响估计方法试图通过估计单个样本对最终模型的影响来解释和调试机器学习。然而，现有方法在训练随机性面前会失效：同一个样本在一次运行中可能显得至关重要，而在下一次运行中却无关紧要。这种不稳定性削弱了它们在数据整理或清洗中的作用，因为我们并不清楚自己是否确实删除或保留了正确的数据点。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了*f-influence*，这是一种以假设检验为基础、显式考虑训练随机性的新影响估计框架，并确立了使其适用于可靠影响估计的理想性质。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Improved Adversarial Diffusion Compression for Real-World Video Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于真实世界视频超分辨率的改进对抗扩散压缩
abstract: While many diffusion models have achieved impressive results in real-world video super-resolution (Real-VSR) by generating rich and realistic details, their reliance on multi-step sampling leads to slow inference. One-step networks like SeedVR2, DOVE, and DLoRAL alleviate this through condensing generation into one single step, yet they remain heavy, with billions of parameters and multi-second latency. Recent adversarial diffusion compression (ADC) offers a promising path via pruning and distilling these models into a compact AdcSR network, but directly applying it to Real-VSR fails to balance spatial details and temporal consistency due to its lack of temporal awareness and the limitations of standard adversarial learning. To address these challenges, we propose an improved **ADC** method for Real-**VSR**. Our approach distills a large diffusion Transformer (DiT) teacher DOVE equipped with 3D spatio-temporal attentions, into a pruned 2D Stable Diffusion (SD)-based AdcSR backbone, augmented with lightweight 1D temporal convolutions, achieving significantly higher efficiency. In addition, we introduce a dual-head adversarial distillation scheme, in which discriminators in both pixel and feature domains explicitly disentangle the discrimination of details and consistency into two heads, enabling both objectives to be effectively optimized without sacrificing one for the other. Experiments demonstrate that the resulting compressed **AdcVSR** model reduces complexity by **95%** in parameters and achieves an **8$\times$** acceleration over its DiT teacher DOVE, while maintaining competitive video quality and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 尽管众多扩散模型通过生成丰富且逼真的细节，在真实场景视频超分辨率（Real-VSR）任务中取得了出色成果，但这类模型依赖多步采样，导致推理速度缓慢。SeedVR2、DOVE、DLoRAL等单步网络将生成过程压缩为单步以缓解这一问题，但这类网络仍然体量庞大，参数量达数十亿，延迟长达数秒。近期提出的对抗扩散压缩（ADC）技术通过剪枝和蒸馏将上述模型压缩为紧凑的AdcSR网络，为该问题提供了极具前景的解决路径，但由于ADC缺乏时间感知能力，且标准对抗学习存在局限性，直接将其应用于Real-VSR任务时无法平衡空间细节与时间一致性。为解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种面向Real-VSR的改进ADC方法。我们的方法将配备三维时空注意力的大型扩散Transformer（DiT）教师模型DOVE蒸馏到经剪枝的、基于二维稳定扩散（SD）的AdcSR骨干网络中，并为该骨干网络添加轻量一维时间卷积，实现了显著的效率提升。此外，我们提出了双头对抗蒸馏方案，像素域和特征域的判别器将细节判别与一致性判别明确解耦到两个头中，使得两个目标都能得到有效优化，无需为其中一个牺牲另一个。实验表明，最终得到的压缩AdcVSR模型相较于其DiT教师模型DOVE，参数量复杂度降低95%，推理速度提升8倍，同时还能保持具备竞争力的视频质量与效率。
notes: 核心贡献是针对扩散式 Real-VSR 的剪枝与蒸馏压缩，主要对应模型压缩；加速来自压缩后的轻量化模型，而非系统/调度层优化。

title: Safe Continuous-time Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning via Epigraph Form
title_zh: 通过上图形式实现的安全连续时间多智能体强化学习
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has made significant progress in recent years, but most algorithms still rely on a discrete-time Markov Decision Process (MDP) with fixed decision intervals. This formulation is often ill-suited for complex multi-agent dynamics, particularly in high-frequency or irregular time-interval settings, leading to degraded performance and motivating the development of continuous-time MARL (CT-MARL). Existing CT-MARL methods are mainly built on Hamilton–Jacobi–Bellman (HJB) equations. However, they rarely account for safety constraints such as collision penalties, since these introduce discontinuities that make HJB-based learning difficult. To address this challenge, we propose a continuous-time constrained MDP (CT-CMDP) formulation and a novel MARL framework that transforms discrete MDPs into CT-CMDPs via an epigraph-based reformulation. We then solve this by proposing a novel PINN-based actor–critic method that enables stable and efficient optimization in continuous time. We evaluate our approach on continuous-time safe multi-particle environments (MPE) and safe multi-agent MuJoCo benchmarks. Results demonstrate smoother value approximations, more stable training, and improved performance over safe MARL baselines, validating the effectiveness and robustness of our method.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）近年来取得了显著进展，但大多数算法仍然依赖具有固定决策间隔的离散时间马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）。这种建模方式往往不适合复杂的多智能体动力学，尤其是在高频或不规则时间间隔设置中，会导致性能下降，并推动了连续时间多智能体强化学习（CT-MARL）的发展。现有的 CT-MARL 方法主要建立在 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman（HJB）方程之上。然而，它们很少考虑碰撞惩罚等安全约束，因为这类约束会引入不连续性，使基于 HJB 的学习变得困难。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种连续时间约束马尔可夫决策过程（CT-CMDP）建模方式，以及一种新的 MARL 框架，通过基于上图形式（epigraph）的重构将离散 MDP 转换为 CT-CMDP。随后，我们提出一种新的基于 PINN 的 actor-critic 方法来求解该问题，从而实现连续时间下稳定而高效的优化。我们在连续时间安全多粒子环境（MPE）和安全多智能体 MuJoCo 基准上评估了该方法。结果表明，与安全 MARL 基线方法相比，我们的方法能够得到更平滑的价值近似、更稳定的训练过程以及更优的性能，验证了该方法的有效性与鲁棒性。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: A Scalable Inter-edge Correlation Modeling in CopulaGNN for Link Sign Prediction
title_zh: 在 CopulaGNN 中用于链接符号预测的可扩展跨边相关建模
abstract: Link sign prediction on a signed graph is a task to determine whether the relationship represented by an edge is positive or negative. Since the presence of negative edges violates the graph homophily assumption that adjacent nodes are similar, regular graph methods have not been applicable without auxiliary structures to handle them. We aim to directly model the latent statistical dependency among edges with the Gaussian copula and its corresponding correlation matrix, extending CopulaGNN (Ma et al., 2021). However, a naive modeling of edge-edge relations is computationally intractable even for a graph with moderate scale. To address this, we propose to 1) represent the correlation matrix as a Gramian of edge embeddings, significantly reducing the number of parameters, and 2) reformulate the conditional probability distribution to dramatically reduce the inference cost. We theoretically verify scalability of our method by proving its linear convergence. Also, our extensive experiments demonstrate that it achieves significantly faster convergence than baselines, maintaining competitive prediction performance to the state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 有符号图上的链接符号预测任务，是确定一条边所表示的关系是正还是负。由于负边的存在违反了相邻节点相似的图同配性假设，常规图方法若不借助辅助结构来处理负边，便无法适用。我们的目标是利用高斯 copula 及其对应的相关矩阵，直接建模边与边之间潜在的统计依赖关系，并对 CopulaGNN（Ma 等，2021）进行扩展。然而，对边间关系进行朴素建模即使对于中等规模的图在计算上也是不可行的。为此，我们提出：1）将相关矩阵表示为边嵌入的 Gram 矩阵，从而显著减少参数数量；2）重构条件概率分布，以大幅降低推理开销。我们通过证明方法的线性收敛性，从理论上验证了其可扩展性。此外，大量实验表明，该方法相比基线实现了显著更快的收敛速度，同时保持了与最先进模型相当的预测性能。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Praxis-VLM: Vision-Grounded Decision Making via Text-Driven Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: Praxis-VLM：通过文本驱动强化学习实现视觉支撑的决策
abstract: Vision Language Models exhibit impressive performance for various tasks, yet they often lack the sophisticated situational reasoning required for complex decision-making. This paper shows that VLMs can achieve surprisingly strong decision-making performance when visual scenes are replaced by textual descriptions, suggesting foundational reasoning can be effectively learned from language. Motivated by this insight, we propose Praxis-VLM, a reasoning VLM for vision-grounded decision-making. Praxis-VLM employs the GRPO algorithm on textual scenarios to instill robust reasoning capabilities, where models learn to evaluate actions and their consequences. These reasoning skills, acquired purely from text, successfully transfer to multimodal inference with visual inputs, significantly reducing reliance on scarce paired image-text training data. Experiments across diverse decision-making benchmarks demonstrate that Praxis-VLM substantially outperforms standard supervised fine-tuning, exhibiting superior performance and generalizability. Further analysis confirms that our models engage in explicit and effective reasoning, underpinning their enhanced performance and adaptability.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言模型在各种任务中表现出色，但它们往往缺乏复杂决策所需的高级情境推理能力。本文表明，当视觉场景被文本描述替代时，视觉语言模型也能取得出人意料的强大决策性能，这表明基础推理能力可以有效地从语言中学习获得。受这一发现启发，我们提出了Praxis-VLM，一种用于视觉扎根决策的推理型视觉语言模型。Praxis-VLM在文本场景上采用GRPO算法，以注入稳健的推理能力，使模型学会评估动作及其后果。这些完全从文本中获得的推理技能能够成功迁移到带有视觉输入的多模态推理中，显著降低了对稀缺的配对图文训练数据的依赖。在多样化的决策基准测试中，实验表明Praxis-VLM显著优于标准的监督微调，在性能和泛化能力方面表现更佳。进一步分析证实，我们的模型进行了显式且有效的推理，这支撑了其增强的性能与适应性。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Training Deep Normalization-Free Spiking Neural Networks with Lateral Inhibition
title_zh: 带侧抑制的深度无归一化脉冲神经网络训练
abstract:
Spiking neural networks (SNNs) have garnered significant attention as a central paradigm in neuromorphic computing, owing to their energy efficiency and biological plausibility. However, training deep SNNs has critically depended on explicit normalization schemes, leading to a trade-off between performance and biological realism. To resolve this conflict, we propose a normalization-free learning framework that incorporates lateral inhibition inspired by cortical circuits. Our framework replaces the traditional feedforward SNN layer with a circuit of distinct excitatory (E) and inhibitory (I) neurons that captures the features of the canonical architecture of cortical E-I circuits. The circuit dynamically regulates neuronal activity through subtractive and divisive inhibition, which respectively control the activity and the gain of excitatory neurons. To enable and stabilize end-to-end training of the biologically constrained SNN, we propose two key techniques: E-I Init and E-I Prop. E-I Init is a dynamic parameter initialization scheme that balances excitatory and inhibitory inputs while performing gain control. E-I Prop decouples the backpropagation of the E-I circuits from the forward pass and regulates gradient flow.
Experiments across multiple datasets and network architectures demonstrate that our framework enables stable training of deep normalization-free SNNs with biological realism and achieves competitive performance without resorting to explicit normalization schemes. Therefore, our work not only provides a solution to training deep SNNs but also serves as a computational platform for further exploring the functions of E-I interactions in large-scale cortical computation.
abstract_zh: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）因其能量效率和生物合理性，作为神经形态计算中的核心范式而受到广泛关注。然而，深层 SNN 的训练在很大程度上严重依赖显式归一化方案，从而导致性能与生物真实感之间的权衡。为了解决这一冲突，我们提出了一种无归一化学习框架，引入了受皮层回路启发的侧向抑制。我们的框架用由不同兴奋性（E）和抑制性（I）神经元组成的回路替代了传统的前馈 SNN 层，该回路捕捉了皮层 E-I 回路经典架构的特征。该回路通过减法抑制和除法抑制动态调节神经元活动，它们分别控制兴奋性神经元的活动和增益。为了实现并稳定这种受生物约束的 SNN 的端到端训练，我们提出了两项关键技术：E-I Init 和 E-I Prop。E-I Init 是一种动态参数初始化方案，在执行增益控制的同时平衡兴奋性和抑制性输入。E-I Prop 将 E-I 回路的反向传播与前向传播解耦，并调节梯度流。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Compress, Gather, and Recompute: REFORMing Long-Context Processing in Transformers
title_zh: 压缩、聚合与重算：在Transformer中重新形成长上下文处理
abstract: As large language models increasingly gain popularity in real-world applications, processing extremely long contexts, often exceeding the model’s pre-trained context limits, has emerged as a critical challenge. While existing approaches to efficient long-context processing show promise, recurrent compression-based methods struggle with information preservation, whereas random access approaches require substantial memory resources. We introduce REFORM, a novel inference framework that efficiently handles long contexts through a two-phase approach. First, it incrementally processes input chunks while maintaining a compressed KV cache, constructs cross-layer context embeddings, and utilizes early exit strategy for improved efficiency. Second, it identifies and gathers essential tokens via similarity matching and selectively recomputes the KV cache. Compared to baselines, REFORM achieves over 50% and 27% performance gains on RULER and BABILong respectively at 1M context length. It also outperforms baselines on ∞-Bench, RepoEval, and MM-NIAH, demonstrating flexibility across diverse tasks and domains. Additionally, REFORM reduces inference time by 30% and peak memory usage by 5%, achieving both efficiency and superior performance.
abstract_zh: 随着大语言模型在现实应用中愈发普及，处理通常超出模型预训练上下文限制的极长上下文已成为一项关键挑战。现有高效长上下文处理方法虽展现出一定潜力，但基于循环压缩的方法存在信息留存困难的问题，而随机访问方法则需要大量内存资源。我们提出REFORM，这是一种新型推理框架，通过两阶段方法高效处理长上下文。第一阶段，该框架在维护压缩键值（KV）缓存的同时增量处理输入分块，构建跨层上下文嵌入，并采用早退出策略提升效率。第二阶段，它通过相似度匹配识别并收集关键词元，有选择性地重计算KV缓存。与基线方法相比，在100万上下文长度下，REFORM在RULER和BABILong任务上的性能分别提升了50%以上和27%。它在∞-Bench、RepoEval和MM-NIAH任务上的表现同样优于基线方法，展现出适配不同任务与领域的灵活性。此外，REFORM将推理时间缩短了30%，峰值内存占用降低了5%，兼顾了效率与优异性能。
notes: 论文核心是长上下文推理框架，重点在压缩与重计算 KV cache，以及 early exit 和跨层上下文表征；不属于典型解码策略优化。

title: Towards Reliable Benchmarking: A Contamination Free, Controllable Evaluation Framework for Multi-step LLM Function Calling
title_zh: 迈向可靠基准：一个无污染可控的多步大语言模型函数调用评估框架
abstract:
As language models gain access to external tools through structured function calls, they become increasingly more capable of solving complex, multi-step tasks. However, existing benchmarks for tool-augmented language models (TaLMs) provide insufficient control over factors such as the number of functions accessible, task complexity, and input size, and remain vulnerable to data contamination.
We present FuncBenchGen, a unified, contamination-free framework that evaluates TaLMs by generating synthetic multi-step tool-use tasks to stress-test TaLMs.  
The key idea is to cast tool use as traversal over a hidden function-dependency DAG where nodes are function calls and an edge between nodes represents one function consuming the output of another.
Given a set of external function schemas, initial variable values, and a target variable, models must compose the correct call sequence to compute the target variable.  FuncBenchGen allows users to precisely control task difficulty (e.g., graph size, dependency depth, and distractor functions) while avoiding pretraining/test-time leakage.

We apply our FuncBenchGen framework to evaluate seven open and closed LLMs on tool use tasks of varying difficulty.  Reasoning-optimized models consistently outperform general-purpose models with GPT-5 significantly outperforming other available models. Performance declines sharply as dependency depth increases.  Furthermore, connected distractors---irrelevant functions sharing type-compatible variables with relevant functions---prove especially difficult to handle. 

We find that strong models often make syntactically valid function calls but propagate incorrect or stale argument values across steps, revealing brittle state tracking by LLMs in multi-turn tool use.
Motivated by this observation, we introduce a simple mitigation strategy that explicitly restates prior variable values to the agent at each step.  Surprisingly, this lightweight change yields substantial gains across models. e.g., yielding an improvement in success rate from 62.5\% to 81.3\% for GPT-5, without modifying the underlying architectures or training.
abstract_zh: 随着语言模型通过结构化函数调用获得对外部工具的访问能力，它们在解决复杂的多步骤任务方面变得越来越强大。然而，现有针对工具增强语言模型（TaLMs）的基准测试，对可访问函数数量、任务复杂度和输入规模等因素提供的控制不足，并且仍然容易受到数据污染的影响。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: SWE-RL: Advancing LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning on Open Software Evolution
title_zh: SWE-RL：通过在开放软件演化上进行强化学习推动大语言模型推理能力
abstract: The recent DeepSeek-R1 release has demonstrated the immense potential of reinforcement learning (RL) in enhancing the general reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). While DeepSeek-R1 and other follow-up work primarily focus on applying RL to competitive coding and math problems, this paper introduces SWE-RL, the first approach to scale RL-based LLM reasoning for real-world software engineering.
