Our study using \ours suggests the efficacy of a simple mixed-domain RL training approach and reveals several key aspects affecting cross-domain transferability. We further train two models {\ours}-7B and {\ours}-32B purely with RL on our curated data and observe largely improved performance over leading open RL reasoning model baselines, with gains of 7.3\% and 7.8\% respectively on an extensive 17-task, six-domain evaluation suite. We are releasing our dataset, code, and evaluation suite to the community, aiming to support further research and development of more general RL-enhanced reasoning models.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）在提升大语言模型（LLM）推理能力方面已展现出潜力，但通向更广泛能力的进展受限于高质量、多领域数据集的可获得性。本文提出了\ours，一个包含 9.2 万条样本的面向推理的 RL 数据集，旨在填补这一空白。该数据集覆盖六个推理领域：数学、代码、科学、逻辑、模拟和表格，并为每个领域配备相应的验证器。我们通过一条谨慎的数据整理流程构建\ours，其中包括数据来源收集、去重、奖励设计，以及基于领域特性和难度的筛选，以支持对跨领域 RL 泛化的系统性研究。我们基于\ours开展的研究表明，一种简单的混合领域 RL 训练方法是有效的，并揭示了影响跨领域迁移能力的若干关键因素。我们进一步仅使用整理后的数据通过 RL 训练了两个模型{\ours}-7B 和 {\ours}-32B，并观察到它们相较于领先的开源 RL 推理模型基线取得了显著性能提升，在一个涵盖 17 项任务、六个领域的大规模评测套件上，分别提升了 7.3\% 和 7.8\%。我们将向社区发布我们的数据集、代码和评测套件，以支持对更通用的 RL 增强推理模型的进一步研究与开发。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: 70% Size, 100% Accuracy: Lossless LLM Compression for Efficient GPU Inference via Dynamic-Length Float (DFloat11)
title_zh: 70% 大小、100% 精度：通过动态长度浮点数（DFloat11）实现高效 GPU 推理的无损大模型压缩
abstract: Large-scale AI models, such as Large Language Models (LLMs) and Diffusion Models (DMs), have grown rapidly in size, creating significant challenges for efficient deployment on resource-constrained hardware. In this paper, we introduce Dynamic-Length Float (DFloat11), a lossless compression framework that reduces LLM and DM size by 30\% while preserving outputs that are bit-for-bit identical to the original model. DFloat11 is motivated by the low entropy in the BFloat16 weight representation of LLMs, which reveals significant inefficiency in the existing storage format. By applying entropy coding, DFloat11 assigns dynamic-length encodings to weights based on frequency, achieving near information-optimal compression without any loss of precision. To facilitate efficient inference with dynamic-length encodings, we develop a custom GPU kernel for fast online decompression. Our design incorporates the following: (i) compact, hierarchical lookup tables (LUTs) that fit within GPU SRAM for efficient decoding, (ii) a two-phase GPU kernel for coordinating thread read/write positions using lightweight auxiliary variables, and (iii) transformer-block-level decompression to minimize latency. Experiments on Llama 3.3, Qwen 3, Mistral 3, FLUX.1, and others validate our hypothesis that DFloat11 achieves around 30\% model size reduction while preserving bit-for-bit identical outputs. Compared to a potential alternative of offloading parts of an uncompressed model to the CPU to meet memory constraints, DFloat11 achieves 2.3--46.2$\times$ higher throughput in token generation. With a fixed GPU memory budget, DFloat11 enables 5.7--14.9$\times$ longer generation lengths than uncompressed models. Notably, our method enables lossless inference of Llama 3.1 405B, an 810GB model, on a single node equipped with 8$\times$80GB GPUs.
abstract_zh: 大规模AI模型（例如大语言模型（LLM）、扩散模型（DM））的规模近年来快速增长，给资源受限硬件上的高效部署造成了巨大挑战。本文提出动态长度浮点（DFloat11）这一无损压缩框架，可将大语言模型与扩散模型的体积缩减30%，同时保证输出与原始模型逐比特完全一致。DFloat11的设计动机源于大语言模型的BFloat16权重表示熵值较低，说明现有存储格式存在显著的效率浪费。通过应用熵编码，DFloat11根据权重出现的频率为其分配动态长度编码，在无任何精度损失的前提下实现接近信息论最优的压缩效果。为了实现基于动态长度编码的高效推理，我们开发了定制GPU内核以实现快速在线解压缩。我们的设计包含以下特性：（1）可适配GPU静态随机存取存储器（SRAM）的紧凑分层查找表（LUT），可实现高效解码；（2）两阶段GPU内核，通过轻量级辅助变量协调线程的读写位置；（3）Transformer块级解压缩机制，以最小化延迟。我们在Llama 3.3、Qwen 3、Mistral 3、FLUX.1等模型上开展的实验验证了我们的假设：DFloat11可实现约30%的模型体积缩减，同时保持逐比特完全一致的输出。与为满足内存约束将未压缩模型的部分负载卸载至CPU的可行替代方案相比，DFloat11的词元生成吞吐量提升了2.3~46.2倍。在GPU内存预算固定的情况下，DFloat11支持的生成长度是未压缩模型的5.7~14.9倍。值得注意的是，我们的方法可在搭载8块80GB GPU的单节点上实现体积达810GB的Llama 3.1 405B模型的无损推理。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: Demystifying Cost-Efficiency in LLM Serving over Heterogeneous GPUs
title_zh: 揭秘异构GPU环境下大语言模型服务的成本效率
abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have led to increasingly diverse requests, accompanied with varying resource (compute and memory) demands to serve them. However, this in turn degrades the cost-efficiency of LLM serving as common practices primarily rely on homogeneous GPU resources. In response to this problem, this work conducts a thorough study about serving LLMs over heterogeneous GPU resources on cloud platforms. The rationale is that different GPU types exhibit distinct compute and memory characteristics, aligning well with the divergent resource demands of diverse requests. Particularly, through comprehensive benchmarking, we discover that the cost-efficiency of LLM serving can be substantially optimized by meticulously determining GPU composition, deployment configurations, and workload assignments. Subsequently, we design a scheduling algorithm via mixed-integer linear programming, aiming at deducing the most cost-efficient serving plan under the constraints of price budget and real-time GPU availability. Remarkably, our approach effectively outperforms homogeneous and heterogeneous baselines under a wide array of scenarios, covering diverse workload traces, varying GPU availablilities, and multi-model serving. This casts new light on more accessible and efficient LLM serving over heterogeneous cloud resources.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型的最新进展催生了日益多样化的服务请求，这些请求对应的资源（计算与内存）需求各不相同。但当前的通用实践主要依赖同构GPU资源，这反而会降低大语言模型服务的成本效率。针对这一问题，本研究针对云平台异构GPU资源上的大语言模型服务开展了全面研究。研究的核心逻辑在于，不同类型的GPU具备截然不同的计算与内存特性，能够很好匹配多样化请求的差异化资源需求。具体而言，通过全面的基准测试我们发现，通过精细确定GPU组成、部署配置与工作负载分配，可大幅优化大语言模型服务的成本效率。随后我们基于混合整数线性规划设计了一种调度算法，旨在在价格预算与GPU实时可用量的约束下推导最具成本效率的服务方案。值得注意的是，在覆盖多样化工作负载轨迹、不同GPU可用情况、多模型服务在内的各类场景中，我们的方法表现均显著优于同构及异构基线方法。该研究为在异构云资源上实现更易用、更高效的大语言模型服务提供了新的思路。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: Role Bias in Diffusion Models: Diagnosing and Mitigating through Intermediate Decomposition
title_zh: 扩散模型中的角色偏差：通过中间分解诊断与缓解
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models exhibit impressive photorealistic image generation capabilities, yet they struggle in compositional image generation. In this work, we introduce RoleBench, a benchmark focused on evaluating compositional generalization in action-based relations (e.g., "mouse chasing cat"). We show that state-of-the-art T2I models and compositional generation methods consistently default to frequent reversed relations (i.e., "cat chasing mouse"), a phenomenon we call role collapse. Related works attribute this to the model’s architectural limitation or underrepresentation in the data. Our key insight reveals that while models fail on rare compositions when their inversions are common, they can successfully generate similar intermediate compositions (e.g., "mouse chasing boy"), suggesting that this limitation is also due to the presence of frequent counterparts rather than just the absence of rare compositions. Motivated by this, we hypothesize that directional decomposition can gradually mitigate role collapse. We test this via ReBind, a lightweight framework that teaches role bindings using carefully selected active/passive intermediate compositions. Experiments suggest that intermediate compositions through simple fine-tuning can significantly reduce role collapse, with humans preferring ReBind more than 78% compared to state-of-the-art methods. Our findings highlight the role of distributional asymmetries in compositional failures and offer a simple, effective path for improving generalization.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像（T2I）扩散模型展现出令人印象深刻的逼真图像生成能力，但在组合式图像生成方面仍存在困难。在本工作中，我们提出了 RoleBench，一个专注于评估动作关系（例如“老鼠追猫”）中组合泛化能力的基准。我们表明，最先进的 T2I 模型和组合生成方法会持续默认生成高频的反转关系（即“猫追老鼠”），我们将这一现象称为角色塌缩。相关工作将其归因于模型的架构局限性或数据中的代表性不足。我们的关键发现表明，尽管模型在其反转形式常见时会在稀有组合上失败，但它们却能够成功生成相似的中间组合（例如“老鼠追男孩”），这说明这种局限不仅是由于稀有组合的缺失，也与高频对应关系的存在有关。受此启发，我们假设方向性分解可以逐步缓解角色塌缩。我们通过 ReBind 对此进行了检验，ReBind 是一个轻量级框架，利用精心选择的主动/被动中间组合来学习角色绑定。实验表明，通过简单微调引入中间组合可以显著减少角色塌缩，与最先进方法相比，人类在超过 78% 的情况下更偏好 ReBind。我们的发现突出了分布不对称性在组合失败中的作用，并为提升泛化能力提供了一条简单而有效的路径。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Revisiting Long-context Modeling from Context Denoising Perspective
title_zh: 从上下文去噪角度重新审视长上下文建模
abstract: Long-context models (LCMs) have demonstrated great potential in processing long sequences, facilitating many real-world applications. The success of LCMs can be attributed to their ability to locate implicit critical information within the context for further prediction. However, recent research reveals that LCMs are often susceptible to contextual noise, i.e., irrelevant tokens, that can mislead model attention. In this paper, we conduct a fine-grained analysis of the context noise and propose an effective metric, the Integrated Gradient (IG) score, to detect and quantify the noise information within the context. Our findings reveal that even simple mitigation of detected context noise can substantially boost the model's attention on critical tokens and benefit subsequent predictions. Building on this insight, we propose Context Denoising Training (CDT), a straightforward yet effective training strategy that improves attention on critical tokens while reinforcing their influence on model predictions. Extensive experiments across four tasks, under both context window scaling and long-context alignment settings, demonstrate the superiority of CDT. Notably, when trained with CDT, an open-source 8B model can achieve performance (50.92) comparable to GPT-4o (51.00).
abstract_zh: 长上下文模型（LCM）在处理长序列方面展现出巨大潜力，推动了许多现实世界应用的发展。LCM 的成功可归因于其能够在上下文中定位隐含的关键信息，以供后续预测使用。然而，近期研究表明，LCM 往往容易受到上下文噪声的影响，即无关的词元，这些噪声可能会误导模型的注意力。在本文中，我们对上下文噪声进行了细粒度分析，并提出了一种有效指标，即积分梯度（IG）分数，用于检测和量化上下文中的噪声信息。我们的发现表明，即便只是对检测到的上下文噪声进行简单缓解，也能显著增强模型对关键词元的注意力，并有利于后续预测。基于这一洞见，我们提出了上下文去噪训练（CDT），这是一种简单但有效的训练策略，能够提升对关键词元的注意力，同时强化它们对模型预测的影响。在四项任务上的大量实验，在上下文窗口扩展和长上下文对齐两种设置下，均证明了 CDT 的优越性。值得注意的是，经过 CDT 训练后，一个开源的 8B 模型能够取得与 GPT-4o（51.00）相当的性能（50.92）。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Designing Rules to Pick a Rule: Aggregation by Consistency
title_zh: 设计规则以选择规则：通过一致性进行聚合
abstract: Rank aggregation has critical applications for developing AI agents, as well as for evaluating them. However, different methods can give rise to significantly different aggregate rankings, impacting these applications. Indeed, work in social choice and statistics has produced many rank aggregation methods, each with its desirable properties, but also with its limitations. Given this trade-off, how do we decide which aggregation rule to use, _i.e._, what is a good _rule picking rule (RPR)_? In this paper, we design a data-driven RPR that identifies the best method for each dataset without assuming a generative model. The principle behind our RPR is to maximize consistency if the data collection process was repeated. We show that our method satisfies several consistency-related axioms failed by a wide class of natural RPRs. While we prove that the computational problem of maximizing consistency is hard, we provide a sampling-based implementation that is efficient in practice. We run this implementation on known statistical models to experimentally demonstrate its desirable properties, as well as on real-world data where our method provides important insights into how to improve consistency.
abstract_zh: 排序聚合在开发 AI 智能体以及对其进行评估方面都有关键应用。然而，不同的方法可能会产生显著不同的聚合排序，从而影响这些应用。事实上，社会选择理论和统计学中的研究已经提出了许多排序聚合方法，每种方法都有其理想性质，但也都有其局限性。鉴于这种权衡，我们该如何决定使用哪种聚合规则，即，什么样的规则选择规则（RPR）才是好的？在本文中，我们设计了一种数据驱动的 RPR，它无需假设生成模型，就能为每个数据集识别出最佳方法。我们提出的 RPR 背后的原则是：如果重复进行数据收集过程，则应最大化一致性。我们表明，我们的方法满足若干与一致性相关的公理，而一大类自然的 RPR 无法满足这些公理。尽管我们证明了最大化一致性的计算问题是困难的，但我们提供了一种基于采样的实现方式，在实践中具有效率。我们在已知统计模型上运行了这一实现，通过实验展示了其理想性质；同时也在真实世界数据上进行了运行，在这些数据中，我们的方法为如何提高一致性提供了重要见解。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: PALMBENCH: A COMPREHENSIVE BENCHMARK OF COMPRESSED LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS ON MOBILE PLATFORMS
title_zh: PALMBENCH：移动平台上压缩大语言模型的全面基准
abstract:
Deploying large language models (LLMs) locally on mobile devices is advantageous in scenarios where transmitting data to remote cloud servers is either undesirable due to privacy concerns or impractical due to network connection. Recent advancements have facilitated the local deployment of LLMs. However, local deployment also presents challenges, particularly in balancing quality (generative performance), latency, and throughput within the hardware constraints of mobile devices. In this paper, we introduce our lightweight, all-in-one automated benchmarking framework that allows users to evaluate LLMs on mobile devices. We provide a comprehensive benchmark of various popular LLMs with different quantization configurations (both weights and activations) across multiple mobile platforms with varying hardware capabilities. Unlike traditional benchmarks that assess full-scale models on high-end GPU clusters, we focus on evaluating resource efficiency (memory and power consumption) and harmful output for compressed models on mobile devices. Our key observations include: i) differences in energy efficiency and throughput across mobile platforms; ii) the impact of quantization on memory usage, GPU execution time, and power consumption; and iii) accuracy and performance degradation of quantized models compared to their non-quantized counterparts; and iv) the frequency of hallucinations and toxic content generated by compressed LLMs on
mobile devices.
abstract_zh: 在因隐私顾虑不宜向远程云服务器传输数据，或因网络连接问题导致该操作不切实际的场景下，在移动设备上本地部署大语言模型（LLM）具备显著优势。近期的技术进展为大语言模型的本地部署提供了支撑，但本地部署也带来了诸多挑战，尤其是如何在移动设备的硬件约束下平衡质量（生成性能）、延迟与吞吐量。本文提出了一款轻量级、一体化的自动化基准测试框架，用户可借助该框架在移动设备上评估大语言模型的性能。我们针对多款主流大语言模型，在硬件性能各不相同的多个移动平台上，基于不同的量化配置（涵盖权重与激活量化）开展了全面的基准测试。传统基准测试针对高端GPU集群上的全尺寸模型开展评估，与这类测试不同，我们聚焦于评估移动设备上压缩模型的资源效率（内存与功耗）以及有害输出情况。我们的核心观测结论包括：一、不同移动平台的能效与吞吐量存在差异；二、量化对内存占用、GPU执行时长以及功耗存在影响；三、与非量化版本相比，量化模型的准确率与性能有所下降；四、移动设备上的压缩大语言模型生成幻觉内容与有毒内容的出现频率。
notes: 自动关键词筛选得分=20；命中=throughput, latency, quantization, quantized, compressed, language model, large language model, llm

title: Hierarchical Fine-grained Preference Optimization for Physically Plausible Video Generation
title_zh: 层次细粒度偏好优化用于物理合理的视频生成
abstract: Recent advancements in video generation have enabled the creation of high-quality, visually compelling videos. However, generating videos that adhere to the laws of physics remains a critical challenge for applications requiring realism and accuracy. In this work, we propose **PhysHPO**, a novel framework for Hierarchical Cross-Modal Direct Preference Optimization, to tackle this challenge by enabling fine-grained preference alignment for physically plausible video generation. PhysHPO optimizes video alignment across four hierarchical granularities: a) ***Instance Level***, aligning the overall video content with the input prompt; b) ***State Level***, ensuring temporal consistency using boundary frames as anchors; c) ***Motion Level***, modeling motion trajectories for realistic dynamics; and d) ***Semantic Level***, maintaining logical consistency between narrative and visuals. Recognizing that real-world videos are the best reflections of physical phenomena, we further introduce an automated data selection pipeline to efficiently identify and utilize *"good data"* from existing large-scale text-video datasets, thereby eliminating the need for costly and time-intensive dataset construction. Extensive experiments on both physics-focused and general capability benchmarks demonstrate that PhysHPO significantly improves physical plausibility and overall video generation quality of advanced models. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore fine-grained preference alignment and data selection for video generation, paving the way for more realistic and human-preferred video generation paradigms.
abstract_zh: 视频生成领域的最新进展已经能够生成高质量、视觉效果引人的视频。然而，对于需要真实性和准确性的应用而言，生成符合物理规律的视频仍然是一个关键挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PhysHPO，一种新颖的分层跨模态直接偏好优化框架，通过实现细粒度偏好对齐来应对这一挑战，从而生成具有物理合理性的视频。PhysHPO 在四个层次粒度上优化视频对齐：a）实例层，对齐整体视频内容与输入提示；b）状态层，以边界帧为锚点确保时间一致性；c）运动层，对运动轨迹进行建模以实现真实动力学；d）语义层，维持叙事与视觉之间的逻辑一致性。考虑到真实世界视频是物理现象的最佳反映，我们进一步引入了一条自动化数据选择流水线，以便从现有的大规模文本视频数据集中高效识别并利用“优质数据”，从而消除了构建数据集所需的高成本和长时间投入。在面向物理的基准和通用能力基准上的大量实验表明，PhysHPO 显著提升了先进模型的物理合理性和整体视频生成质量。据我们所知，这是首个探索视频生成中细粒度偏好对齐与数据选择的工作，为更加真实且更符合人类偏好的视频生成范式铺平了道路。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: MathArena: Evaluating LLMs on Uncontaminated Math Competitions
title_zh: MathArena: 在未污染的数学竞赛中评估大语言模型
abstract:
The rapid advancement of reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs) has led to notable improvements on mathematical benchmarks. However, many of the most commonly used evaluation datasets (e.g., AIME 2024) are widely available online, making it difficult to disentangle genuine reasoning from potential memorization. 
Furthermore, these benchmarks do not evaluate proof-writing capabilities, which are crucial for many mathematical tasks.
To address this, we introduce MathArena, a new benchmark based on the following key insight: recurring math competitions provide a stream of high-quality, challenging problems that can be used for real-time evaluation of LLMs. By evaluating models as soon as new problems are released, we effectively eliminate the risk of contamination.
Using this framework, we find strong signs of contamination in AIME 2024. Nonetheless, evaluations on harder competitions, such as CMIMC 2025, demonstrate impressive reasoning capabilities in top-performing models.
MathArena is also the first benchmark for proof-writing capabilities. On IMO 2025, top models achieve slightly less than 40\%, demonstrating both notable progress and significant room for improvement.
So far, we have evaluated over $50$ models across seven competitions, totaling $162$ problems. As an evolving benchmark, MathArena will continue to track the progress of LLMs on newly released competitions, ensuring rigorous and up-to-date evaluation of mathematical reasoning.
abstract_zh: MathArena 是一个新的基准，基于一个关键观察：周期性数学竞赛源源不断提供高质量、具挑战性的问题，可用于大型语言模型的实时评估。因为模型在新题发布后即可测试，基本消除了数据污染的风险，利用该框架我们发现 AIME 2024 存在明显污染迹象。然而，在更难的比赛（如 CMIMC 2025）上评估表明表现最好的模型展现出令人印象深刻的推理能力。MathArena 还成为首个评估证明书写能力的基准，在 IMO 2025 上表现最好的模型仅略低于 40% 的正确率，既证明了显著进步，也凸显了巨大提升空间。迄今为止，我们已针对七场竞赛评估了 50 多个模型，共计 162 道题目。作为一个不断演化的基准，MathArena 将持续追踪新发布竞赛中 LLM 的表现，确保数学推理能力的评估保持严格与最新。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Differentially Private Quantiles with Smaller Error
title_zh: 误差更小的差分隐私分位数
abstract:
In the approximate quantiles problem, the goal is to output $m$ quantile estimates, the ranks of which are as close as possible to $m$ given quantiles $0 \leq q_1 \leq\dots \leq q_m \leq 1$. 
We present a mechanism for approximate quantiles that satisfies $\varepsilon$-differential privacy for a dataset of $n$ real numbers where the ratio between the distance between the closest pair of points and the size of the domain is bounded by $\psi$.
As long as the minimum gap between quantiles is sufficiently large, $|q_i-q_{i-1}|\geq \Omega\left(\frac{m\log(m)\log(\psi)}{n\varepsilon}\right)$ for all $i$, the maximum rank error of our mechanism is $O\left(\frac{\log(\psi) + \log^2(m)}{\varepsilon}\right)$ with high probability.
Previously, the best known algorithm under pure DP was due to Kaplan, Schnapp, and Stemmer (ICML '22), who achieved a bound of $O\left(\frac{\log(\psi)\log^2(m) + \log^3(m)}{\varepsilon}\right)$. 
Our improvement stems from the use of continual counting techniques which allows the quantiles to be randomized in a correlated manner.
We also present an $(\varepsilon,\delta)$-differentially private mechanism that relaxes the gap assumption without affecting the error bound, improving on existing methods when $\delta$ is sufficiently close to zero.
We provide experimental evaluation  which confirms that our mechanism performs favorably compared to prior work in practice, in particular when the number of quantiles $m$ is large.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种近似分位数机制，对由 \(n\) 个实数构成的数据集满足 \(\varepsilon\)-差分隐私，且在最接近的两个数据点之间的距离与取值域大小之比受 \(\psi\) 约束的情况下，输出 \(m\) 个分位数估计，其秩尽量靠近给定的 \(0 \leq q_1 \leq \dots \leq q_m \leq 1\)；只要每个相邻分位数之间的最小间隔达到 \(|q_i-q_{i-1}|\geq \Omega\!\left(\frac{m\log(m)\log(\psi)}{n\varepsilon}\right)\)，我们的机制便能以高概率实现最大秩误差 \(O\!\left(\frac{\log(\psi)+\log^2(m)}{\varepsilon}\right)\)。此前在纯差分隐私下的最优算法是 Kaplan/Schnapp/Stemmer（ICML ’22），其误差上界为 \(O\!\left(\frac{\log(\psi)\log^2(m)+\log^3(m)}{\varepsilon}\right)\)。本工作通过引入持续计数（continual counting）技术，实现了分位数以相关方式随机化，从而获得误差改进。此外，我们还给出一个在 \((\varepsilon,\delta)\)-差分隐私模型下的机制，该机制在不改变误差上界的情况下放宽了间隔假设，尤其在 \(\delta\) 足够接近 \(0\) 时优于现有方法。实验评估表明，在实际中尤其是分位数数量 \(m\) 较大时，我们的机制性能优于已有工作。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: JavisDiT: Joint Audio-Video Diffusion Transformer with Hierarchical Spatio-Temporal Prior Synchronization
title_zh: JavisDiT：具有分层时空先验同步的联合音视频扩散Transformer
abstract: This paper introduces JavisDiT, a novel Joint Audio-Video Diffusion Trans- former designed for synchronized audio-video generation (JAVG). Based on the powerful Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture, JavisDiT simultaneously generates high-quality audio and video content from open-ended user prompts in a unified framework. To ensure audio-video synchronization, we introduce a fine-grained spatio-temporal alignment mechanism through a Hierarchical Spatial-Temporal Synchronized Prior (HiST-Sypo) Estimator. This module extracts both global and fine-grained spatio-temporal priors, guiding the synchronization between the visual and auditory components. Furthermore, we propose a new benchmark, JavisBench, which consists of 10,140 high-quality text-captioned sounding videos and focuses on synchronization evaluation in diverse and complex real-world scenarios. Further, we specifically devise a robust metric for measuring the synchrony between generated audio-video pairs in real-world content. Experimental results demonstrate that JavisDiT significantly outperforms existing methods by ensuring both high-quality generation and precise synchronization, setting a new standard for JAVG tasks. Our code, model, and data are available at https://javisverse.github.io/JavisDiT-page/.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 JavisDiT，一种新颖的联合音视频扩散 Transformer，旨在实现同步音视频生成（JAVG）。基于强大的扩散 Transformer（DiT）架构，JavisDiT 在统一框架中根据开放式用户提示同时生成高质量的音频和视频内容。为确保音视频同步，我们通过分层时空同步先验（HiST-Sypo）估计器引入了一种细粒度的时空对齐机制。该模块提取全局和细粒度的时空先验，以指导视觉与听觉成分之间的同步。此外，我们提出了一个新的基准 JavisBench，其由 10,140 个带有高质量文本描述的有声视频组成，重点关注多样且复杂的真实世界场景中的同步评估。进一步地，我们专门设计了一种稳健指标，用于衡量真实世界内容中生成音视频对之间的同步性。实验结果表明，JavisDiT 通过同时保证高质量生成和精确同步，显著优于现有方法，为 JAVG 任务树立了新的标准。我们的代码、模型和数据可在 https://javisverse.github.io/JavisDiT-page/ 获取。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Coarse-to-Fine 3D Part Assembly via Semantic Super-Parts and Symmetry-Aware Pose Estimation
title_zh: 基于语义超部件与考虑对称性的位姿估计的粗到细 3D 部件组装
abstract: We propose a novel two-stage framework, Coarse-to-Fine Part Assembly (CFPA), for 3D shape assembly from basic parts. Effective part assembly demands precise local geometric reasoning for accurate component assembly, as well as global structural understanding to ensure semantic coherence and plausible configurations. CFPA addresses this challenge by integrating semantic abstraction and symmetry-aware reasoning into a unified pose prediction process. In the first stage, semantic super-parts are constructed via an optimal transport formulation to capture high-level object structure, which is then propagated to individual parts through a dual-range feature propagation mechanism. The second stage refines part poses via cross-stage feature interaction and instance-level geometric encoding, improving spatial precision and coherence. To enable diverse yet valid assemblies, we introduce a symmetry-aware loss that jointly models both self-symmetry and inter-part geometric similarity, allowing for diverse but structurally consistent assemblies. Extensive experiments on the PartNet benchmark demonstrate that CFPA achieves state-of-the-art performance in assembly accuracy, structural consistency, and diversity across multiple categories.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的两阶段框架“由粗到细的部件装配”（CFPA），用于从基础部件进行三维形状装配。有效的部件装配既需要精确的局部几何推理以实现准确的组件装配，也需要全局结构理解以保证语义一致性和合理的配置。CFPA 通过将语义抽象与对称性感知推理集成到统一的位姿预测过程中来应对这一挑战。在第一阶段，通过最优传输公式构建语义超部件，以捕获高层次的对象结构，然后通过双范围特征传播机制将其传递到各个单独部件。第二阶段通过跨阶段特征交互和实例级几何编码来细化部件位姿，从而提高空间精度和一致性。为实现多样但有效的装配，我们引入了一种对称性感知损失，联合建模自对称性和部件间几何相似性，从而允许生成多样但结构一致的装配结果。在 PartNet 基准上的大量实验表明，CFPA 在多个类别上的装配精度、结构一致性和多样性方面均达到了最先进性能。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Grounding-IQA: Grounding Multimodal Language Model for Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: Grounding-IQA：为图像质量评估赋能的多模态语言模型
abstract:
The development of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) enables the evaluation of image quality through natural language descriptions. This advancement allows for more detailed assessments. However, these MLLM-based IQA methods primarily rely on general contextual descriptions, sometimes limiting fine-grained quality assessment. To address this limitation, we introduce a new image quality assessment (IQA) task paradigm, **grounding-IQA**. This paradigm integrates multimodal referring and grounding with IQA to realize more fine-grained quality perception, thereby extending existing IQA. Specifically, grounding-IQA comprises two subtasks: grounding-IQA-description (GIQA-DES) and visual question answering (GIQA-VQA). GIQA-DES involves detailed descriptions with precise locations (e.g., bounding boxes), while GIQA-VQA focuses on quality QA for local regions. To realize grounding-IQA, we construct a corresponding dataset, GIQA-160K, through our proposed automated annotation pipeline. Furthermore, we develop a well-designed benchmark, GIQA-Bench. The benchmark comprehensively evaluates the model grounding-IQA performance from three perspectives: description quality, VQA accuracy, and grounding precision. 
Experiments demonstrate that our proposed task paradigm, dataset, and benchmark facilitate the more fine-grained IQA application. Code will be made public.
abstract_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的发展使得能够通过自然语言描述来评估图像质量。这一进展可以实现更为细致的评估。然而，基于 MLLM 的 IQA 方法主要依赖于通用的上下文描述，这有时会限制细粒度的质量评估。为了解决这一局限性，我们提出了一种新的图像质量评估（IQA）任务范式，即 grounding-IQA。该范式将多模态指代表达与定位同 IQA 相结合，以实现更细粒度的质量感知，从而扩展现有的 IQA。具体而言，grounding-IQA 包含两个子任务：grounding-IQA-description（GIQA-DES）和视觉问答（GIQA-VQA）。GIQA-DES 涉及带有精确位置（例如边界框）的详细描述，而 GIQA-VQA 则聚焦于局部区域的质量问答。为实现 grounding-IQA，我们通过提出的自动化标注流水线构建了相应的数据集 GIQA-160K。此外，我们还开发了一个设计完善的基准测试 GIQA-Bench。该基准从三个方面全面评估模型的 grounding-IQA 性能：描述质量、VQA 准确率和定位精度。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: PDPO: Parametric Density Path Optimization
title_zh: PDPO：参数化密度路径优化
abstract:
We introduce Parametric Density Path Optimization (PDPO), a novel method for computing action-minimizing paths between probability densities. The core idea is to represent the target probability path as the pushforward of a reference density through a parametric map, transforming the original infinite-dimensional optimization over densities to a finite-dimensional one over the parameters of the map. We derive a static formulation of the dynamic problem of action minimization and propose cubic spline interpolation of the path in parameter space to solve the static problem. Theoretically, we establish an error bound of the action under proper assumptions on the regularity of the parameter path. Empirically, we find that using 3–5 control points of the spline interpolation suffices to accurately resolve both multimodal and high-dimensional problems. We demonstrate that
PDPO can flexibly accommodate a wide range of potential terms, including those modeling obstacles, mean-field interactions, stochastic control, and higher-order dynamics. Our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches in benchmark tasks, demonstrating superior computational efficiency and solution quality.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了参数化密度路径优化（PDPO），这是一种用于计算概率密度之间作用量最小路径的新方法。其核心思想是将目标概率路径表示为参考密度经由参数化映射后的推前，从而把原始在密度上的无限维优化问题转化为在映射参数上的有限维优化问题。我们推导了作用量最小化这一动态问题的静态表述，并提出在参数空间中对路径进行三次样条插值以求解该静态问题。理论上，我们在对参数路径正则性作出适当假设的条件下，建立了作用量的误差界。经验上，我们发现使用样条插值的 3 到 5 个控制点就足以准确求解多峰和高维问题。我们证明了
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Streaming DiLoCo with overlapping communication
title_zh: 带重叠通信的流式DiLoCo
abstract: Training of large language models (LLMs) is typically distributed across a large number of accelerators to reduce training time. Since internal states and parameter gradients need to be exchanged at each and every single gradient step, all devices need to be co-located using low-latency high-bandwidth communication links to support the required high volume of data exchange. Recently, algorithms like DiLoCo have relaxed the constraint that all devices need co-location: accelerators can be grouped into ``workers'', where synchronizations between workers need only occur infrequently. This in turn means that workers can afford being connected by lower bandwidth communication links without affecting learning quality. However, in these methods, communication across workers still requires the same peak bandwidth as before, as the synchronizations require all parameters to be exchanged across all workers. In this paper, we improve DiLoCo in three ways. First, we synchronize only subsets of parameters in sequence, rather than all at once, which greatly reduces peak bandwidth. Second, we allow workers to continue training while synchronizing, which decreases wall clock time. Third, we quantize the data exchanged by workers, which further reduces bandwith across workers. We show experimentally that by properly combining these modifications we can distribute training of billion-scale parameters and attain models of similar quality as before, but reducing required bandwidth by a factor of up to two orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型的训练通常分布在大量加速器上开展，以缩短训练时长。由于每一步梯度更新都需要交换内部状态与参数梯度，所有设备必须同地部署，通过低延迟高带宽通信链路支撑所需的海量数据交换。近期，DiLoCo等算法放宽了所有设备必须同地部署的限制：加速器可被划分为多个“工作节点”，工作节点之间仅需不定期执行同步。这相应意味着工作节点之间可通过带宽更低的通信链路连接，且不会影响训练质量。但这类方法中，工作节点间的通信仍需要与此前相同的峰值带宽，因为同步操作需要在所有工作节点之间交换全部参数。本文从三个方面对DiLoCo进行改进。第一，我们按顺序仅同步参数子集而非一次性同步全部参数，大幅降低了峰值带宽。第二，我们允许工作节点在同步的同时继续训练，减少了实际运行时长。第三，我们对工作节点间交换的数据进行量化，进一步降低了工作节点间的带宽消耗。我们通过实验证明，通过合理组合这些改进方案，我们可对十亿参数规模的模型进行分布式训练，得到的模型质量与原有方法相当，但所需带宽最多可降低两个数量级。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: PARTONOMY: Large Multimodal Models with Part-Level Visual Understanding
title_zh: PARTONOMY：具备零件级视觉理解的大型多模态模型
abstract:
Real-world objects are composed of distinctive, object-specific parts. Identifying these parts is key to performing fine-grained, compositional reasoning—yet, large multimodal models (LMMs) struggle to perform this seemingly straightforward task. In this work, we introduce PARTONOMY, an LMM benchmark designed for pixel-level part grounding. We construct PARTONOMY from existing part datasets and our own rigorously annotated set of images, encompassing 862 parts and 5346
objects for evaluation. Unlike existing datasets that simply ask models to identify generic parts, PARTONOMY utilizes highly technical concepts and challenges models to compare objects’ parts, consider part-whole relationships, and justify textual predictions with visual segmentations. Our experiments demonstrate significant limitations in state-of-the-art LMMs (e.g., LISA-13B achieves only 5.9% gIoU), highlighting a critical gap in their part grounding abilities. We note that existing segmentation-enabled LMMs (segmenting LMMs) have two key architectural shortcomings: they use special [SEG] tokens not seen during pretraining which induce distribution shift, and they discard predicted segmentations instead of using past predictions to guide future ones. To address these deficiencies, we train several part-centric LMMs and propose PLUM, a novel segmenting LMM that utilizes span tagging instead of segmentation tokens and that conditions on prior predictions in a feedback loop. We find that pretrained PLUM dominates existing segmenting LMMs on reasoning segmentation, VQA, and visual hallucination benchmarks. In addition, PLUM finetuned on our proposed Explanatory Part Segmentation task is competitive with segmenting LMMs trained on significantly more segmentation data. Our work opens up new avenues towards enabling fine-grained, grounded visual understanding in LMMs.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中的物体由独特的、物体特有的部件组成。识别这些部件是进行细粒度、组合式推理的关键，然而，大型多模态模型（LMM）在执行这一看似直接的任务时却面临困难。在这项工作中，我们引入了 PARTONOMY，这是一个为像素级部件定位而设计的 LMM 基准。我们基于现有的部件数据集以及我们自己经过严格标注的图像集合构建了 PARTONOMY，其中涵盖了 862 个部件和 5346 个
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Channel-Aware Mixed-Precision Quantization for Efficient Long-Context Inference
title_zh: 面向高效长上下文推理的通道感知混合精度量化
abstract:
The key-value (KV) cache plays a vital role in accelerating autoregressive inference for large language models (LLMs). However, its linear memory growth with sequence length poses significant memory bottlenecks, especially in long-context scenarios.
Quantization offers a promising solution for memory efficiency. While existing methods typically apply channel-wise quantization to the key cache and token-wise quantization to the value cache, they suffer from severe performance degradation under low-bit configurations. Our analysis reveals that quantization sensitivity varies across individual KV channels, presenting an opportunity for non-uniform bit allocation. Following this finding, we propose ChanMix, a mixed-precision quantization framework that supports channel-wise quantization on 2-bit setting with FP8 precision with a custom Triton kernel implementation. To improve low-bit quantization performance, we introduce a channel-aware bit reallocation strategy, which allocates bits across channel sensitivity.
Through extensive evaluation, ChanMix demonstrates superior performance across the NIAH, RULER, and InfiniteBench benchmarks for the Llama, Mistral, and Qwen model families, achieving improvements of at least 5 absolute percentage points on RULER compared to all baseline methods. Additionally, ChanMix enables a 2.3× increase in batch size and supports a 1.5× longer context length during inference.
abstract_zh:
键值（KV）缓存在加速大语言模型（LLM）的自回归推理过程中发挥着关键作用。然而，其内存占用随序列长度线性增长，会带来严重的内存瓶颈，在长上下文场景中这一问题尤为突出。
量化是提升内存效率的极具潜力的解决方案。现有方法通常对键缓存应用通道级量化，对值缓存应用令牌级量化，但这类方法在低位宽配置下会出现严重的性能下降。我们的分析表明，不同KV通道的量化敏感度存在差异，这为非均匀位宽分配提供了契机。基于这一发现，我们提出ChanMix，这一混合精度量化框架通过自定义Triton内核实现，支持2位设置下的通道级量化与FP8精度。为提升低位量化性能，我们引入了通道感知位宽重分配策略，根据各通道的敏感度分配位宽。
经广泛评估验证，ChanMix在Llama、Mistral和Qwen模型族的NIAH、RULER与InfiniteBench基准测试中均表现出更优性能，与所有基线方法相比，其在RULER基准上的性能提升至少达到5个绝对百分点。此外，ChanMix可将推理阶段的批大小提升2.3倍，同时支持的上下文长度延长1.5倍。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: Incorporating Expert Priors into Bayesian Optimization via Dynamic Mean Decay
title_zh: 通过动态均值衰减将专家先验纳入贝叶斯优化
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a powerful approach for black-box optimization, and in many real-world problems, domain experts possess valuable prior knowledge about promising regions of the search space. However, existing prior-informed BO methods are often overly complex, tied to specific acquisition functions, or highly sensitive to inaccurate priors. We propose DynMeanBO, a simple and general framework that incorporates expert priors into the Gaussian process mean function with a dynamic decay mechanism. This design allows BO to exploit expert knowledge in the early stages while gradually reverting to standard BO behavior, ensuring robustness against misleading priors while retaining the exploratory behavior of standard BO. DynMeanBO is broadly compatible with acquisition functions, introduces negligible computational cost, and comes with convergence guarantees under Expected Improvement and Upper Confidence Bound. Experiments on synthetic benchmarks and hyperparameter optimization tasks show that DynMeanBO accelerates convergence with informative priors and remains robust under biased ones.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化（BO）是黑盒优化的一种强大方法，在许多现实问题中，领域专家掌握着关于搜索空间中有希望区域的宝贵先验知识。然而，现有的先验引导型 BO 方法往往过于复杂、依赖于特定的采集函数，或对不准确的先验高度敏感。我们提出了 DynMeanBO，这是一种简单且通用的框架，通过带有动态衰减机制的高斯过程均值函数来融入专家先验。该设计使 BO 能够在早期阶段利用专家知识，同时逐步回归到标准 BO 行为，从而在保留标准 BO 探索行为的同时，确保对误导性先验的鲁棒性。DynMeanBO 与采集函数广泛兼容，引入的计算开销可以忽略不计，并且在期望改进和上置信界下具有收敛保证。在合成基准和超参数优化任务上的实验表明，DynMeanBO 在信息性先验下能够加速收敛，并且在存在偏置先验时依然保持鲁棒性。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Precise Information Control in Long-Form Text Generation
title_zh: 长篇文本生成中的精确信息控制
abstract: A central challenge in language models (LMs) is faithfulness hallucination: the generation of information unsubstantiated by input context. To study this problem, we propose Precise Information Control (PIC), a new task formulation that requires models to generate long-form outputs grounded in a provided set of short self-contained statements, without adding any unsupported ones. PIC includes a full setting that tests a model’s ability to include exactly all input claims, and a partial setting that requires the model to selectively incorporate only relevant claims. We present PIC-Bench, a benchmark of eight long-form generation tasks (e.g., summarization, biography generation) adapted to the PIC setting, where LMs are supplied with well-formed, verifiable input claims. Our evaluation of a range of open and proprietary LMs on PIC-Bench reveals that, surprisingly, state-of-the-art LMs still hallucinate against user-provided input in over 70% of generations. To alleviate this lack of faithfulness, we introduce a post-training framework that uses a weakly supervised preference data construction method to train an 8B PIC-LM with stronger PIC ability—improving from 69.1% to 91.0% F1 in the full PIC setting. When integrated into end-to-end factual generation pipelines, PIC-LM improves exact match recall by 17.1% on ambiguous QA with retrieval, and factual precision by 30.5% on a birthplace fact-checking task, underscoring the potential of precisely grounded generation.
abstract_zh: 语言模型（LM）中的一个核心挑战是忠实性幻觉，即生成了无法由输入上下文证实的信息。为研究这一问题，我们提出精确信息控制（PIC），这是一种新的任务设定，要求模型基于给定的一组简短、自包含陈述生成长文本输出，且不添加任何不受支持的内容。PIC 包含完整设定，用于测试模型是否能准确包含全部输入主张；也包含部分设定，要求模型只选择性地纳入相关主张。我们提出了 PIC-Bench，这是一个适配到 PIC 设定下的八项长文本生成任务基准（如摘要生成、人物传记生成），其中语言模型会获得形式良好且可验证的输入主张。我们对一系列开源和闭源语言模型在 PIC-Bench 上的评估表明，令人惊讶的是，最先进的语言模型在超过 70% 的生成结果中，仍然会违背用户提供的输入而产生幻觉。为缓解这种忠实性不足，我们引入了一个后训练框架，利用一种弱监督偏好数据构造方法来训练一个具有更强 PIC 能力的 8B PIC-LM，使其在完整 PIC 设定下的 F1 从 69.1% 提升到 91.0%。当集成到端到端事实生成流程中时，PIC-LM 在带检索的歧义问答任务上将精确匹配召回率提升了 17.1%，并在一个出生地事实核查任务上将事实精度提升了 30.5%，凸显了精确扎根生成的潜力。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Strong Correlations Induce Cause Only Predictions in Transformer Training
title_zh: 强相关性在 Transformer 训练中导致仅包含因果预测
abstract: We revisit when Transformers can prioritize causes over spurious effects by viewing the problem through data correlation strength and the implicit regularization of gradient descent. We identify a phenomenon called Correlation Crowding-Out (CCO) arising from the training dynamics of Transformers. Specifically, under strongly correlated causal features, gradient descent filters out spurious cues and converges to a predictor that relies almost exclusively on the causes. Theoretically, using a simplified Transformer model trained on data from a minimal causal chain, we introduce a Dominant-coordinate condition that characterizes when CCO arises and explain its mechanism as a coupling of ''occupation'' and ''crowding-out''.  ''Occupation'' denotes to rapid growth of weights aligned with the dominant causal direction while non-dominant directions remain small. ''Crowding-out'' denotes to attention logits align with separation directions favoring the causal branch, suppressing descendants. We provide convergence guarantees for both the optimization trajectory and generalization. Our empirical results on simulated and real examples across various tasks including vision and natural language demonstrate the procedure. Together, these results show that, under suitable conditions, standard training alone can induce cause only prediction.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视了Transformer何时能够优先关注原因而非伪效应，并从数据相关性强度和梯度下降的隐式正则化角度来看待这一问题。我们识别出一种由Transformer训练动力学引发的现象，称为相关性挤出（Correlation Crowding-Out，CCO）。具体而言，在因果特征具有强相关性的情况下，梯度下降会滤除伪线索，并收敛到一个几乎完全依赖原因的预测器。从理论上看，基于一个在最小因果链生成数据上训练的简化Transformer模型，我们提出了一个主导坐标条件，用以刻画CCO何时出现，并将其机制解释为“占据”和“挤出”的耦合。“占据”指与主导因果方向对齐的权重快速增长，而非主导方向保持较小；“挤出”指注意力logit与有利于因果分支的分离方向对齐，从而抑制后代节点。我们对优化轨迹和泛化都给出了收敛保证。我们在涵盖视觉和自然语言等多种任务的模拟与真实示例上的实证结果展示了这一过程。综上，这些结果表明，在适当条件下，仅靠标准训练就能够诱导出仅基于原因的预测。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: DualMap: Enabling Both Cache Affinity and Load Balancing for Distributed LLM Serving
title_zh: DualMap：为分布式大语言模型服务同时实现缓存亲和性与负载均衡
abstract: In large language model (LLM) serving, reusing the key-value (KV) cache of prompts across requests is a key technique for reducing time-to-first-token (TTFT) and lowering serving costs. Cache-affinity scheduling, which co-locates requests with the same prompt prefix to maximize KV cache reuse, often conflicts with load-balancing scheduling, which aims to distribute requests evenly across compute instances. Existing schedulers struggle to reconcile this trade-off, as they operate within a single mapping space, typically applying cache-affinity routing to a subset of requests and load-balanced routing to the rest, without a unified solution to achieve both goals. To overcome this limitation, we propose DualMap, a dual-mapping scheduling strategy for distributed LLM serving that simultaneously enables cache affinity and load balancing. The key idea of DualMap is to map each request to two candidate instances using two independent hash functions based on the request prompt, and then intelligently select the better candidate based on current system states. This design increases the likelihood that requests with shared prefixes are co-located, while evenly dispersing distinct prefixes across the cluster via ``the power of two choices''. To make DualMap robust under dynamic and skewed real-world workloads, we incorporate three techniques: 1) SLO-aware request routing,  which prioritizes cache affinity but switches to load-aware scheduling when TTFT exceeds the SLO, enhancing load balance without sacrificing cache reuse; 2) hotspot-aware rebalancing, which dynamically migrates requests from overloaded to underloaded instances, mitigating hotspots and rebalancing the system; 3) lightweight dual-hash-ring scaling, which leverages a dual-hash-ring mapping to support fast and low-overhead instance scaling without costly global remapping. Experiments on real-world workloads show that DualMap improves effective request capacity by up to 2.25$\times$ under the same TTFT SLO constraints, compared with the state-of-the-art work.
abstract_zh: 在大语言模型（LLM）服务场景中，跨请求复用提示词的键值（KV）缓存是缩短首令牌生成时间（TTFT）、降低服务成本的核心技术。缓存亲和性调度会将具有相同提示词前缀的请求调度到同一节点，以最大化KV缓存复用率，但这一调度策略通常与负载均衡调度存在冲突，后者的目标是将请求均匀分发到各个计算实例。现有调度器难以协调这一权衡关系，因为它们均在单一映射空间内运行，通常仅对部分请求采用缓存亲和性路由，对其余请求采用负载均衡路由，并未提出可同时实现两个目标的统一解决方案。为突破这一限制，我们提出DualMap，一种面向分布式LLM服务的双映射调度策略，可同时实现缓存亲和性与负载均衡。DualMap的核心思路是基于请求的提示词，通过两个独立的哈希函数将每个请求映射到两个候选实例，再根据当前系统状态智能选择更优的候选实例。这种设计提升了带有共享前缀的请求被调度到同一节点的概率，同时通过“二选优势”将不同前缀的请求均匀分散到集群中。为了让DualMap在动态、偏态的真实工作负载下仍具备鲁棒性，我们融合了三项技术：1）服务级别目标（SLO）感知的请求路由，该机制优先保障缓存亲和性，但当TTFT超出SLO要求时会切换为负载感知调度，在不牺牲缓存复用率的前提下提升负载均衡效果；2）热点感知再平衡，动态将过载实例的请求迁移到负载不足的实例，缓解热点问题并实现系统再平衡；3）轻量级双哈希环扩缩容，利用双哈希环映射支持快速、低开销的实例扩缩容，无需执行成本高昂的全局重映射。基于真实工作负载的实验结果表明，与现有最优方案相比，在相同的TTFT SLO约束下，DualMap可将有效请求容量最高提升2.25倍。
notes: 调度专项得分=13；命中组=llm_serving；augment_batch=20260402-scheduling；augment_score=13

title: KVTuner: Sensitivity-Aware Layer-Wise Mixed-Precision KV Cache Quantization for Efficient and Nearly Lossless LLM Inference
title_zh: KVTuner：面向高效近乎无损LLM推理的感知敏感分层混合精度KV缓存量化
abstract:
KV cache quantization can improve Large Language Models (LLMs) inference throughput and latency in long contexts and large batch-size scenarios while preserving LLMs effectiveness.
However, current methods have three unsolved issues: overlooking layer-wise sensitivity to KV cache quantization, high overhead of online fine-grained decision-making, and low flexibility to different LLMs and constraints. Therefore, we theoretically analyze the inherent correlation of layer-wise transformer attention patterns to KV cache quantization errors and study why key cache is generally more important than value cache for quantization error reduction. We further propose a simple yet effective framework KVTuner to adaptively search for the optimal hardware-friendly layer-wise KV quantization precision pairs for coarse-grained KV cache with multi-objective optimization and directly utilize the offline searched configurations during online inference.
To reduce the computational cost of offline calibration, we utilize the intra-layer KV precision pair pruning and inter-layer clustering to reduce the search space. Experimental results show that we can achieve nearly lossless 3.25-bit mixed precision KV cache quantization for LLMs like Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct and 4.0-bit for sensitive models like Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct on mathematical reasoning tasks. The maximum inference throughput can be improved by 21.25\% compared with KIVI-KV8 quantization over various context lengths. Our code and searched configurations are available at https://github.com/cmd2001/KVTuner.
abstract_zh: KV缓存量化可在长上下文和大批次场景下提升大语言模型（LLM）的推理吞吐量、降低推理延迟，同时保留大语言模型的性能。然而现有方法存在三个尚未解决的问题：忽视了各层对KV缓存量化的敏感度、在线细粒度决策的开销高、对不同大语言模型和约束条件的适配灵活性低。因此，我们从理论层面分析了Transformer各层注意力模式与KV缓存量化误差的内在关联，探究了在降低量化误差方面键缓存通常比值缓存更重要的原因。我们进一步提出了一个简单且有效的框架KVTuner，该框架通过多目标优化为粗粒度KV缓存自适应搜索对硬件友好的最优分层KV量化精度对，在线推理阶段可直接使用离线搜索得到的配置。为降低离线校准的计算成本，我们利用层内KV精度对剪枝和层间聚类来缩小搜索空间。实验结果表明，针对Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct这类大语言模型，我们可实现接近无损的3.25比特混合精度KV缓存量化；针对Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct这类对量化敏感的模型，我们在数学推理任务上可实现4.0比特的接近无损量化。在多种上下文长度下，与KIVI-KV8量化方法相比，我们的方法最高可将推理吞吐量提升21.25%。我们的代码和搜索得到的配置可在https://github.com/cmd2001/KVTuner获取。
notes: 自动关键词筛选得分=34；命中=kv cache, long context, throughput, latency, serving, quantization, pruning, mixed-precision

title: AutoTool: Automatic Scaling of Tool-Use Capabilities in RL via Decoupled Entropy Constraints
title_zh: AutoTool：通过解耦熵约束在强化学习中自动扩展工具使用能力
abstract:
Tool use represents a critical capability for AI agents, with recent advances focusing on leveraging reinforcement learning (RL) for test-time scaling to achieve better performance through more deliberate reasoning. 
However, there are some key challenges in current RL-based scaling approaches: 
(a) direct RL training often struggles to scale up thinking length sufficiently to solve complex problems, 
and (b) scaled-up models tend to overthink simpler problems, resulting in substantial token inefficiency.
To address these challenges, we propose a novel training paradigm that first employs warm-up supervised fine-tuning to help models distinguish between simple and complex problems, followed by RL that enable models to automatically determine appropriate reasoning trajectories. 
Furthermore, to tackle the issue of automatic thinking-length scaling, we discover that entropy-based optimization objectives effectively maintain model diversity while successfully unlocking the model's scaling capabilities.
Based on this insight, we introduce an entropy-based long-short reasoning fusion RL strategy. 
Our experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate that model successfully achieves auto-scaling for efficient tool use, achieving significant 9.8\% accuracy improvements while reducing computational overhead by ~81\%.
abstract_zh: AutoTool 提出一种新的训练范式：先用监督微调让模型分辨简单与复杂问题，再用强化学习让模型自动选择合适的推理路径，从而推动工具使用能力的自动扩展。针对直接强化学习难以拉长思维长度以及扩展后模型在简单任务上过度计算的挑战，我们进一步发现基于熵的优化目标能在保持模型多样性的同时有效激活其扩展能力。由此引出一种基于熵的长短推理融合强化学习策略，使模型在自动伸缩思维长度的过程中避免过度思考。三个基准测试表明，AutoTool 在保持高效思维轨迹的同时，实现了自动扩展的工具使用能力，准确率提升了约 9.8%，计算开销则缩减了约 81%。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: SALS: Sparse Attention in Latent Space for KV Cache Compression
title_zh: SALS：用于 KV 缓存压缩的潜在空间稀疏注意力
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) capable of handling extended contexts are in high demand, yet their inference remains challenging due to substantial Key-Value (KV) cache size and high memory bandwidth requirements. Previous research has demonstrated that KV cache exhibits low-rank characteristics within the hidden dimension, suggesting the potential for effective compression. However, due to the widely adopted Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) mechanism in modern LLMs, naive low‑-rank compression suffers severe accuracy degradation or creates a new speed bottleneck, as the low-rank cache must first be reconstructed in order to apply RoPE. In this paper, we introduce two key insights: first, the application of RoPE to the key vectors increases their variance, which in turn results in a higher rank; second, after the key vectors are transformed into the latent space, they largely maintain their representation across most layers. Based on these insights, we propose the Sparse Attention in Latent Space (SALS) framework. SALS projects the KV cache into a compact latent space via low-rank projection, and performs sparse token selection using RoPE-free query--key interactions in this space. By reconstructing only a small subset of important tokens, it avoids the overhead of full KV cache reconstruction. We comprehensively evaluate SALS on various tasks using two large-scale models: LLaMA2-7b-chat and Mistral-7b, and additionally verify its scalability on the RULER-128k benchmark with LLaMA3.1-8B-Instruct. Experimental results demonstrate that SALS achieves SOTA performance by maintaining competitive accuracy. Under different settings, SALS achieves 6.4-fold KV cache compression and 5.7-fold speed-up in the attention operator compared to FlashAttention2 on the 4K sequence. For the end-to-end throughput performance, we achieves 1.4-fold and 4.5-fold improvement compared to GPT-fast on 4k and 32K sequences, respectively. The source code will be publicly available in the future.
abstract_zh: 能够处理长上下文的大语言模型（LLM）需求旺盛，但由于键值（KV）缓存规模庞大、内存带宽要求高，其推理过程仍存在挑战。已有研究证明，KV缓存在隐层维度上具备低秩特性，说明其存在高效压缩的潜力。然而，由于现代大语言模型广泛采用旋转位置嵌入（RoPE）机制，朴素低秩压缩会出现严重的精度下降，或是产生新的速度瓶颈，因为要应用RoPE必须先重建低秩缓存。本文提出两项核心洞见：第一，对键向量应用RoPE会增大其方差，进而导致秩升高；第二，键向量被转换到隐空间后，其表示在绝大多数层中基本保持稳定。基于上述洞见，我们提出隐空间稀疏注意力（SALS）框架。SALS通过低秩投影将KV缓存映射到紧凑的隐空间中，并在该空间内使用无需RoPE的查询-键交互完成稀疏令牌选择。通过仅重建一小部分重要令牌，SALS避免了完整KV缓存重建带来的开销。我们使用LLaMA2-7b-chat和Mistral-7b两个大规模模型在多种任务上对SALS开展了全面评估，另外还通过LLaMA3.1-8B-Instruct在RULER-128k基准测试上验证了其可扩展性。实验结果表明，SALS在保持具备竞争力的精度的同时实现了当前最优性能。在不同设置下，针对4K长度序列，SALS相比FlashAttention2实现了6.4倍的KV缓存压缩率，注意力算子速度提升5.7倍。端到端吞吐量性能方面，针对4K和32K长度序列，我们的方法相比GPT-fast分别实现了1.4倍和4.5倍的提升。源代码未来将公开发布。
notes: 自动关键词筛选得分=20；命中=kv cache, cache compression, throughput, compression, inference, language model, large language model, llm

title: Delving into Cascaded Instability: A Lipschitz Continuity View on Image Restoration and Object Detection Synergy
title_zh: 深入探究级联不稳定性：从Lipschitz连续性视角看图像修复与目标检测协同
abstract: To improve detection robustness in adverse conditions (e.g., haze and low light), image restoration is commonly applied as a pre-processing step to enhance image quality for the detector. However, the functional mismatch between restoration and detection networks can introduce instability and hinder effective integration---an issue that remains underexplored. We revisit this limitation through the lens of Lipschitz continuity, analyzing the functional differences between restoration and detection networks in both the input space and the parameter space. Our analysis shows that restoration networks perform smooth, continuous transformations, while object detectors operate with discontinuous decision boundaries, making them highly sensitive to minor perturbations. This mismatch introduces instability in traditional cascade frameworks, where even imperceptible noise from restoration is amplified during detection, disrupting gradient flow and hindering optimization. To address this, we propose Lipschitz-regularized object detection (LROD), a simple yet effective framework that integrates image restoration directly into the detector’s feature learning, harmonizing the Lipschitz continuity of both tasks during training. We implement this framework as Lipschitz-regularized YOLO (LR-YOLO), extending seamlessly to existing YOLO detectors. Extensive experiments on haze and low-light benchmarks demonstrate that LR-YOLO consistently improves detection stability, optimization smoothness, and overall accuracy.
abstract_zh: 为提高检测器在恶劣条件（如雾霾和低照度）下的鲁棒性，通常将图像复原作为预处理步骤，以提升输入检测器的图像质量。然而，复原网络与检测网络之间的功能失配会引入不稳定性，并阻碍二者的有效集成，而这一问题仍缺乏充分研究。我们从 Lipschitz 连续性的视角重新审视这一局限，分析了复原网络与检测网络在输入空间和参数空间中的功能差异。分析表明，复原网络执行的是平滑、连续的变换，而目标检测器具有不连续的决策边界，因此对微小扰动高度敏感。这种失配会在传统级联框架中引入不稳定性，即使是复原过程中产生的不可感知噪声，也会在检测阶段被放大，从而扰乱梯度流并阻碍优化。为此，我们提出了 Lipschitz 正则化目标检测（LROD），这是一种简单而有效的框架，可将图像复原直接整合到检测器的特征学习中，在训练过程中协调两项任务的 Lipschitz 连续性。我们将该框架实现为 Lipschitz 正则化 YOLO（LR-YOLO），并可无缝扩展到现有 YOLO 检测器。雾霾和低照度基准上的大量实验表明，LR-YOLO 能够持续提升检测稳定性、优化平滑性以及整体准确率。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Predictive Differential Training Guided by Training Dynamics
title_zh: 预测差分训练：以训练动态为指导
abstract: This paper centers around a novel concept proposed recently by researchers from the control community where the training process of a deep neural network can be considered a nonlinear dynamical system acting upon the high-dimensional weight space. Koopman operator theory (KOT), a data-driven dynamical system analysis framework, can then be deployed to discover the otherwise non-intuitive training dynamics. Taking advantage of the predictive power of KOT, the time-consuming Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) iterations can be then bypassed by directly predicting network weights a few epochs later. This "predictive training" framework, however, often suffers from gradient explosion especially for more extensive and complex models. In this paper, we incorporate the idea of "differential learning" into the predictive training framework and propose the so-called "predictive differential training" (PDT) for accelerated learning even for complex network structures. The key contribution is the design of an effective masking strategy based on a dynamic consistency analysis, which selects only those predicted weights whose local training dynamics align with the global dynamics. We refer to these predicted weights as high-fidelity predictions. DT also includes the design of an acceleration scheduler to adjust the prediction interval and rectify deviations from off-predictions. We demonstrate that PDT can be seamlessly integrated as a plug-in with a diverse array of existing optimizers (SGD, Adam, RMSprop, LAMB, etc.). The experimental results show consistent performance improvement across different network architectures and various datasets, in terms of faster convergence and reduced training time (10-40%) to achieve the baseline's best loss, while maintaining (if not improving) final model accuracy. As the idiom goes, a rising tide lifts all boats; in our context, a subset of high-fidelity predicted weights can accelerate the training of the entire network!
abstract_zh: 本文围绕控制领域研究者近期提出的一个新概念展开：深度神经网络的训练过程可以被视为作用于高维权重空间上的非线性动力系统。随后，可以利用 Koopman 算子理论（KOT）这一数据驱动的动力系统分析框架，来发现原本并不直观的训练动力学。借助 KOT 的预测能力，可以直接预测若干个 epoch 之后的网络权重，从而绕过耗时的随机梯度下降（SGD）迭代。然而，这种“预测训练”框架往往会遭受梯度爆炸问题，尤其是在更大规模、更复杂的模型中。本文将“差分学习”的思想融入预测训练框架，提出了所谓的“预测差分训练”（PDT），以便即使对于复杂网络结构也能实现加速学习。其关键贡献在于基于动态一致性分析设计了一种有效的掩码策略，只选择那些局部训练动力学与全局动力学一致的预测权重。我们将这些预测权重称为高保真预测。DT 还包括加速调度器的设计，用于调整预测间隔并纠正偏离预测所造成的误差。我们表明，PDT 可以作为插件无缝集成到多种现有优化器中（如 SGD、Adam、RMSprop、LAMB 等）。实验结果表明，在不同网络架构和多种数据集上，PDT 都能稳定提升性能，表现为更快收敛、达到基线最优损失所需训练时间减少 10% 至 40%，同时保持最终模型精度不变，甚至有所提升。正如俗语所说，水涨船高；在我们的语境中，一部分高保真预测权重就能加速整个网络的训练。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Debugging Concept Bottleneck Models through Removal and Retraining
title_zh: 通过去除与重新训练调试概念瓶颈模型
abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) use a set of human-interpretable concepts to predict the final task label, enabling domain experts to not only validate the CBM's predictions, but also intervene on incorrect concepts at test time. However, these interventions fail to address systemic misalignment between the CBM and the expert's reasoning, such as when the model learns shortcuts from biased data. To address this, we present a general interpretable debugging framework for CBMs that follows a two-step process of *Removal* and *Retraining*. In the *Removal* step, experts use concept explanations to identify and remove any undesired concepts. In the *Retraining* step, we introduce **CBDebug**, a novel method that leverages the interpretability of CBMs as a bridge for converting concept-level user feedback into sample-level auxiliary labels. These labels are then used to apply supervised bias mitigation and targeted augmentation, reducing the model’s reliance on undesired concepts. We evaluate our framework with both real and automated expert feedback, and find that **CBDebug** significantly outperforms prior retraining methods across multiple CBM architectures (PIP-Net, Post-hoc CBM) and benchmarks with known spurious correlations.
abstract_zh: 概念瓶颈模型（CBM）使用一组人类可解释的概念来预测最终任务标签，这使领域专家不仅能够验证 CBM 的预测，还能够在测试时对错误概念进行干预。然而，这类干预无法解决 CBM 与专家推理之间的系统性失配问题，例如当模型从带偏置的数据中学到捷径时。为此，我们提出了一个面向 CBM 的通用可解释调试框架，该框架遵循“移除”和“重训练”两步过程。在“移除”步骤中，专家利用概念解释识别并移除任何不期望的概念。在“重训练”步骤中，我们提出了 CBDebug，这是一种新方法，它利用 CBM 的可解释性作为桥梁，将概念层面的用户反馈转换为样本层面的辅助标签。随后利用这些标签实施有监督的偏置缓解和有针对性的增强，从而降低模型对不期望概念的依赖。我们使用真实专家反馈和自动化专家反馈对该框架进行了评估，结果发现，CBDebug 在多种 CBM 架构（PIP-Net、后验 CBM）以及具有已知伪相关性的基准上都显著优于先前的重训练方法。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Optimal Adjustment Sets for Nonparametric Estimation of Weighted Controlled Direct Effect
title_zh: 非参数估计加权受控直接效应的最优调整集
abstract: The weighted controlled direct effect (WCDE) generalizes the standard controlled direct effect (CDE) by averaging over the mediator distribution, providing a robust estimate when treatment effects vary across mediator levels. This makes the WCDE especially relevant in fairness analysis, where it isolates the direct effect of an exposure on an outcome, independent of mediating pathways. In this work, we first establish necessary and sufficient conditions for the unique identifiability of the WCDE, clarifying when it diverges from the CDE. Next, we derive the efficient influence function for the WCDE and consider the class of regular and asymptotically linear estimators. We characterize the optimal covariate adjustment set that minimizes asymptotic variance, demonstrating how mediator-confounder interactions introduce distinct requirements compared to average treatment effect estimation. Our results offer a principled framework for efficient estimation of direct effects in complex causal systems, with practical applications in fairness and mediation analysis.
abstract_zh: 加权控制直接效应（WCDE）通过对中介变量分布进行平均，推广了标准控制直接效应（CDE），当处理效应随中介变量水平而变化时，它能够提供稳健的估计。这使得 WCDE 在公平性分析中尤其相关，因为它能够分离暴露对结果的直接效应，而不受中介路径的影响。在这项工作中，我们首先建立了 WCDE 唯一可识别性的充要条件，阐明了它何时会偏离 CDE。接着，我们推导了 WCDE 的高效影响函数，并考察了正则且渐近线性的估计量这一类。我们刻画了使渐近方差最小的最优协变量调整集，展示了中介变量与混杂变量之间的交互如何相较于平均处理效应估计引入不同的要求。我们的结果为复杂因果系统中直接效应的高效估计提供了一个有原则的框架，并在公平性和中介分析中具有实际应用。
primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Towards Cognitively-Faithful Decision-Making Models to Improve AI Alignment
title_zh: 迈向认知忠实的决策模型以改善 AI 对齐
abstract: Recent AI trends seek to align AI models to learned human-centric objectives, such as personal preferences, utility, or societal values. Using standard preference elicitation methods, researchers and practitioners build models of human decisions and judgments, to which AI models are aligned. However, standard elicitation methods often fail to capture the true cognitive processes behind human decision making, such as the use of heuristics or simplifying structured thought patterns. To address this limitation, we take an axiomatic approach to learning cognitively faithful decision processes from pairwise comparisons. Building on the vast literature characterizing cognitive processes that contribute to human decision-making and pairwise comparisons, we derive a class of models in which individual features are first processed with learned rules, then aggregated via a fixed rule, such as the Bradley-Terry rule, to produce a decision. This structured processing of information ensures that such models are realistic and feasible candidates to represent underlying human decision-making processes. We demonstrate the efficacy of this modeling approach by learning interpretable models of human decision making in a kidney allocation task, and show that our proposed models match or surpass the accuracy of prior models of human pairwise decision-making.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能的发展趋势致力于使人工智能模型与学习得到的、以人为中心的目标保持一致，例如个人偏好、效用或社会价值。研究人员和从业者使用标准的偏好 elicitation 方法来构建人类决策与判断模型，并据此对人工智能模型进行对齐。然而，标准的 elicitation 方法往往无法捕捉人类决策背后的真实认知过程，例如启发式方法的使用或简化的结构化思维模式。为解决这一局限，我们采用公理化方法，从成对比较中学习在认知上忠实的决策过程。基于大量刻画促成人类决策和成对比较的认知过程的文献，我们推导出一类模型，其中各个特征首先通过学习得到的规则进行处理，然后通过固定规则（如 Bradley-Terry 规则）聚合以产生决策。这种结构化的信息处理方式确保了此类模型是表征潜在人类决策过程的现实且可行的候选者。我们通过在肾脏分配任务中学习可解释的人类决策模型，展示了这种建模方法的有效性，并表明我们提出的模型在人类成对决策建模的准确性上可与既有模型相当或超越既有模型。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Attention Is All You Need for KV Cache in Diffusion LLMs
title_zh: 扩散LLM中KV缓存只需注意力机制
abstract: This work studies how to adaptively recompute key–value (KV) caches for diffusion large language models (DLMs) to maximize prediction accuracy while minimizing decoding latency. Prior methods' decoders recompute QKV for all tokens at every denoising step and layer, despite KV states changing little across most steps, especially in shallow layers, leading to substantial redundancy. We make three observations: (1) distant MASK tokens primarily act as a length-bias and can be cached block-wise beyond the active prediction window; (2) KV dynamics increase with depth, suggesting that selective refresh starting from deeper layers is sufficient; and (3) the most-attended token exhibits the smallest KV drift, providing a conservative lower bound on cache change for other tokens. Building on these, we propose Elastic-Cache, a training-free, architecture-agnostic strategy that jointly decides ${when}$ to refresh (via an attention-aware drift test on the most-attended token) and ${where}$ to refresh (via a depth-aware schedule that recomputes from a chosen layer onward while reusing shallow-layer caches and off-window MASK caches). Unlike fixed-period schemes, Elastic-Cache performs adaptive, layer-aware cache updates for diffusion LLMs, reducing redundant computation and accelerating decoding with negligible loss in generation quality. Experiments on LLaDA-Instruct, LLaDA-1.5, and LLaDA-V across mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks demonstrate consistent speedups: $8.7\times$ on GSM8K (256 tokens), $45.1\times$ on longer sequences, and $4.8\times$ on HumanEval, while consistently maintaining higher accuracy than the baseline. Our method achieves significantly higher throughput ($6.8\times$ on GSM8K) than existing confidence-based approaches while preserving generation quality, enabling practical deployment of diffusion LLMs.
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨如何为扩散大语言模型（DLM）自适应重计算键值（KV）缓存，以在最小化解码延迟的同时最大化预测准确率。现有方法的解码器会在每个去噪步、每一层为所有令牌重计算QKV，然而KV状态在绝大多数步骤中变化极小，在浅层中尤为明显，因此会产生大量冗余。我们得出三项观察结论：第一，远距离MASK令牌主要起到长度偏置作用，可在活跃预测窗口之外按块缓存；第二，KV的动态性随网络深度增加而提升，说明从深层开始选择性刷新即可满足需求；第三，受关注度最高的令牌的KV漂移最小，可为其他令牌的缓存变化量提供保守下界。基于上述结论，我们提出Elastic-Cache，这是一种无需训练、与架构无关的策略，可同时决定何时刷新（通过对受关注度最高的令牌执行注意力感知漂移测试）以及何处刷新（通过深度感知调度，从选定层开始重计算，同时复用浅层缓存和窗口外的MASK缓存）。与固定周期方案不同，Elastic-Cache为扩散大语言模型执行自适应的层感知缓存更新，能够减少冗余计算、加速解码，且生成质量损失可忽略不计。我们在数学推理、代码生成任务上对LLaDA-Instruct、LLaDA-1.5和LLaDA-V开展实验，结果显示该方法实现了稳定的加速效果：在GSM8K（256令牌）上达到8.7倍加速，在更长序列上达到45.1倍加速，在HumanEval上达到4.8倍加速，同时准确率始终高于基线方法。我们的方法在保留生成质量的同时，吞吐量显著高于现有基于置信度的方法（在GSM8K上为其6.8倍），可支撑扩散大语言模型的实际部署。
notes: 仲裁采纳：human

title: PROXSPARSE: REGULARIZED LEARNING OF SEMI-STRUCTURED SPARSITY MASKS FOR PRETRAINED LLMS
title_zh: PROXSPARSE：对预训练大语言模型的半结构稀疏掩码进行正则化学习
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional performance in natural language processing tasks, yet their massive size makes serving them inefficient and costly. Semi-structured pruning has emerged as an effective method for model acceleration, but existing approaches are suboptimal because they focus on local, layer-wise optimizations using heuristic rules, failing to leverage global feedback. We present ProxSparse, a learning-based framework for mask selection enabled by regularized optimization. ProxSparse transforms the rigid, non-differentiable mask selection process into a smoother optimization procedure, allowing gradual mask exploration with flexibility. ProxSparse does not involve additional weight updates once the mask is determined. Our extensive evaluations on 7 widely used models show that ProxSparse consistently outperforms previously proposed semi-structured mask selection methods with significant improvement, demonstrating the effectiveness of our learned approach towards semi-structured pruning.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型在自然语言处理任务中展现出了卓越性能，但其庞大的规模导致部署效率低下、成本高昂。半结构化剪枝已成为一种有效的模型加速方法，但现有方法效果欠佳，因为这类方法采用启发式规则聚焦于局部逐层优化，未能利用全局反馈。我们提出ProxSparse，这是一种依托正则化优化实现掩码选择的基于学习的框架。ProxSparse将刚性、不可微的掩码选择过程转化为更平滑的优化流程，可灵活地逐步探索掩码。掩码确定后，ProxSparse无需进行额外的权重更新。我们针对7种常用模型开展的大量评估表明，ProxSparse始终显著优于此前提出的半结构化掩码选择方法，证明了我们提出的半结构化剪枝学习方法的有效性。
notes: 自动关键词筛选得分=17；命中=serving, pruning, sparsity, language model, large language model, llm

title: Conformal Prediction with Corrupted Labels: Uncertain Imputation and Robust Re-weighting
title_zh: 带有损坏标签的保形预测：不确定插补与鲁棒再加权
abstract: We introduce a framework for robust uncertainty quantification in situations where labeled training data are corrupted, through noisy or missing labels. We build on conformal prediction, a statistical tool for generating prediction sets that cover the test label with a pre-specified probability. The validity of conformal prediction, however, holds under the i.i.d assumption, which does not hold in our setting due to the corruptions in the data. To account for this distribution shift, the privileged conformal prediction (PCP) method proposed leveraging privileged information (PI)---additional features available only during training---to re-weight the data distribution, yielding valid prediction sets under the assumption that the weights are accurate. In this work, we analyze the robustness of PCP to inaccuracies in the weights. Our analysis indicates that PCP can still yield valid uncertainty estimates even when the weights are poorly estimated. Furthermore, we introduce uncertain imputation (UI), a new conformal method that does not rely on weight estimation. Instead, we impute corrupted labels in a way that preserves their uncertainty. Our approach is supported by theoretical guarantees and validated empirically on both synthetic and real benchmarks. Finally, we show that these techniques can be integrated into a triply robust framework, ensuring statistically valid predictions as long as at least one underlying method is valid.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个稳健不确定性量化框架，用于处理带标签训练数据因标签噪声或标签缺失而受损的情形。我们的方法建立在保形预测之上，这是一种用于生成预测集的统计工具，使其能够以预先指定的概率覆盖测试标签。然而，保形预测的有效性依赖于独立同分布假设，而由于数据中的损坏，这一假设在我们的设定中并不成立。为应对这种分布偏移，已有的特权保形预测（PCP）方法利用特权信息（PI）——仅在训练期间可用的附加特征——对数据分布进行重加权，并在权重准确的假设下得到有效的预测集。在这项工作中，我们分析了 PCP 对权重不准确性的鲁棒性。我们的分析表明，即使权重估计较差，PCP 仍然能够产生有效的不确定性估计。此外，我们提出了不确定插补（UI），这是一种新的保形方法，不依赖于权重估计。相反，我们以保留其不确定性的方式对受损标签进行插补。我们的方法得到理论保证的支持，并在合成基准和真实基准上通过实证验证。最后，我们表明，这些技术可以整合到一个三重稳健框架中，只要至少有一种底层方法有效，就能保证统计上有效的预测。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: EPA: Boosting Event-based Video Frame Interpolation with Perceptually Aligned Learning
title_zh: EPA：用感知对齐学习提升基于事件的视频帧插值
abstract: Event cameras, with their capacity to provide high temporal resolution information between frames, are increasingly utilized for video frame interpolation (VFI) in challenging scenarios characterized by high-speed motion and significant occlusion. However, prevalent issues of blur and distortion within the keyframes and ground truth data used for training and inference in these demanding conditions are frequently overlooked. This oversight impedes the perceptual realism and multi-scene generalization capabilities of existing event-based VFI (E-VFI) methods when generating interpolated frames. Motivated by the observation that semantic-perceptual discrepancies between degraded and pristine images are considerably smaller than their image-level differences, we introduce EPA. This novel E-VFI framework diverges from approaches reliant on direct image-level supervision by constructing multilevel, degradation-insensitive semantic perceptual supervisory signals to enhance the perceptual realism and multi-scene generalization of the model's predictions. Specifically, EPA operates in two phases: it first employs a DINO-based perceptual extractor, a customized style adapter, and a reconstruction generator to derive multi-layered, degradation-insensitive semantic-perceptual features ($\mathcal{S}$). Second, a novel Bidirectional Event-Guided Alignment (BEGA) module utilizes deformable convolutions to align perceptual features from keyframes to ground truth with inter-frame temporal guidance extracted from event signals. By decoupling the learning process from direct image-level supervision, EPA enhances model robustness against degraded keyframes and unreliable ground truth information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this approach yields interpolated frames more consistent with human perceptual preferences. *The code will be released upon acceptance.*
abstract_zh: 事件相机能够在帧间提供高时间分辨率信息，因此在以高速运动和显著遮挡为特征的挑战性场景中，越来越多地被用于视频帧插值（VFI）。然而，在这些苛刻条件下，用于训练和推理的关键帧和真值数据中普遍存在的模糊与畸变问题，常常被忽视。这种忽视阻碍了现有基于事件的 VFI（E-VFI）方法在生成插值帧时的感知真实感和多场景泛化能力。受以下观察启发：退化图像与无退化图像之间的语义感知差异显著小于其图像层面的差异，我们提出了 EPA。该新型 E-VFI 框架不同于依赖直接图像级监督的方法，而是通过构建多层级、对退化不敏感的语义感知监督信号，来提升模型预测结果的感知真实感和多场景泛化能力。具体而言，EPA 分为两个阶段：首先，它采用基于 DINO 的感知特征提取器、定制的风格适配器以及重建生成器，提取多层次、对退化不敏感的语义感知特征（$\mathcal{S}$）。其次，一个新颖的双向事件引导对齐（BEGA）模块利用可变形卷积，在由事件信号提取的帧间时间引导下，将关键帧中的感知特征对齐到真值。通过将学习过程与直接图像级监督解耦，EPA 提升了模型对退化关键帧和不可靠真值信息的鲁棒性。大量实验表明，该方法生成的插值帧与人类感知偏好更加一致。代码将在论文接收后发布。
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。

title: Polychromic Objectives for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 多色目标的强化学习
abstract: Reinforcement learning fine-tuning (RLFT) is a dominant paradigm for improving pretrained policies for downstream tasks. These pretrained policies, trained on large datasets, produce generations with a broad range of promising but unrefined behaviors. Often, a critical failure mode of RLFT arises when policies lose this diversity and collapse into a handful of easily exploitable outputs. This convergence hinders exploration, which is essential for expanding the capabilities of the pretrained policy and for amplifying the benefits of test-time compute scaling. To address this, we introduce an objective for policy gradient methods that explicitly enforces the exploration and refinement of diverse generations, which we call a polychromic objective. We then show how proximal policy optimization (PPO) can be adapted to optimize this objective. Our method (1) employs vine sampling to collect on-policy rollouts and (2) modifies the advantage function to reflect the advantage under our new objective. Experiments on BabyAI, Minigrid, and Algorithmic Creativity show that our method improves success rates by reliably solving a larger set of environment configurations and generalizes better under large perturbations. Moreover, when given multiple attempts in pass@$n$ experiments, the policy achieves substantially higher coverage, demonstrating its ability to maintain and exploit a diverse repertoire of strategies.
abstract_zh: 强化学习微调（RLFT）是改进预训练策略以适应下游任务的一种主导范式。这些在大规模数据集上训练得到的预训练策略，会生成具有广泛且有前景但尚未精炼的行为。RLFT 的一个关键失效模式常常出现在策略丧失这种多样性并坍缩为少数几个容易被利用的输出时。这种收敛会阻碍探索，而探索对于扩展预训练策略的能力以及放大测试时计算扩展的收益至关重要。为了解决这一问题，我们为策略梯度方法引入了一种目标函数，能够显式促进对多样化生成结果的探索与精炼，我们称之为多彩目标（polychromic objective）。随后，我们展示了如何调整近端策略优化（PPO）以优化这一目标。我们的方法（1）采用藤蔓采样（vine sampling）来收集同策略轨迹，（2）修改优势函数，使其反映在我们新目标下的优势。在 BabyAI、Minigrid 和 Algorithmic Creativity 上的实验表明，我们的方法通过可靠地解决更大范围的环境配置，提高了成功率，并且在大幅扰动下具有更好的泛化能力。此外，在 pass@$n$ 实验中，当给予多次尝试机会时，该策略实现了显著更高的覆盖率，表明其能够维持并利用多样化的策略库。
primary_research_object: 强化学习 / 序列决策
notes: 批量一键完成：采纳 AI 预标。
